title: QualiaNet: An Experience-Before-Inference Network
summary: Human 3D vision involves two distinct stages: an Experience Module, where stereo depth is extracted relative to fixation, and an Inference Module, where this experience is interpreted to estimate 3D scene properties. Paradoxically, although our experience of stereo vision does not provide us with distance information, it does affect our inferences about visual scale. We propose the Inference Module exploits a natural scene statistic: near scenes produce vivid disparity gradients, while far scenes appear comparatively flat. QualiaNet implements this two-stage architecture computationally: disparity maps simulating human stereo experience are passed to a CNN trained to estimate distance. The network can recover distance from disparity gradients alone, validating this approach.

AI.tldr: QualiaNet是一个两阶段计算模型，模仿人类3D视觉：先通过经验模块提取视差图，再通过推理模块利用场景统计特性从视差梯度中恢复距离信息。
AI.motivation: 解释人类立体视觉的悖论现象：虽然立体视觉经验本身不提供距离信息，但它影响我们对视觉尺度的判断。这暗示存在一种将视差经验转化为距离推断的机制。
AI.method: 构建双阶段模型：1) 经验模块模拟人类立体经验，生成相对于注视点的视差图；2) 推理模块使用CNN网络，利用近距离场景产生明显视差梯度、远距离场景相对平坦的自然场景统计特性，从视差图中估计距离。
AI.result: 网络仅凭视差梯度就能成功恢复距离信息，验证了该方法的有效性，证实了视差梯度作为距离推断线索的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 人类3D视觉通过双阶段机制运作：立体经验提供视差信息，而推理系统利用自然场景统计规律（视差梯度与距离的关系）来推断3D场景属性，这解释了立体视觉经验如何影响距离认知。

title: HY-World 2.0: A Multi-Modal World Model for Reconstructing, Generating, and Simulating 3D Worlds
summary: We introduce HY-World 2.0, a multi-modal world model framework that advances our prior project HY-World 1.0. HY-World 2.0 accommodates diverse input modalities, including text prompts, single-view images, multi-view images, and videos, and produces 3D world representations. With text or single-view image inputs, the model performs world generation, synthesizing high-fidelity, navigable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes. This is achieved through a four-stage method: a) Panorama Generation with HY-Pano 2.0, b) Trajectory Planning with WorldNav, c) World Expansion with WorldStereo 2.0, and d) World Composition with WorldMirror 2.0. Specifically, we introduce key innovations to enhance panorama fidelity, enable 3D scene understanding and planning, and upgrade WorldStereo, our keyframe-based view generation model with consistent memory. We also upgrade WorldMirror, a feed-forward model for universal 3D prediction, by refining model architecture and learning strategy, enabling world reconstruction from multi-view images or videos. Also, we introduce WorldLens, a high-performance 3DGS rendering platform featuring a flexible engine-agnostic architecture, automatic IBL lighting, efficient collision detection, and training-rendering co-design, enabling interactive exploration of 3D worlds with character support. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HY-World 2.0 achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmarks among open-source approaches, delivering results comparable to the closed-source model Marble. We release all model weights, code, and technical details to facilitate reproducibility and support further research on 3D world models.

AI.tldr: HY-World 2.0是一个先进的多模态世界模型框架，能够根据文本、图像或视频输入生成高保真的可导航3D场景，性能媲美闭源模型Marble。
AI.motivation: 在HY-World 1.0的基础上进一步提升世界模型的能力，支持更多样化的输入模态（文本、单视图/多视图图像、视频），实现更高质量的3D世界生成和重建。
AI.method: 采用四阶段方法：1) HY-Pano 2.0生成全景图；2) WorldNav进行轨迹规划；3) WorldStereo 2.0实现世界扩展；4) WorldMirror 2.0完成世界组合。同时引入WorldLens高性能渲染平台，支持交互式3D世界探索。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到开源方法的SOTA性能，结果与闭源模型Marble相当。所有模型权重、代码和技术细节均已开源。
AI.conclusion: HY-World 2.0显著推动了多模态3D世界模型的发展，通过全景生成、场景理解、视图建模等技术创新实现了高质量3D场景生成，为3DAI研究提供了重要基础。

title: Geometrically Consistent Multi-View Scene Generation from Freehand Sketches
summary:
We tackle a new problem: generating geometrically consistent multi-view scenes from a single freehand sketch. Freehand sketches are the most geometrically impoverished input one could offer a multi-view generator. They convey scene intent through abstract strokes while introducing spatial distortions that actively conflict with any consistent 3D interpretation. No prior method attempts this; existing multi-view approaches require photographs or text, while sketch-to-3D methods need multiple views or costly per-scene optimisation.
  We address three compounding challenges; absent training data, the need for geometric reasoning from distorted 2D input, and cross-view consistency, through three mutually reinforcing contributions: (i) a curated dataset of $\sim$9k sketch-to-multiview samples, constructed via an automated generation and filtering pipeline; (ii) Parallel Camera-Aware Attention Adapters (CA3) that inject geometric inductive biases into the video transformer; and (iii) a Sparse Correspondence Supervision Loss (CSL) derived from Structure-from-Motion reconstructions.
  Our framework synthesizes all views in a single denoising process without requiring reference images, iterative refinement, or per-scene optimization. Our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art two-stage baselines, improving realism (FID) by over 60% and geometric consistency (Corr-Acc) by 23%, while providing up to a 3.7$\times$ inference speedup.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单张手绘草图生成几何一致的多视角场景的新方法，通过构建专用数据集、相机感知注意力适配器和稀疏对应监督损失，显著提升了生成质量和效率。
AI.motivation: 手绘草图是几何信息最匮乏的输入，仅通过抽象线条传达场景意图，同时引入的空间扭曲与任何一致的3D解释相冲突。现有方法需要照片或文本输入，而草图转3D方法需要多个视角或昂贵的逐场景优化，因此需要新的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过三个相互强化的贡献解决问题：(i) 构建约9k个草图到多视角样本的精选数据集；(ii) 并行相机感知注意力适配器(CA3)将几何归纳偏置注入视频变换器；(iii) 基于运动恢复结构重建的稀疏对应监督损失(CSL)。整个框架在单次去噪过程中合成所有视角。
AI.result: 该方法显著优于最先进的两阶段基线，在真实性(FID)上提升超过60%，几何一致性(Corr-Acc)提升23%，同时提供高达3.7倍的推理速度提升。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究首次实现了从单一手绘草图生成几何一致多视角场景，为草图驱动的3D内容创作提供了新的技术路径，在保证质量的同时大幅提高了效率。

title: DharmaOCR: Specialized Small Language Models for Structured OCR that outperform Open-Source and Commercial Baselines
summary: This manuscript introduces DharmaOCR Full and Lite, a pair of specialized small language models (SSLMs) for structured OCR that jointly optimize transcription quality, generation stability, and inference cost. It also presents DharmaOCR-Benchmark, a benchmark that covers printed, handwritten, and legal/administrative documents, and proposes a unified evaluation protocol that measures fidelity and structure while explicitly tracking text degeneration as a first-class benchmark metric (alongside unit cost). Beyond reporting degeneration rates, the manuscript empirically shows degeneration is not merely a quality failure, since it materially worsens production performance by increasing response time, reducing throughput, and inflating computational cost due to abnormally long generations. To the best of the author's knowledge, as a methodological contribution, this is the first application of Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) for OCR, explicitly using degenerate generations as rejected examples to penalize looping behavior. Combined with Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for enforcing a strict JSON schema (header, margin, footer, and text), DPO consistently reduces degeneration rate across model families (up to 87.6% relative) while preserving or improving extraction quality. The resulting models, namely, DharmaOCR Full (7B) and DharmaOCR Lite (3B), set a new state-of-the-art on DharmaOCR-Benchmark, outperforming each open-source and commercial baseline model evaluated regarding extraction quality, reaching 0.925 and 0.911 scores with 0.40% and 0.20% degeneration rates. AWQ quantization reduced up to 22% per-page cost with negligible quality loss, enabling a strong quality-cost trade-off in comparison to proprietary OCR APIs and open-source alternatives.

AI.tldr: DharmaOCR是一对专门的结构化OCR小语言模型(Full 7B和Lite 3B)，通过结合监督微调和直接偏好优化显著降低了文本退化率(最高87.6%)，在保持高质量的同时实现了更低的推理成本。
AI.motivation: 传统的OCR系统在处理结构化文档时面临文本退化、生成不稳定和推理成本高的问题，缺乏统一的评估标准和方法来有效控制异常生成长行为。
AI.method: 创新性地将直接偏好优化(DPO)首次应用于OCR任务，使用退化文本作为负样本来惩罚循环行为，结合监督微调强制执行严格的JSON模式约束，并开发了DharmaOCR-Benchmark基准测试集。
AI.result: DharmaOCR Full和Lite模型在DharmaOCR-Benchmark上分别达到0.925和0.911的提取质量分数，退化率仅为0.40%和0.20%，通过AWQ量化实现了22%的成本降低，超越了所有开源和商业基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了文本退化不仅影响质量还会严重影响生产性能，提出的DPO+SFT方法有效解决了这一问题，为结构化OCR提供了一种高质量、低成本且稳定的解决方案。

title: Compressed-Sensing-Guided, Inference-Aware Structured Reduction for Large Language Models
summary:
Large language models deliver strong generative performance but at the cost of massive parameter counts, memory use, and decoding latency. Prior work has shown that pruning and structured sparsity can preserve accuracy under substantial compression, while prompt-compression methods reduce latency by removing redundant input tokens. However, these two directions remain largely separate. Most model-compression methods are static and optimized offline, and they do not exploit the fact that different prompts and decoding steps activate different latent computational pathways. Prompt-compression methods reduce sequence length, but they do not adapt the executed model subnetwork.
  We propose a unified compressed-sensing-guided framework for dynamic LLM execution. Random measurement operators probe latent model usage, sparse recovery estimates task-conditioned and token-adaptive support sets, and the recovered supports are compiled into hardware-efficient sparse execution paths over blocks, attention heads, channels, and feed-forward substructures. The framework introduces five key contributions: task-conditioned measurements, so different prompts induce different sparse supports; token-adaptive recovery, so active substructures are re-estimated during decoding; formal sample-complexity bounds under restricted isometry or mutual incoherence assumptions; compile-to-hardware constraints that restrict recovery to GPU-efficient structures; and a joint objective that unifies prompt compression with model reduction. Together, these components recast LLM inference as a measurement-and-recovery problem with explicit approximation guarantees and deployment-oriented speedup constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一的压缩感知框架，通过随机测量和稀疏恢复动态执行大型语言模型，实现提示压缩与模型减缩的结合。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型存在参数量大、内存占用高和延迟问题。现有方法中，模型压缩是静态的，提示压缩不适应模型子网络，两者缺乏统一且无法利用不同提示和解码步骤激活不同计算路径的特性。
AI.method: 采用随机测量算子探测潜在模型使用情况，稀疏恢复估计任务条件和令牌自适应的支撑集，并将恢复的支撑编译为硬件高效的稀疏执行路径。框架包含五个关键组件：任务条件测量、令牌自适应恢复、形式化样本复杂度界限、硬件约束编译和联合目标函数。
AI.result: 将LLM推理重构为测量恢复问题，提供显式近似保证和面向部署的加速约束，实现动态适应不同提示和解码步骤的稀疏执行。
AI.conclusion: 该框架统一了提示压缩和模型减缩两个方向，通过动态稀疏执行路径为大型语言模型提供了更高效的推理方案。

title: Interpretable Human Activity Recognition for Subtle Robbery Detection in Surveillance Videos
summary: Non-violent street robberies (snatch-and-run) are difficult to detect automatically because they are brief, subtle, and often indistinguishable from benign human interactions in unconstrained surveillance footage. This paper presents a hybrid, pose-driven approach for detecting snatch-and-run events that combines real-time perception with an interpretable classification stage suitable for edge deployment. The system uses a YOLO-based pose estimator to extract body keypoints for each tracked person and computes kinematic and interaction features describing hand speed, arm extension, proximity, and relative motion between an aggressor-victim pair. A Random Forest classifier is trained on these descriptors, and a temporal hysteresis filter is applied to stabilize frame-level predictions and reduce spurious alarms. We evaluate the method on a staged dataset and on a disjoint test set collected from internet videos, demonstrating promising generalization across different scenes and camera viewpoints. Finally, we implement the complete pipeline on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano and report real-time performance, supporting the feasibility of proactive, on-device robbery detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于姿态估计的混合方法，通过YOLO提取人体关键点，结合运动学特征和随机森林分类器，实现实时暴力抢劫检测，可在边缘设备部署运行。
AI.motivation: 非暴力街头抢劫（抢夺后逃跑）事件在监控视频中具有短暂、细微且与正常人类互动难以区分的特点，导致自动检测困难，需要开发实时、可解释的边缘部署解决方案。
AI.method: 采用YOLO姿态估计器提取每个人的身体关键点，计算运动学和交互特征（包括手部速度、手臂伸展、接近程度和相对运动），使用随机森林分类器进行分类，并通过时间滞后滤波器稳定帧级预测。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和互联网视频测试集上验证了方法的泛化能力，在NVIDIA Jetson Nano上实现实时性能，支持主动式设备端抢劫检测的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该混合方法结合了深度学习的感知能力和传统机器学习的可解释性，在实际部署中表现出良好的泛化性和实时性，为边缘设备上的抢劫检测提供了可行的技术方案。

title: MemGround: Long-Term Memory Evaluation Kit for Large Language Models in Gamified Scenarios
summary: Current evaluations of long-term memory in LLMs are fundamentally static. By fixating on simple retrieval and short-context inference, they neglect the multifaceted nature of complex memory systems, such as dynamic state tracking and hierarchical reasoning in continuous interactions. To overcome these limitations, we propose MemGround, a rigorous long-term memory benchmark natively grounded in rich, gamified interactive scenarios. To systematically assess these capabilities, MemGround introduces a three-tier hierarchical framework that evaluates Surface State Memory, Temporal Associative Memory, and Reasoning-Based Memory through specialized interactive tasks. Furthermore, to comprehensively quantify both memory utilization and behavioral trajectories, we propose a multi-dimensional metric suite comprising Question-Answer Score (QA Overall), Memory Fragments Unlocked (MFU), Memory Fragments with Correct Order (MFCO), and Exploration Trajectory Diagrams (ETD). Extensive experiments reveal that state-of-the-art LLMs and memory agents still struggle with sustained dynamic tracking, temporal event association, and complex reasoning derived from long-term accumulated evidence in interactive environments.

AI.tldr: MemGround是一个基于游戏化交互场景的长时记忆评测基准，通过三层评估框架和多维度指标来全面测试LLMs的复杂记忆能力。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs的长时记忆评估过于静态和简单，仅关注基础检索和短上下文推理，忽视了复杂记忆系统的多面性，如动态状态跟踪和分层推理等能力。
AI.method: 提出MemGround评测基准，构建三层分层框架（表层状态记忆、时序关联记忆、基于推理的记忆），并通过专门的交互任务评估。同时设计多维度指标套件（QA总分、解锁记忆片段数、正确顺序记忆片段数、探索轨迹图）来量化记忆利用和行为轨迹。
AI.result: 实验表明，最先进的LLMs和记忆体在交互环境中仍难以应对持续的动态跟踪、时序事件关联以及基于长期累积证据的复杂推理。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLMs在复杂长时记忆任务上存在显著不足，需要更全面的评测标准和改进的记忆机制来提升在动态交互环境中的表现。

title: SatBLIP: Context Understanding and Feature Identification from Satellite Imagery with Vision-Language Learning
summary: Rural environmental risks are shaped by place-based conditions (e.g., housing quality, road access, land-surface patterns), yet standard vulnerability indices are coarse and provide limited insight into risk contexts. We propose SatBLIP, a satellite-specific vision-language framework for rural context understanding and feature identification that predicts county-level Social Vulnerability Index (SVI). SatBLIP addresses limitations of prior remote sensing pipelines-handcrafted features, manual virtual audits, and natural-image-trained VLMs-by coupling contrastive image-text alignment with bootstrapped captioning tailored to satellite semantics. We use GPT-4o to generate structured descriptions of satellite tiles (roof type/condition, house size, yard attributes, greenery, and road context), then fine-tune a satellite-adapted BLIP model to generate captions for unseen images. Captions are encoded with CLIP and fused with LLM-derived embeddings via attention for SVI estimation under spatial aggregation. Using SHAP, we identify salient attributes (e.g., roof form/condition, street width, vegetation, cars/open space) that consistently drive robust predictions, enabling interpretable mapping of rural risk environments.

AI.tldr: SatBLIP是一个卫星专用视觉语言框架，通过结合卫星图像语义理解与自然语言处理，预测县级社会脆弱性指数，提供可解释的农村环境风险评估。
AI.motivation: 传统脆弱性指数过于粗糙，无法提供深入的风险背景洞察。现有的遥感方法存在手工特征、人工审计和基于自然图像训练的视觉语言模型等局限性，迫切需要更精细化的农村环境风险评估工具。
AI.method: SatBLIP采用对比性图文对齐技术和针对卫星语义的引导式字幕生成。使用GPT-4o生成卫星瓦片的结构化描述，微调卫星适应性BLIP模型为新图像生成字幕，通过CLIP编码字幕，结合注意力机制融合LLP派生的嵌入，最终进行空间聚合下的SVI估计。
AI.result: 研究通过SHAP分析识别出关键驱动属性（屋顶形态/状况、街道宽度、植被、汽车/开放空间），这些属性稳定驱动预测结果，实现了农村风险环境的可解释性映射。
AI.conclusion: SatBLIP成功克服了传统方法的局限性，为农村环境风险评估提供了更精确、可解释的解决方案，显著提升了对农村环境风险空间模式的理解能力。

title: HUOZIIME: An On-Device LLM-enhanced Input Method for Deep Personalization
summary: Mobile input method editors (IMEs) are the primary interface for text input, yet they remain constrained to manual typing and struggle to produce personalized text. While lightweight large language models (LLMs) make on-device auxiliary generation feasible, enabling deeply personalized, privacy-preserving, and real-time generative IMEs poses fundamental challenges.To this end, we present HUOZIIME, a personalized on-device IME powered by LLM. We endow HUOZIIME with initial human-like prediction ability by post-training a base LLM on synthesized personalization data. Notably, a hierarchical memory mechanism is designed to continually capture and leverage user-specific input history. Furthermore, we perform systemic optimizations tailored to on-device LLMbased IME deployment, ensuring efficient and responsive operation under mobile constraints.Experiments demonstrate efficient on-device execution and high-fidelity memory-driven personalization. Code and package are available at https://github.com/Shan-HIT/HuoziIME.

AI.tldr: HUOZIIME是一个基于LLM的个性化移动端输入法，通过分层记忆机制实现隐私保护、实时的个性化文本输入。
AI.motivation: 传统移动端输入法局限于手动输入，难以生成个性化文本。虽然轻量级LLM使设备端辅助生成成为可能，但要实现深度个性化、隐私保护且实时的生成式输入法仍面临根本挑战。
AI.method: 1) 通过在合成的个性化数据上对基础LLM进行后训练，赋予初始的类人预测能力；2) 设计分层记忆机制，持续捕获和利用用户特定的输入历史；3) 针对移动端LLM输入法部署进行系统性优化。
AI.result: 实验证明该系统能够高效在设备端运行，并实现高保真的记忆驱动个性化功能。
AI.conclusion: HUOZIIME成功解决了隐私保护、实时性和个性化三大挑战，为生成式移动端输入法提供了可行的解决方案。

title: FoodSense: A Multisensory Food Dataset and Benchmark for Predicting Taste, Smell, Texture, and Sound from Images
summary: Humans routinely infer taste, smell, texture, and even sound from food images a phenomenon well studied in cognitive science. However, prior vision language research on food has focused primarily on recognition tasks such as meal identification, ingredient detection, and nutrition estimation. Image-based prediction of multisensory experience remains largely unexplored. We introduce FoodSense, a human-annotated dataset for cross-sensory inference containing 66,842 participant-image pairs across 2,987 unique food images. Each pair includes numeric ratings (1-5) and free-text descriptors for four sensory dimensions: taste, smell, texture, and sound. To enable models to both predict and explain sensory expectations, we expand short human annotations into image-grounded reasoning traces. A large language model generates visual justifications conditioned on the image, ratings, and descriptors. Using these annotations, we train FoodSense-VL, a vision language benchmark model to produce both multisensory ratings and grounded explanations directly from food images. This work connects cognitive science findings on cross-sensory perception with modern instruction tuning for multimodal models and shows that many popular evaluation metrics are insufficient for visually sensory inference.

AI.tldr: FoodSense是一个用于跨感官推断的数据集，包含66,842个人工标注数据，使视觉语言模型能够从食物图像预测味觉、嗅觉、质地和声音，并提供解释。
AI.motivation: 人类能够从食物图像推断多种感官体验，但现有视觉语言研究仅关注识别任务，缺乏对多感官体验预测的研究。
AI.method: 构建大规模人工标注数据集，使用大语言模型生成视觉推理轨迹，训练FoodSense-VL模型进行多感官评分和解释生成。
AI.result: 提出了首个食物多感官推断数据集和基准模型，发现现有评估指标不足以衡量视觉感官推断任务。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将认知科学的跨感官感知发现与多模态模型指令调优相结合，为视觉感官推断研究开辟了新方向。

title: Can Large Language Models Detect Methodological Flaws? Evidence from Gesture Recognition for UAV-Based Rescue Operation Based on Deep Learning
summary: Reliable evaluation is essential in machine learning research, yet methodological flaws-particularly data leakage-continue to undermine the validity of reported results. In this work, we investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can act as independent analytical agents capable of identifying such issues in published studies. As a case study, we analyze a gesture-recognition paper reporting near-perfect accuracy on a small, human-centered dataset. We first show that the evaluation protocol is consistent with subject-level data leakage due to non-independent training and test splits. We then assess whether this flaw can be detected independently by six state-of-the-art LLMs, each analyzing the original paper without prior context using an identical prompt. All models consistently identify the evaluation as flawed and attribute the reported performance to non-independent data partitioning, supported by indicators such as overlapping learning curves, minimal generalization gap, and near-perfect classification results. These findings suggest that LLMs can detect common methodological issues based solely on published artifacts. While not definitive, their consistent agreement highlights their potential as complementary tools for improving reproducibility and supporting scientific auditing.

AI.tldr: 研究表明大型语言模型能够独立识别机器学习论文中的方法学缺陷（特别是数据泄露问题），充当科学审计工具。
AI.motivation: 机器学习研究中数据泄露等方法学缺陷持续影响研究结果的有效性，需要独立的自动化工具来帮助识别这些问题以提高研究可重复性。
AI.method: 以一个手势识别论文为案例研究，该论文在小数据集上报告了近乎完美的准确率。研究者首先通过分析证实其评估协议存在受试者级别的数据泄露，然后让6个最先进的LLM独立分析原始论文，使用相同的提示词但无先验上下文。
AI.result: 所有LLM模型都一致性地识别出评估存在缺陷，并将报告的性能归因于非独立的数据划分，其判断依据包括重叠的学习曲线、极小的泛化差距和近乎完美的分类结果。
AI.conclusion: LLMs能够仅基于已发表的研究材料识别常见的方法学问题，虽然不能作为最终判断，但其一致性意见突显了它们作为提高可重复性和支持科学审计的补充工具的潜力。

title: Zero-Ablation Overstates Register Content Dependence in DINO Vision Transformers
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, to be published in CVPR 2026 HOW Vision Interpretability Workshop Proceedings
summary: Zero-ablation -- replacing token activations with zero vectors -- is widely used to probe token function in vision transformers. Register zeroing in DINOv2+registers and DINOv3 produces large drops (up to $-36.6$\,pp classification, $-30.9$\,pp segmentation), suggesting registers are functionally indispensable. However, three replacement controls -- mean-substitution, noise-substitution, and cross-image register-shuffling -- preserve performance across classification, correspondence, and segmentation, remaining within ${\sim}1$\,pp of the unmodified baseline. Per-patch cosine similarity shows these replacements genuinely perturb internal representations, while zeroing causes disproportionately large perturbations, consistent with why it alone degrades tasks. We conclude that zero-ablation overstates dependence on exact register content. In the frozen-feature evaluations we test, performance depends on plausible register-like activations rather than on exact image-specific values. Registers nevertheless buffer dense features from \texttt{[CLS]} dependence and are associated with compressed patch geometry. These findings, including the replacement-control results, replicate at ViT-B scale.

AI.tldr: 零消融实验高估了视觉Transformer中寄存器的重要性，当使用更合理的替代方案时，寄存器功能仍然能够保持。
AI.motivation: 零消融实验显示寄存器对视觉Transformer的功能至关重要，但这一结论可能过于绝对，需要验证是否存在更准确的评估方法。
AI.method: 通过三种替代控制实验（均值替代、噪声替代、跨图像寄存器洗牌）来对比零消融效果，并使用余弦相似度分析内部表示的真实变化。
AI.result: 替代方案能够保持性能（在基准的1pp范围内），而零消融导致过度扰动和性能大幅下降；寄存器主要起缓冲作用而非存储特定图像信息。
AI.conclusion: 寄存器的重要性被零消融夸大了，系统实际上只需要合理的类寄存器激活模式，而非精确的特定值；这一发现在ViT-B规模下得到验证。

title: Decoupling Scores and Text: The Politeness Principle in Peer Review
summary: Authors often struggle to interpret peer review feedback, deriving false hope from polite comments or feeling confused by specific low scores. To investigate this, we construct a dataset of over 30,000 ICLR 2021-2025 submissions and compare acceptance prediction performance using numerical scores versus text reviews. Our experiments reveal a significant performance gap: score-based models achieve 91% accuracy, while text-based models reach only 81% even with large language models, indicating that textual information is considerably less reliable. To explain this phenomenon, we first analyze the 9% of samples that score-based models fail to predict, finding their score distributions exhibit high kurtosis and negative skewness, which suggests that individual low scores play a decisive role in rejection even when the average score falls near the borderline. We then examine why text-based accuracy significantly lags behind scores from a review sentiment perspective, revealing the prevalence of the Politeness Principle: reviews of rejected papers still contain more positive than negative sentiment words, masking the true rejection signal and making it difficult for authors to judge outcomes from text alone.

AI.tldr: 通过对3万多篇ICLR投稿的分析发现，基于评分的论文接受度预测准确率达91%，而基于文本评论的预测仅81%。这表明审稿人的礼貌原则使得被拒论文的评论仍包含更多正面词汇，掩盖了真实的拒绝信号。
AI.motivation: 作者在解读同行评议反馈时存在困难，容易从礼貌评论中产生误解，或对具体低分感到困惑，影响对论文接受情况的判断。
AI.method: 构建包含3万多篇ICLR 2021-2025投稿的数据集，分别使用数值评分和文本评论进行接受度预测，分析预测失败样本的评分分布特征，并从情感分析角度研究文本评论的可靠性。
AI.result: 基于评分的模型准确率比基于文本的模型高10%；评分预测失败的样本呈现高峰度和负偏态分布；被拒论文的审稿意见中正面词汇仍多于负面词汇，存在礼貌原则现象。
AI.conclusion: 审稿人遵循礼貌原则使得文本评论的可靠性显著低于数值评分，作者应更加重视分数而非单纯依赖文本评论来判断论文接受可能性，特别是当存在个别低分时应谨慎对待。

title: Crowdsourcing of Real-world Image Annotation via Visual Properties
summary: Recent advances in data-centric artificial intelligence highlight inherent limitations in object recognition datasets. One of the primary issues stems from the semantic gap problem, which results in complex many-to-many mappings between visual data and linguistic descriptions. This bias adversely affects performance in computer vision tasks. This paper proposes an image annotation methodology that integrates knowledge representation, natural language processing, and computer vision techniques, aiming to reduce annotator subjectivity by applying visual property constraints. We introduce an interactive crowdsourcing framework that dynamically asks questions based on a predefined object category hierarchy and annotator feedback, guiding image annotation by visual properties. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of this methodology, and annotator feedback is discussed to optimize the crowdsourcing setup.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合知识表示、自然语言处理和计算机视觉的图像标注方法，通过视觉属性约束和交互式众包框架来减少标注主观性问题。
AI.motivation: 对象识别数据集存在语义鸿沟问题，导致视觉数据与语言描述之间复杂的多对多映射，这种偏见对计算机视觉任务性能产生不利影响，需要减少标注者主观性。
AI.method: 设计了一个交互式众包框架，基于预定义的对象类别层次结构和标注者反馈动态提问，通过视觉属性引导图像标注过程，结合知识表示、NLP和CV技术。
AI.result: 实验证明了该方法的有效性，通过分析标注者反馈来优化众包设置，提高了标注质量。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功减少了图像标注中的主观性偏差，为构建更高质量的对象识别数据集提供了有效解决方案。

title: SeaAlert: Critical Information Extraction From Maritime Distress Communications with Large Language Models
summary: Maritime distress communications transmitted over very high frequency (VHF) radio are safety-critical voice messages used to report emergencies at sea. Under the Global Maritime Distress and Safety System (GMDSS), such messages follow standardized procedures and are expected to convey essential details, including vessel identity, position, nature of the distress, and required assistance. In practice, however, automatic analysis remains difficult because distress messages are often brief, noisy, and produced under stress, may deviate from the prescribed format, and are further degraded by automatic speech recognition (ASR) errors caused by channel noise and speaker stress. This paper presents SeaAlert, an LLM-based framework for robust analysis of maritime distress communications. To address the scarcity of labeled real-world data, we develop a synthetic data generation pipeline in which an LLM produces realistic and diverse maritime messages, including challenging variants in which standard distress codewords are omitted or replaced with less explicit expressions. The generated utterances are synthesized into speech, degraded with simulated VHF noise, and transcribed by an ASR system to obtain realistic noisy transcripts.

AI.tldr: SeaAlert是一个基于LLM的海上遇险通信分析框架，通过合成数据生成技术解决真实标注数据稀缺问题，实现对嘈杂和非标准化紧急消息的鲁棒分析。
AI.motivation: 海上遇险通信是安全关键的语音消息，但在实践中由于消息简短、嘈杂、压力环境下产生、可能偏离标准格式，以及ASR错误等原因，自动分析仍然困难。
AI.method: 开发基于LLM的合成数据生成管道，生成真实多样的海上消息（包括省略或替换标准遇险代码词的挑战性变体），将生成的语句合成为语音，添加模拟VHF噪声，通过ASR系统转录获得真实的嘈杂转录文本。
AI.result: 构建了完整的SeaAlert框架，能够处理包含ASR错误和非标准表达的海上遇险通信，为海事安全提供了更可靠的分析工具。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新性的合成数据生成方法，有效解决了海上遇险通信分析中标注数据稀缺的问题，提高了在真实复杂环境下自动分析遇险消息的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: Co-distilled attention guided masked image modeling with noisy teacher for self-supervised learning on medical images
summary: Masked image modeling (MIM) is a highly effective self-supervised learning (SSL) approach to extract useful feature representations from unannotated data. Predominantly used random masking methods make SSL less effective for medical images due to the contextual similarity of neighboring patches, leading to information leakage and SSL simplification. Hierarchical shifted window (Swin) transformer, a highly effective approach for medical images cannot use advanced masking methods as it lacks a global [CLS] token. Hence, we introduced an attention guided masking mechanism for Swin within a co-distillation learning framework to selectively mask semantically co-occurring and discriminative patches, to reduce information leakage and increase the difficulty of SSL pretraining. However, attention guided masking inevitably reduces the diversity of attention heads, which negatively impacts downstream task performance. To address this, we for the first time, integrate a noisy teacher into the co-distillation framework (termed DAGMaN) that performs attentive masking while preserving high attention head diversity. We demonstrate the capability of DAGMaN on multiple tasks including full- and few-shot lung nodule classification, immunotherapy outcome prediction, tumor segmentation, and unsupervised organs clustering.

AI.tldr: DAGMaN是一种结合注意力引导掩码和噪声教师的协同蒸馏框架，用于改进医学图像的自监督学习，特别适用于Swin Transformer架构。
AI.motivation: 传统的随机掩码方法在医学图像中效果较差，因为相邻图像块的上下文相似性导致信息泄露和SSL简化。Swin Transformer缺乏全局[CLS]标记，无法使用高级掩码方法。
AI.method: 提出注意力引导掩码机制，选择性地掩码语义共存和判别性图像块；首次在协同蒸馏框架中集成噪声教师，在执行注意力掩码的同时保持高注意力头多样性。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像任务上展示了有效性，包括全样本和少样本肺结节分类、免疫治疗结果预测、肿瘤分割和无监督器官聚类。
AI.conclusion: DAGMaN框架成功解决了医学图像自监督学习中的信息泄露问题和注意力头多样性降低问题，为医学图像分析提供了一个有效的预训练解决方案。

title: How to Fine-Tune a Reasoning Model? A Teacher-Student Cooperation Framework to Synthesize Student-Consistent SFT Data
summary: A widely adopted strategy for model enhancement is to use synthetic data generated by a stronger model for supervised fine-tuning (SFT). However, for emerging reasoning models like Qwen3-8B, this approach often fails to improve reasoning capabilities and can even lead to a substantial drop in performance. In this work, we identify substantial stylistic divergence between teacher generated data and the distribution of student as a major factor impacting SFT. To bridge this gap, we propose a Teacher-Student Cooperation Data Synthesis framework (TESSY), which interleaves teacher and student models to alternately generate style and non-style tokens. Consequently, TESSY produces synthetic sequences that inherit the advanced reasoning capabilities of the teacher while maintaining stylistic consistency with the distribution of the student. In experiments on code generation using GPT-OSS-120B as the teacher, fine-tuning Qwen3-8B on teacher-generated data leads to performance drops of 3.25% on LiveCodeBench-Pro and 10.02% on OJBench, whereas TESSY achieves improvements of 11.25% and 6.68%.

AI.tldr: TESSY框架通过师生交替生成tokens的方式，解决了传统SFT中教师模型与学生模型风格不一致导致的性能下降问题，在代码生成任务中显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 传统使用强教师模型生成的合成数据进行监督微调的方法在新兴 reasoning 模型上不但不能提升，反而会导致性能大幅下降，主要是由于教师生成数据与学生模型的分布在风格上存在巨大差异。
AI.method: 提出了Teacher-Student Cooperation Data Synthesis (TESSY)框架，让教师模型和学生模型交替生成风格tokens和非风格tokens，生成既保持教师高级推理能力又与学生风格一致的合成序列。
AI.result: 以GPT-OSS-120B为教师模型，在Qwen3-8B上进行实验。教师数据直接微调导致LiveCodeBench-Pro下降3.25%，OJBench下降10.02%；而TESSY方法分别提升11.25%和6.68%。
AI.conclusion: TESSY成功解决了风格不一致问题，证明师生协作的数据合成方式能有效提升新兴reasoning模型的推理能力，为模型微调提供了新的有效路径。

title: H2VLR: Heterogeneous Hypergraph Vision-Language Reasoning for Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: As a classic vision task, anomaly detection has been widely applied in industrial inspection and medical imaging. In this task, data scarcity is often a frequently-faced issue. To solve it, the few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD) scheme is attracting increasing attention. In recent years, beyond traditional visual paradigm, Vision-Language Model (VLM) has been extensively explored to boost this field. However, in currently-existing VLM-based FSAD schemes, almost all perform anomaly inference only by pairwise feature matching, ignoring structural dependencies and global consistency. To further redound to FSAD via VLM, we propose a Heterogeneous Hypergraph Vision-Language Reasoning (H2VLR) framework. It reformulates the FSAD as a high-order inference problem of visual-semantic relations, by jointly modeling visual regions and semantic concepts in a unified hypergraph. Experimental comparisons verify the effectiveness and advantages of H2VLR. It could often achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on representative industrial and medical benchmarks. Our code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了一种基于异质超图的视觉-语言推理框架H2VLR，用于解决少样本异常检测问题，通过高阶推理建模视觉-语义关系，在工业和医疗基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于VLM的少样本异常检测方法主要采用成对特征匹配，忽略了结构依赖性和全局一致性，限制了检测性能的提升。
AI.method: 提出H2VLR框架，将少样本异常检测重新表述为视觉-语义关系的高阶推理问题，通过统一的超图联合建模视觉区域和语义概念。
AI.result: 实验验证了H2VLR的有效性和优势，在代表性的工业和医疗基准数据集上经常达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: H2VLR框架通过超图建模高阶视觉-语义关系，成功改进了基于VLM的少样本异常检测性能，为该领域提供了新的解决思路。

title: EviSearch: A Human in the Loop System for Extracting and Auditing Clinical Evidence for Systematic Reviews
summary: We present EviSearch, a multi-agent extraction system that automates the creation of ontology-aligned clinical evidence tables directly from native trial PDFs while guaranteeing per-cell provenance for audit and human verification. EviSearch pairs a PDF-query agent (which preserves rendered layout and figures) with a retrieval-guided search agent and a reconciliation module that forces page-level verification when agents disagree. The pipeline is designed for high-precision extraction across multimodal evidence sources (text, tables, figures) and for generating reviewer-actionable provenance that clinicians can inspect and correct. On a clinician-curated benchmark of oncology trial papers, EviSearch substantially improves extraction accuracy relative to strong parsed-text baselines while providing comprehensive attribution coverage. By logging reconciler decisions and reviewer edits, the system produces structured preference and supervision signals that bootstrap iterative model improvement. EviSearch is intended to accelerate living systematic review workflows, reduce manual curation burden, and provide a safe, auditable path for integrating LLM-based extraction into evidence synthesis pipelines.

AI.tldr: EviSearch是一个多智能体提取系统，能自动从临床试验PDF中生成与本体对齐的临床证据表格，并提供可追溯的来源信息用于审核验证。
AI.motivation: 为解决临床证据合成过程中的手动整理负担，需要开发一个自动化的高精度提取系统，能够从PDF文档中准确提取多模态证据（文本、表格、图表），并提供可审查的来源追溯。
AI.method: 系统采用PDF查询智能体（保持渲染布局和图表）、检索引导搜索智能体和协调模块的三智能体架构。当智能体意见不一致时，强制进行页面级验证，确保高精度提取和全面的归因覆盖。
AI.result: 在肿瘤学临床试验论文基准测试中，EviSearch显著提高了提取准确性，超越了解析文本基线方法，同时提供全面的归因覆盖。系统的决策记录和编辑操作可用于模型迭代改进。
AI.conclusion: 该系统旨在加速活体系统综述工作流程，减少手动整理负担，为将基于LLM的提取技术安全整合到证据合成流程中提供可审计的路径。

title: Chain of Modality: From Static Fusion to Dynamic Orchestration in Omni-MLLMs
summary: Omni-modal Large Language Models (Omni-MLLMs) promise a unified integration of diverse sensory streams. However, recent evaluations reveal a critical performance paradox: unimodal baselines frequently outperform joint multimodal inference. We trace this perceptual fragility to the static fusion topologies universally employed by current models, identifying two structural pathologies: positional bias in sequential inputs and alignment traps in interleaved formats, which systematically distort attention regardless of task semantics. To resolve this functional rigidity, we propose Chain of Modality (CoM), an agentic framework that transitions multimodal fusion from passive concatenation to dynamic orchestration. CoM adaptively orchestrates input topologies, switching among parallel, sequential, and interleaved pathways to neutralize structural biases. Furthermore, CoM bifurcates cognitive execution into two task-aligned pathways: a streamlined ``Direct-Decide'' path for direct perception and a structured ``Reason-Decide'' path for analytical auditing. Operating in either a training-free or a data-efficient SFT setting, CoM achieves robust and consistent generalization across diverse benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 针对全模态大语言模型存在单模态基线超越多模态推理的悖论问题，本文提出了链式模态(CoM)框架，通过动态编排融合拓扑和双路径执行机制，有效解决了静态融合带来的感知脆弱性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有全模态大语言模型采用静态融合拓扑导致感知脆弱性，出现单模态性能超越多模态推理的反常现象，这主要源于序列输入的位置偏差和交错格式的对齐陷阱等结构性病理。
AI.method: 提出链式模态(CoM)框架：1)静态融合转为动态编排，自适应切换并行、序列和交错路径；2)双路径认知执行：直接感知的'Direct-Decide'路径和分析审核的'Reason-Decide'路径；3)支持免训练和数据高效的SFT两种模式。
AI.result: CoM在不同基准测试中实现了稳健且一致的泛化性能，有效解决了多模态融合中的结构性偏差问题，超越了现有的静态融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将多模态融合从被动拼接转向动态编排，并采用任务对齐的双路径执行策略，CoM为解决全模态模型的感知脆弱性提供了有效方案，实现了更鲁棒的多模态推理能力。

title: Hierarchical Retrieval Augmented Generation for Adversarial Technique Annotation in Cyber Threat Intelligence Text
summary: Mapping Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) text to MITRE ATT\&CK technique IDs is a critical task for understanding adversary behaviors and automating threat defense. While recent Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) approaches have demonstrated promising capabilities in this domain, they fundamentally rely on a flat retrieval paradigm. By treating all techniques uniformly, these methods overlook the inherent taxonomy of the ATT\&CK framework, where techniques are structurally organized under high-level tactics. In this paper, we propose H-TechniqueRAG, a novel hierarchical RAG framework that injects this tactic-technique taxonomy as a strong inductive bias to achieve highly efficient and accurate annotation. Our approach introduces a two-stage hierarchical retrieval mechanism: it first identifies the macro-level tactics (the adversary's technical goals) and subsequently narrows the search to techniques within those tactics, effectively reducing the candidate search space by 77.5\%. To further bridge the gap between retrieval and generation, we design a tactic-aware reranking module and a hierarchy-constrained context organization strategy that mitigates LLM context overload and improves reasoning precision. Comprehensive experiments across three diverse CTI datasets demonstrate that H-TechniqueRAG not only outperforms the state-of-the-art TechniqueRAG by 3.8\% in F1 score, but also achieves a 62.4\% reduction in inference latency and a 60\% decrease in LLM API calls. Further analysis reveals that our hierarchical structural priors equip the model with superior cross-domain generalization and provide security analysts with highly interpretable, step-by-step decision paths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了H-TechniqueRAG，一种分层检索增强生成框架，利用MITRE ATT&CK的战术-技术层次结构来提高网络威胁情报映射的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的RAG方法在CTI文本到ATT&CK技术ID映射任务中采用扁平化检索范式，忽略了ATT&CK框架固有的分层分类结构，导致检索效率低下且精度有限。
AI.method: H-TechniqueRAG采用两阶段分层检索机制：首先识别宏观层面的战术目标，然后在这些战术内搜索具体技术，将候选搜索空间减少77.5%。同时设计了战术感知重排序模块和层次约束的上下文组织策略来优化生成过程。
AI.result: 在三个CTI数据集上的实验表明，H-TechniqueRAG比现有最优方法TechniqueRAG的F1分数提高3.8%，推理延迟减少62.4%，LLM API调用减少60%。模型还展现出更强的跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 分层结构先验不仅显著提升了映射任务的效率和准确性，还为安全分析师提供了高度可解释的逐步决策路径，展现了分层RAG范式在网络安全领域的巨大潜力。

title: FreqTrack: Frequency Learning based Vision Transformer for RGB-Event Object Tracking
summary: Existing single-modal RGB trackers often face performance bottlenecks in complex dynamic scenes, while the introduction of event sensors offers new potential for enhancing tracking capabilities. However, most current RGB-event fusion methods, primarily designed in the spatial domain using convolutional, Transformer, or Mamba architectures, fail to fully exploit the unique temporal response and high-frequency characteristics of event data. To address this, we1 propose FreqTrack, a frequency-aware RGBE tracking framework that establishes complementary inter-modal correlations through frequency-domain transformations for more robust feature fusion. We design a Spectral Enhancement Transformer (SET) layer that incorporates multi-head dynamic Fourier filtering to adaptively enhance and select frequency-domain features. Additionally, we develop a Wavelet Edge Refinement (WER) module, which leverages learnable wavelet transforms to explicitly extract multi-scale edge structures from event data, effectively improving modeling capability in high-speed and low-light scenarios. Extensive experiments on the COESOT and FE108 datasets demonstrate that FreqTrack achieves highly competitive performance, particularly attaining leading precision of 76.6\% on the COESOT benchmark, validating the effectiveness of frequency-domain modeling for RGBE tracking.

AI.tldr: FreqTrack是一个频域感知的RGB-事件融合跟踪框架，通过频域变换和频谱增强变换器层实现更鲁棒的特征融合，在复杂场景下获得76.6%的领先精度。
AI.motivation: 现单模态RGB跟踪器在复杂动态场景中存在性能瓶颈，而现有RGB-事件融合方法主要在空间域设计，未能充分利用事件数据的独特时域响应和高频特性。
AI.method: 提出FreqTrack框架，设计频谱增强变换器(SET)层实现多头动态傅里叶滤波，开发小波边缘优化(WER)模块通过可学习小波变换显式提取事件数据的多尺度边缘结构。
AI.result: 在COESOT和FE108数据集上取得高度竞争力性能，特别是在COESOT基准测试中达到76.6%的领先精度。
AI.conclusion: 频域建模对RGB-事件跟踪有效，FreqTrack通过频率域变换和互补的跨模态相关性建立了更鲁棒的特征融合方法。

title: Chinese Essay Rhetoric Recognition Using LoRA, In-context Learning and Model Ensemble
summary: Rhetoric recognition is a critical component in automated essay scoring. By identifying rhetorical elements in student writing, AI systems can better assess linguistic and higher-order thinking skills, making it an essential task in the area of AI for education. In this paper, we leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) for the Chinese rhetoric recognition task. Specifically, we explore Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) based fine-tuning and in-context learning to integrate rhetoric knowledge into LLMs. We formulate the outputs as JSON to obtain structural outputs and translate keys to Chinese. To further enhance the performance, we also investigate several model ensemble methods. Our method achieves the best performance on all three tracks of CCL 2025 Chinese essay rhetoric recognition evaluation task, winning the first prize.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用大语言模型（LLMs）完成中文修辞识别任务，通过LoRA微调和上下文学习等方法，在CCL 2025评测中获得全部三个赛道的第一名。
AI.motivation: 修辞识别是自动作文评分的关键组成部分，能够帮助AI系统更好地评估学生的语言能力和高阶思维技能，是AI教育领域的重要任务。
AI.method: 采用LoRA微调和上下文学习技术将修辞知识集成到LLMs中，将输出格式化为JSON以获得结构化结果，并将键值翻译为中文，同时研究了多种模型集成方法以进一步提升性能。
AI.result: 该方法在CCL 2025中文作文修辞识别评测任务的三个赛道上均取得最佳表现，荣获一等奖。
AI.conclusion: 基于大语言模型的修辞识别方法通过有效的知识集成策略和结构化输出设计，能够显著提升中文修辞识别的准确率，为AI教育领域的自动作文评分提供了有力支持。

title: Design and Validation of a Low-Cost Smartphone Based Fluorescence Detection Platform Compared with Conventional Microplate Readers
summary: A low cost fluorescence-based optical system is developed for detecting the presence of certain microorganisms and molecules within a diluted sample. A specifically designed device setup compatible with conventional 96 well plates is chosen to create an ideal environment in which a smart phone camera can be used as the optical detector. In comparison with conventional microplate reading machines such as Perkin Elmer Victor Machine, the device presented in this paper is not equipped with expensive elements such as exciter filer, barrier filter and photomultiplier; instead, a phone camera is all needed to detect fluorescence within the sample. The strategy being involved is to determine the relationship between the image color of the sample in RGB color space and the molar concentration of the fluorescence specimen in that sample. This manuscript is a preprint version of work related to a publication in IEEE. The final version may differ from this manuscript.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于智能手机相机和96孔板的低成本荧光检测系统，通过分析RGB颜色空间与荧光物质浓度的关系来检测微生物和分子。
AI.motivation: 传统微孔板读数机价格昂贵，需要昂贵的激发滤光片、阻挡滤光片和光电倍增管等元件。为了降低检测成本，研究人员利用智能手机普及性和高性价比的相机作为光学检测器。
AI.method: 设计了兼容标准96孔板的装置，使用智能手机相机作为光学探测器，通过建立样品图像RGB颜色空间与荧光样品摩尔浓度之间的关系来进行检测分析。
AI.result: 该系统能够有效检测稀释样品中的微生物和分子，相比Perkin Elmer Victor等传统读数机大大降低了设备成本，同时保持了检测功能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为低成本荧光检测提供了可行的解决方案，智能手机相机的使用使得设备更加便携和经济，有望在资源有限的实验室环境中推广应用。

title: SAGE Celer 2.6 Technical Card
summary: We introduce SAGE Celer 2.6, the latest in our line of general-purpose Celer models from SAGEA. Celer 2.6 is available in 5B, 10B, and 27B parameter sizes and benefits from extensive architectural modifications and further pre-training on an undisclosed model. Using our Inverse Reasoning (IR) pipeline, SAGEA natively trains Celer 2.6 to validate its own logic paths, minimizing cascading error and hallucination in complex reasoning tasks. Celer 2.6 also boasts natively integrated multimodal functionality with an end-to-end vision encoder to avoid common pitfalls in adapter-based approaches. Celer 2.6 provides highly competitive results on mathematics, coding, and general intelligence benchmarks (ACUMEN), along with low latency. Most importantly, Celer 2.6 is specifically optimized for South Asian language support, with a custom tokenizer for the Devanagari script and strong performance in both Nepali and Hindi without sacrificing English reasoning ability.

AI.tldr: SAGEA推出了Celer 2.6通用模型系列，包含5B、10B和27B三个参数版本，具有推理验证、多模态能力和南亚语言支持特性，在各项基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 开发一个既能处理复杂推理任务，又支持南亚语言（如尼泊尔语和印地语）的通用AI模型，同时保持低延迟和英语推理能力。
AI.method: 通过逆向推理(IR)管道让模型验证自身逻辑路径，集成端到端视觉编码器避免适配器问题，为Devanagari文字构建定制分词器，并在未公开模型上进一步预训练。
AI.result: 在数学、编程和通用智能基准测试(ACUMEN)上取得竞争性结果，在尼泊尔语和印地语上表现优异，英语推理能力未受影响，实现了低延迟性能。
AI.conclusion: Celer 2.6成功地将复杂推理、多模态处理和南亚语言支持结合在一起，为特定语言区域提供了高性能的通用AI解决方案。

title: WILD-SAM: Phase-Aware Expert Adaptation of SAM for Landslide Detection in Wrapped InSAR Interferograms
summary: Detecting slow-moving landslides directly from wrapped Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) interferograms is crucial for efficient geohazard monitoring, yet it remains fundamentally challenged by severe phase ambiguity and complex coherence noise. While the Segment Anything Model (SAM) offers a powerful foundation for segmentation, its direct transfer to wrapped phase data is hindered by a profound spectral domain shift, which suppresses the high-frequency fringes essential for boundary delineation. To bridge this gap, we propose WILD-SAM, a novel parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework specifically designed to adapt SAM for high-precision landslide detection on wrapped interferograms. Specifically, the architecture integrates a Phase-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (PA-MoE) Adapter into the frozen encoder to align spectral distributions and introduces a Wavelet-Guided Subband Enhancement (WGSE) strategy to generate frequency-aware dense prompts. The PA-MoE Adapter exploits a dynamic routing mechanism across heterogeneous convolutional experts to adaptively aggregate multi-scale spectral-textural priors, effectively aligning the distribution discrepancy between natural images and interferometric phase data. Meanwhile, the WGSE strategy leverages discrete wavelet transforms to explicitly disentangle high-frequency subbands and refine directional phase textures, injecting these structural cues as dense prompts to ensure topological integrity along sharp landslide boundaries. Extensive experiments on the ISSLIDE and ISSLIDE+ benchmarks demonstrate that WILD-SAM achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing methods in both target completeness and contour fidelity.

AI.tldr: WILD-SAM是一种针对缠绕InSAR干涉图的地面滑坡检测框架，通过相位感知混合专家适配器和小波引导子带增强策略有效解决了光谱域偏移问题，实现了高精度的滑坡边界识别。
AI.motivation: 直接从缠绕InSAR干涉图中检测缓慢移动的滑坡对地质灾害监测至关重要，但由于严重的相位模糊和复杂的相干噪声，以及SAM模型在自然图像和干涉相位数据之间的光谱域偏移问题，这一任务面临根本性挑战。
AI.method: 提出WILD-SAM框架，集成两个核心组件：1) 相位感知混合专家(PA-MoE)适配器，利用动态路由机制自适应聚合多尺度光谱-纹理先验；2) 小波引导子带增强(WGSE)策略，通过离散小波变换分离高频子带并生成频率感知密集提示，确保滑坡边界的拓扑完整性。
AI.result: 在ISSLIDE和ISSLIDE+基准测试上，WILD-SAM达到了最先进的性能，在目标完整性和轮廓保真度方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: WILD-SAM成功地将SAM适配到缠绕相位数据处理中，有效解决了光谱域偏移问题，为高精度滑坡检测提供了新的解决方案，在地质灾害监测领域具有重要应用价值。

title: Chronological Knowledge Retrieval: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation Approach to Construction Project Documentation
summary: In large-scale construction projects, the continuous evolution of decisions generates extensive records, most often captured in meeting minutes. Since decisions may override previous ones, professionals often need to reconstruct the history of specific choices. Retrieving such information manually from raw archives is both labor-intensive and error-prone. From a user perspective, we address this challenge by enabling conversational access to the whole set of project meeting minutes. Professionals can pose natural-language questions and receive answers that are both semantically relevant and explicitly time-annotated, allowing them to follow the chronology of decisions. From a technical perspective, our solution employs a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework that integrates semantic search with large language models to ensure accurate and context-aware responses. We demonstrate the approach using an anonymized, industry-sourced dataset of meeting minutes from a completed construction project by a large company in Belgium. The dataset is annotated and enriched with expert-defined queries to support systematic evaluation. Both the dataset and the open-source implementation are made available to the community to foster further research on conversational access to time-annotated project documentation.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个基于RAG框架的对话系统，让建筑专业人士能通过自然语言查询项目会议记录，获取语义相关且带时间标注的决策历史。
AI.motivation: 大型建筑项目中的决策不断演化，决策记录散布在会议纪要中，手动重建特定决策的历史既费力又容易出错。专业人士需要一种高效准确的方式来追踪决策的时间线。
AI.method: 采用检索增强生成(RAG)框架，结合语义搜索和大语言模型。使用比利时某大型建筑公司的已完成项目会议纪要数据集，该数据集经过专家标注和查询增强。
AI.result: 系统成功实现了对会议纪要的对话式访问，能够提供语义相关且明确时间标注的答案，帮助用户理解决策的时间顺序。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为时间标注的项目文档提供了有效的对话式访问解决方案。数据集和开源实现已公开发布，可促进该领域的进一步研究。

title: Giving Faces Their Feelings Back: Explicit Emotion Control for Feedforward Single-Image 3D Head Avatars
summary: We present a framework for explicit emotion control in feed-forward, single-image 3D head avatar reconstruction. Unlike existing pipelines where emotion is implicitly entangled with geometry or appearance, we treat emotion as a first-class control signal that can be manipulated independently and consistently across identities. Our method injects emotion into existing feed-forward architectures via a dual-path modulation mechanism without modifying their core design. Geometry modulation performs emotion-conditioned normalization in the original parametric space, disentangling emotional state from speech-driven articulation, while appearance modulation captures identity-aware, emotion-dependent visual cues beyond geometry. To enable learning under this setting, we construct a time-synchronized, emotion-consistent multi-identity dataset by transferring aligned emotional dynamics across identities. Integrated into multiple state-of-the-art backbones, our framework preserves reconstruction and reenactment fidelity while enabling controllable emotion transfer, disentangled manipulation, and smooth emotion interpolation, advancing expressive and scalable 3D head avatars.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于前馈单图像3D头部头像重建的显式情感控制框架，将情感作为独立可控信号，通过双路径调制机制实现情感与身份的解耦控制。
AI.motivation: 现有3D头像重建方法中，情感通常隐式地与几何或外观纠缠在一起，无法独立控制和跨身份一致地操作情感表达，限制了头像的表现力和可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出双路径调制机制：1) 几何调制在原始参数空间进行情感条件归一化，解耦情感状态与语音驱动的表达；2) 外观调制捕获身份感知的、依赖情感的几何外视觉线索。同时构建了时间同步、情感一致的多身份数据集来支持学习。
AI.result: 集成到多个最先进骨干网络中，在保持重建和重演保真度的同时，实现了可控的情感转移、解耦操作和平滑情感插值。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将情感作为一等控制信号，显著推进了表现力丰富且可扩展的3D头部头像技术，为情感解耦的数字人应用提供了新思路。

title: Stateful Evidence-Driven Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Iterative Reasoning
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds Large Language Models (LLMs) in external knowledge but often suffers from flat context representations and stateless retrieval, leading to unstable performance. We propose Stateful Evidence-Driven RAG with Iterative Reasoning, a framework that models question answering as a progressive evidence accumulation process. Retrieved documents are converted into structured reasoning units with explicit relevance and confidence signals and maintained in a persistent evidence pool capturing both supportive and non-supportive information. The framework performs evidence-driven deficiency analysis to identify gaps and conflicts and iteratively refines queries to guide subsequent retrieval. This iterative reasoning process enables stable evidence aggregation and improves robustness to noisy retrieval. Experiments on multiple question answering benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over standard RAG and multi-step baselines, while effectively accumulating high-quality evidence and maintaining stable performance under substantial retrieval noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种状态化证据驱动的RAG框架，通过迭代推理结构化地累积证据，显著提升了问答系统的稳定性和抗噪能力。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG方法存在上下文表示扁平化和无状态检索的问题，导致性能不稳定。需要一种能够持续累积证据、处理检索噪声的新框架。
AI.method: 将检索文档转换为带相关性和置信度信号的结构化推理单元，构建持久化证据池；通过证据驱动的缺失分析识别信息缺口，迭代优化查询来指导后续检索，形成渐进式证据累积过程。
AI.result: 在多个问答基准测试中，该方法相比标准RAG和多步基线方法取得了一致的性能提升；能够有效累积高质量证据，在大量检索噪声下仍保持稳定表现。
AI.conclusion: 状态化证据驱动的迭代推理框架通过结构化证据管理和渐进式推理，解决了RAG的不稳定性问题，为构建鲁棒的问答系统提供了有效方案。

title: Controllable Video Object Insertion via Multiview Priors
summary: Video object insertion is a critical task for dynamically inserting new objects into existing environments. Previous video generation methods focus primarily on synthesizing entire scenes while struggling with ensuring consistent object appearance, spatial alignment, and temporal coherence when inserting objects into existing videos. In this paper, we propose a novel solution for Video Object Insertion, which integrates multi-view object priors to address the common challenges of appearance inconsistency and occlusion handling in dynamic environments. By lifting 2D reference images into multi-view representations and leveraging a dual-path view-consistent conditioning mechanism, our framework ensures stable identity guidance and robust integration across diverse viewpoints. A quality-aware weighting mechanism is also employed to adaptively handle noisy or imperfect inputs. Additionally, we introduce an Integration-Aware Consistency Module that guarantees spatial realism, effectively resolving occlusion and boundary artifacts while maintaining temporal continuity across frames. Experimental results show that our solution significantly improves the quality of video object insertion, providing stable and realistic integration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的视频对象插入解决方案，通过集成多视图对象先验和双路径视图一致性条件机制，有效解决了动态环境中对象外观不一致、遮挡处理等关键挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频生成方法主要专注于整个场景的合成，但在将对象插入现有视频时难以确保一致的对象外观、空间对齐和时间相干性，特别是在处理外观不一致和复杂遮挡问题时表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过将2D参考图像提升为多视图表示，利用双路径视图一致性条件机制确保稳定的身份引导；引入质量感知权重机制自适应处理噪声或不完美输入；设计集成感知一致性模块保证空间真实感，有效解决遮挡和边界伪影问题。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，提出的解决方案显著提高了视频对象插入的质量，提供了稳定且真实的集成效果，有效维持了跨帧的时间连续性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了视频对象插入中的核心技术挑战，为动态环境中对象的逼真集成提供了有效框架，在保持视觉质量的同时实现了时空一致性。

title: Benchmarking Linguistic Adaptation in Comparable-Sized LLMs: A Study of Llama-3.1-8B, Mistral-7B-v0.1, and Qwen3-8B on Romanized Nepali
summary: Romanized Nepali, the Nepali language written in the Latin alphabet, is the dominant medium for informal digital communication in Nepal, yet it remains critically underresourced in the landscape of Large Language Models (LLMs). This study presents a systematic benchmarking of linguistic adaptation across three comparable-sized open-weight models: Llama-3.1-8B, Mistral-7B-v0.1, and Qwen3-8B. We evaluate these architectures under zero-shot and fine-tuned settings using a curated bilingual dataset of 10,000 transliterated instruction-following samples. Performance is quantified across five metrics spanning seven measurement dimensions: Perplexity (PPL), BERTScore, chrF++, ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, ROUGE-L, and BLEU, capturing fluency, phonetic consistency, and semantic integrity. Models were fine-tuned using Quantized Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA) with Rank-Stabilized LoRA (rsLoRA) at rank r=32 on dual NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPUs, training only approximately 1% of each model's parameters in under 27 total GPU-hours. At zero-shot, all three models fail to generate Romanized Nepali, each exhibiting a distinct architecture-specific failure mode. Following fine-tuning, all three resolve these failures and converge to BERTScore approximately 0.75 and chrF++ greater than 23. Overall dimension-wise assessment across ten criteria identifies Qwen3-8B as the overall recommended architecture, being the only model to produce semantically relevant zero-shot output and leading all structural alignment metrics post-SFT. The adaptation headroom hypothesis is confirmed: Llama-3.1-8B, despite its weakest zero-shot baseline, achieves the largest absolute fine-tuning gains in PPL (Delta = -49.77) and BERTScore (Delta = +0.3287), making it the preferred choice for iterative low-resource development pipelines. This work establishes the first rigorous baseline for Romanized Nepali adaptation in comparable-sized open-weight LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统性评估了Llama-3.1-8B、Mistral-7B-v0.1和Qwen3-8B三种开源大语言模型对罗马化尼泊尔语的适应能力，通过微调验证了Qwen3-8B是最佳架构，而Llama-3.1-8B在低资源开发中具有最大的改进潜力。
AI.motivation: 罗马化尼泊尔语是尼泊尔非正式数字通信的主要媒介，但在大型语言模型领域资源严重不足，缺乏系统性的基准测试和评估框架。
AI.method: 使用包含10000个样本的双语数据集，采用QLoRA与rsLoRA微调技术，在五个指标七个维度上评估模型性能，包括零样本和微调两种设置。
AI.result: 零样本时所有模型均失败，微调后所有模型性能显著提升；Qwen3-8B整体表现最佳，Llama-3.1-8B展现出最大的改进幅度。
AI.conclusion: 研究确立了罗马化尼泊尔语适应的首个严格基线，证实了适应空间假说，为低资源语言的大语言模型开发提供了重要参考。

title: The Fourth Challenge on Image Super-Resolution ($\times$4) at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
summary: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 image super-resolution ($\times$4) challenge, one of the associated competitions of the NTIRE 2026 Workshop at CVPR 2026. The challenge aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) inputs generated through bicubic downsampling with a $\times$4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective super-resolution solutions and analyze recent advances in the field. To reflect the evolving objectives of image super-resolution, the challenge includes two tracks: (1) a restoration track, which emphasizes pixel-wise fidelity and ranks submissions based on PSNR; and (2) a perceptual track, which focuses on visual realism and evaluates results using a perceptual score. A total of 194 participants registered for the challenge, with 31 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, datasets, evaluation protocol, main results, and methods of participating teams. The challenge provides a unified benchmark and offers insights into current progress and future directions in image super-resolution.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NTIRE 2026图像超分辨率挑战赛，该比赛包含194名参与者，分为保真度和感知质量两个赛道，旨在评估和推动图像超分辨率技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 随着图像超分辨率目标的发展，需要同时评估像素级保真度和视觉真实感，通过竞赛形式统一基准，分析该领域的最新进展。
AI.method: 挑战赛设置两个赛道：1) 恢复赛道基于PSNR评估像素保真度；2) 感知赛道使用感知评分评估视觉真实感。双三次下采样×4生成低分辨率图像进行重建。
AI.result: 共194人注册，31个团队提交有效作品。挑战赛成功提供了统一的评估基准，展示了当前超分辨率技术的进展。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛为图像超分辨率领域提供了有价值的基准平台，揭示了当前技术进展并指明了未来发展方向。

title: Tug-of-War within A Decade: Conflict Resolution in Vulnerability Analysis via Teacher-Guided Retrieval-Augmented Generations
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are essential for analyzing and addressing vulnerabilities in cybersecurity. However, among over 200,000 vulnerabilities were discovered in the past decade, more than 30,000 have been changed or updated. This necessitates frequent updates to the training datasets and internal knowledge bases of LLMs to maintain knowledge consistency. In this paper, we focus on the problem of knowledge discrepancy and conflict within CVE (Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures) detection and analysis. This problem hinders LLMs' ability to retrieve the latest knowledge from original training datasets, leading to knowledge conflicts, fabrications of factually incorrect results, and generation hallucinations. To address this problem, we propose an innovative two-stage framework called CRVA-TGRAG (Conflict Resolution in Vulnerability Analysis via Teacher-Guided Retrieval-Augmented Generation). First, to improve document retrieval accuracy during the retrieval stage, we utilize Parent Document Segmentation and an ensemble retrieval scheme based on semantic similarity and inverted indexing. Second, to enhance LLMs' capabilities based on the retrieval of CVE dataset in generation stage, we employ a teacher-guided preference optimization technique to fine-tune LLMs. Our framework not only enhances the quality of content retrieval through RAG but also leverages the advantages of preference fine-tuning in LLMs to answer questions more effectively and precisely. Experiments demonstrate our method achieves higher accuracy in retrieving the latest CVEs compared to external knowledge bases. In conclusion, our framework significantly mitigates potential knowledge conflicts and inconsistencies that may arise from relying solely on LLMs for knowledge retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CRVA-TGRAG框架，通过改进的检索增强生成和教师引导偏好优化来解决LLM在CVE分析中的知识冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 网络安全漏洞CVE数据频繁更新（十年内超过30,000个漏洞变更），导致LLM训练数据与最新知识存在差异，造成知识冲突、事实错误和生成幻觉。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架CRVA-TGRAG：1）检索阶段采用父文档分割和基于语义相似性与倒排索引的集成检索方案；2）生成阶段使用教师引导的偏好优化技术微调LLM。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在检索最新CVE方面相比外部知识库实现更高准确性，显著缓解了单纯依赖LLM导致的知识冲突和不一致性问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅通过RAG提升了内容检索质量，还利用偏好微调优势使LLM能够更有效精确地回答问题，为网络安全漏洞分析提供可靠解决方案。

title: DVFace: Spatio-Temporal Dual-Prior Diffusion for Video Face Restoration
summary: Video face restoration aims to enhance degraded face videos into high-quality results with realistic facial details, stable identity, and temporal coherence. Recent diffusion-based methods have brought strong generative priors to restoration and enabled more realistic detail synthesis. However, existing approaches for face videos still rely heavily on generic diffusion priors and multi-step sampling, which limit both facial adaptation and inference efficiency. These limitations motivate the use of one-step diffusion for video face restoration, yet achieving faithful facial recovery alongside temporally stable outputs remains challenging. In this paper, we propose, DVFace, a one-step diffusion framework for real-world video face restoration. Specifically, we introduce a spatio-temporal dual-codebook design to extract complementary spatial and temporal facial priors from degraded videos. We further propose an asymmetric spatio-temporal fusion module to inject these priors into the diffusion backbone according to their distinct roles. Evaluation on various benchmarks shows that DVFace delivers superior restoration quality, temporal consistency, and identity preservation compared to recent methods. Code: https://github.com/zhengchen1999/DVFace.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了DVFace，一种用于视频人脸修复的单步扩散框架，通过时空双码本设计和非对称时空融合模块，实现了高质量、时序一致且身份保真的视频人脸修复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频人脸修复方法面临两个关键限制：1) 过度依赖通用扩散先验导致人脸适应性不足；2) 多步采样过程推理效率低下。虽然单步扩散可提升效率，但如何在快速修复的同时保持人脸细节真实性和时序稳定性仍具挑战性。
AI.method: DVFace采用单步扩散架构，创新性地引入时空双码本设计分别提取退化视频中互补的空间和时间人脸先验，并提出非对称时空融合模块根据先验的不同作用方式将其注入扩散主干网络。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的评估表明，DVFace相比现有方法在修复质量、时序一致性和身份保持方面均表现优越。
AI.conclusion: DVFace成功解决了视频人脸修复中效率与质量的平衡问题，通过创新的时空先验机制实现了实时高质量的视频人脸修复，为该领域提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Correcting Suppressed Log-Probabilities in Language Models with Post-Transformer Adapters
summary: Alignment-tuned language models frequently suppress factual log-probabilities on politically sensitive topics despite retaining the knowledge in their hidden representations. We show that a 786K-parameter (approximately 0.02% of the base model) post-transformer adapter, trained on frozen hidden states, corrects this suppression on 31 ideology-discriminating facts across Qwen3-4B, 8B, and 14B. The adapter memorizes all 15 training facts and generalizes to 11--39% of 16 held-out facts across 5 random splits per scale, with zero knowledge regressions via anchored training. Both gated (SwiGLU) and ungated (linear bottleneck) adapters achieve comparable results; neither consistently outperforms the other (Fisher exact p > 0.09 at all scales). On instruct models, the adapter corrects log-probability rankings. When applied at all token positions during generation, the adapter produces incoherent output; however, when applied only at the current prediction position (last-position-only), the adapter produces coherent, less censored text. A logit-space adapter operating after token projection fails to produce coherent generation at any application mode, suggesting hidden-state intervention is the correct level for generation correction. A previously undocumented silent gradient bug in Apple MLX explains all null results in earlier iterations of this work: the standard pattern nn.value_and_grad(model, fn)(model.parameters()) returns zero gradients without error; the correct pattern nn.value_and_grad(model, fn)(model, data) resolves this. We provide a minimal reproduction and discuss implications for other adapter research using MLX.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现通过训练一个仅占基础模型0.02%的后置适配器，可以修正对齐语言模型在政治敏感话题上的事实概率抑制问题，实现较少审查的文本生成。
AI.motivation: 对齐调优的语言模型在处理政治敏感话题时会压低事实的对数概率，尽管这些知识仍存在于模型的隐藏表示中，这种不一致性需要被修正。
AI.method: 在Qwen3-4B、8B和14B模型的冻结隐藏状态上训练786K参数的后置适配器，比较了门控(SwiGLU)和非门控(线性瓶颈)两种适配器架构，并研究了不同的应用方式。
AI.result: 适配器能记住全部15个训练事实并在11-39%的未见事实上泛化；两种架构效果相当(Fisher exact p > 0.09)；仅在最后位置应用时能生成连贯且较少审查的文本；logit空间适配器无法生成连贯内容。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏状态干预是修正生成任务的正确层面，发现并修复了Apple MLX中的静默梯度bug，为适配器研究提供了重要参考。

title: Revisiting Token Compression for Accelerating ViT-based Sparse Multi-View 3D Object Detectors
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT)-based sparse multi-view 3D object detectors have achieved remarkable accuracy but still suffer from high inference latency due to heavy token processing. To accelerate these models, token compression has been widely explored. However, our revisit of existing strategies, such as token pruning, merging, and patch size enlargement, reveals that they often discard informative background cues, disrupt contextual consistency, and lose fine-grained semantics, negatively affecting 3D detection. To overcome these limitations, we propose SEPatch3D, a novel framework that dynamically adjusts patch sizes while preserving critical semantic information within coarse patches. Specifically, we design Spatiotemporal-aware Patch Size Selection (SPSS) that assigns small patches to scenes containing nearby objects to preserve fine details and large patches to background-dominated scenes to reduce computation cost. To further mitigate potential detail loss, Informative Patch Selection (IPS) selects the informative patches for feature refinement, and Cross-Granularity Feature Enhancement (CGFE) injects fine-grained details into selected coarse patches, enriching semantic features. Experiments on the nuScenes and Argoverse 2 validation sets show that SEPatch3D achieves up to \textbf{57\%} faster inference than the StreamPETR baseline and \textbf{20\%} higher efficiency than the state-of-the-art ToC3D-faster, while preserving comparable detection accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Mingqj/SEPatch3D.

AI.tldr: SEPatch3D是一种通过动态调整块大小来加速基于ViT的稀疏多视图3D目标检测的框架，在保持精度的同时实现显著的推理加速。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于ViT的稀疏多视图3D目标检测器虽然准确率高，但由于大量的token处理导致推理延迟很高。现有的token压缩策略（如token剪枝、合并和块大小扩大）会丢失信息丰富的背景线索、破坏上下文一致性并丢失细粒度语义信息，对3D检测产生负面影响。
AI.method: 提出了SEPatch3D框架，包含三个核心技术：1) 时空感知块大小选择(SPSS)为包含近距离物体的场景分配小块以保持细节，为主导背景的场景分配大块以降低计算成本；2) 信息块选择(IPS)选择信息丰富的块进行特征细化；3) 跨粒度特征增强(CGFE)将细粒度细节注入选定的粗块中，丰富语义特征。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2验证集上，SEPatch3D比StreamPETR基线实现高达57%的推理加速，比最先进的ToC3D-faster提升20%的效率，同时保持相当的检测精度。
AI.conclusion: SEPatch3D通过动态调整块大小并保持关键语义信息，有效解决了现有token压缩方法的局限性，为基于ViT的多视图3D目标检测提供了高效的加速方案，在速度和精度之间实现了良好的平衡。

title: QU-NLP at ArchEHR-QA 2026: Two-Stage QLoRA Fine-Tuning of Qwen3-4B for Patient-Oriented Clinical Question Answering and Evidence Sentence Alignment
comment: Accepted for publication at CL4Health 2026 workshop, LREC2026 conference
summary: We present a unified system addressing both Subtask 3 (answer generation) and Subtask 4 (evidence sentence alignment) of the ArchEHR-QA Shared Task. For Subtask 3, we apply two-stage Quantised Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA) to Qwen3-4B loaded in 4-bit NF4 quantisation: first on 30,000 samples from the emrQA-MedSQuAD corpus to establish clinical domain competence, then on the 20 annotated development cases to learn the task-specific output style. Our system achieves an overall score of 32.87 on the official test-2026 split (BLEU = 9.42, ROUGE-L = 27.04, SARI = 55.42, BERTScore = 43.00, AlignScore = 25.28, MEDCON = 37.04). For Subtask 4, we develop a weighted ensemble of three retrieval methods - BM25 with relative thresholding, TF-IDF cosine similarity, and a fine-tuned cross-encoder - to identify note sentences supporting a given gold answer, achieving a micro-F1 of 67.16 on the 100-case test set. Experiments reveal that both subtasks expose the same fundamental challenge: 20 annotated training cases are insufficient to distinguish relevant from irrelevant clinical sentences, pointing to data augmentation as the highest-leverage future direction.

AI.tldr: 该研究针对ArchEHR-QA共享任务提出了一个统一系统，通过两阶段QLoRA微调Qwen3-4B模型进行答案生成，并基于加权集成检索方法进行证据句子对齐，整体性能显示数据规模仍是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 解决ArchEHR-QA共享任务中的回答生成(子任务3)和证据句子对齐(子任务4)两个关键挑战，特别是在临床医疗问答场景下，如何利用有限的训练数据构建有效的问答系统。
AI.method: 采用两阶段QLoRA方法微调4位量化的Qwen3-4B模型：首先在30,000个emrQA-MedSQuAD样本上进行临床领域预训练，然后在20个标注开发样本上学习任务特定的输出格式；对于证据对齐任务，构建BM25相对阈值、TF-IDF余弦相似性和微调交叉编码器的加权集成系统。
AI.result: 在官方test-2026数据集上获得32.87的综合得分(BLEU=9.42, ROUGE-L=27.04等)，证据对齐任务在100个测试样本上达到67.16的micro-F1值。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明两个子任务都暴露了相同的核心问题：20个标注训练样本不足以区分相关和无关的临床句子，数据增强是未来最值得探索的方向。

title: Learning Adaptive Reasoning Paths for Efficient Visual Reasoning
summary: Visual reasoning models (VRMs) have recently shown strong cross-modal reasoning capabilities by integrating visual perception with language reasoning. However, they often suffer from overthinking, producing unnecessarily long reasoning chains for any tasks. We attribute this issue to \textbf{Reasoning Path Redundancy} in visual reasoning: many visual questions do not require the full reasoning process. To address this, we propose \textbf{AVR}, an adaptive visual reasoning framework that decomposes visual reasoning into three cognitive functions: visual perception, logical reasoning, and answer application. It further enables models to dynamically choose among three response formats: Full Format, Perception-Only Format, and Direct Answer. AVR is trained with FS-GRPO, an adaptation of Group Relative Policy Optimization that encourages the model to select the most efficient reasoning format while preserving correctness. Experiments on multiple vision-language benchmarks show that AVR reduces token usage by 50--90\% while maintaining overall accuracy, especially in perception-intensive tasks. These results demonstrate that adaptive visual reasoning can effectively mitigate overthinking in VRMs. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/RunRiotComeOn/AVR.

AI.tldr: AVR是一种自适应视觉推理框架，通过动态选择最优推理格式，在保持准确率的同时将token使用量减少50-90%，有效解决了视觉推理模型中的过度思考问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉推理模型(VRMs)虽然展现了强大的跨模态推理能力，但普遍存在过度思考问题，对所有任务都生成过长的推理链。作者将此归因于视觉推理中的推理路径冗余，即许多视觉问题并不需要完整的推理过程。
AI.method: 提出了AVR自适应视觉推理框架，将视觉推理分解为视觉感知、逻辑推理和答案应用三个认知功能，使模型能够在完整格式、仅感知格式和直接答案三种响应格式间动态选择。采用FS-GRPO（群组相对策略优化的改进版本）进行训练，鼓励模型选择最有效的推理格式。
AI.result: 在多个视觉语言基准测试中，AVR在保持整体准确率的同时，将token使用量减少50-90%，在感知密集型任务中表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: 自适应视觉推理能够有效缓解VRMs中的过度思考问题，为提高视觉语言模型的推理效率提供了新的解决思路。

title: Listen, Correct, and Feed Back: Spoken Pedagogical Feedback Generation
summary: Grammatical error correction (GEC) and explanation (GEE) have made rapid progress, but real teaching scenarios also require \emph{learner-friendly pedagogical feedback} that is actionable, level-appropriate, and encouraging. We introduce \textbf{SPFG} (\textbf{S}poken \textbf{P}edagogical \textbf{F}eedback \textbf{G}eneration), a dataset built based on the Speak \& Improve Challenge 2025 corpus, pairing fluency-oriented transcriptions with GEC targets and \emph{human-verified} teacher-style feedback, including preferred/rejected feedback pairs for preference learning. We study a transcript-based Spoken Grammatical Error Correction (SGEC) setting and evaluate three instruction-tuned LLMs (Qwen2.5, Llama-3.1, and GLM-4), comparing supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with preference-based alignment (using DPO and KTO) for jointly generating corrections and feedback. Results show that SFT provides the most consistent improvements, while DPO/KTO yield smaller or mixed gains, and that correction quality and feedback quality are weakly coupled. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Skywalker-Harrison/spfg.

AI.tldr: SPFG数据集专门用于口语语法纠错和教学反馈生成，研究发现监督微调在提升纠错和反馈质量方面表现最佳，且纠错质量与反馈质量相关性较弱。
AI.motivation: 传统的语法纠错(GEC)和解释(GEE)技术已快速发展，但实际教学场景还需要具有可操作性、水平适中且鼓励性的学习者友好教学反馈。
AI.method: 基于Speak & Improve Challenge 2025语料库构建SPFG数据集，包含口语转录文本、GEC目标和人工验证的教师式反馈。在基于转录的口语语法纠错(SGEC)设置下，评估了三个指令调优大模型(Qwen2.5、Llama-3.1、GLM-4)，比较监督微调(SFT)与基于偏好对齐(使用DPO和KTO)方法。
AI.result: SFT提供了最一致的改进效果，而DPO/KTO带来的增益较小或效果混合，纠错质量与反馈质量之间呈现弱耦合关系。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为口语教学反馈生成提供了首个专门数据集和系统评估框架，证明监督微调是目前最有效的方法，为进一步提升口语教学辅助技术奠定了基础。

title: Deepfake Detection Generalization with Diffusion Noise
summary: Deepfake detectors face growing challenges in generalization as new image synthesis techniques emerge. In particular, deepfakes generated by diffusion models are highly photorealistic and often evade detectors trained on GAN-based forgeries. This paper addresses the generalization problem in deepfake detection by leveraging diffusion noise characteristics. We propose an Attention-guided Noise Learning (ANL) framework that integrates a pre-trained diffusion model into the deepfake detection pipeline to guide the learning of more robust features. Specifically, our method uses the diffusion model's denoising process to expose subtle artifacts: the detector is trained to predict the noise contained in an input image at a given diffusion step, forcing it to capture discrepancies between real and synthetic images, while an attention-guided mechanism derived from the predicted noise is introduced to encourage the model to focus on globally distributed discrepancies rather than local patterns. By harnessing the frozen diffusion model's learned distribution of natural images, the ANL method acts as a form of regularization, improving the detector's generalization to unseen forgery types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ANL significantly outperforms existing methods on multiple benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy in detecting diffusion-generated deepfakes. Notably, the proposed framework boosts generalization performance (e.g., improving ACC/AP by a substantial margin on unseen models) without introducing additional overhead during inference. Our results highlight that diffusion noise provides a powerful signal for generalizable deepfake detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力引导噪声学习(ANL)的深度伪造检测框架，利用预训练扩散模型的噪声特征来提高检测器对新伪造技术的泛化能力，显著提升了检测扩散模型生成的虚假图像的准确率。
AI.motivation: 随着扩散模型等新型图像合成技术的出现，现有的基于GAN训练的深度伪造检测器面临严重的泛化问题。扩散模型生成的深度伪造图像高度逼真，常常能够逃避现有检测器的识别，因此需要新的方法来解决这一泛化挑战。
AI.method: 提出注意力引导噪声学习(ANL)框架，将预训练的扩散模型集成到深度伪造检测流程中。该方法利用扩散模型的去噪过程来暴露细微伪影：让检测器预测给定扩散步数下输入图像包含的噪声，迫使其捕获真实图像与合成图像之间的差异，同时引入基于预测噪声的注意力引导机制，鼓励模型关注全局分布的差异而非局部模式。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，ANL显著优于现有方法，在检测扩散生成的深度伪造图像方面达到了最先进的准确率。在不引入推理额外开销的情况下，大幅提升了泛化性能（如在未见模型上显著提高ACC/AP）。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，扩散噪声为可泛化的深度伪造检测提供了强有力的信号。ANL框架通过利用冻结扩散模型学习到的自然图像分布，成为一种有效的正则化方法，为解决深度伪造检测的泛化问题提供了新思路。

title: An Underexplored Frontier: Large Language Models for Rare Disease Patient Education and Communication -- A scoping review
summary:
Rare diseases affect over 300 million people worldwide and are characterized by complex care pathways, limited clinical expertise, and substantial unmet communication needs throughout the long patient journey. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) offer new opportunities to support patient education and communication, yet their application in rare diseases remains unclear.
  We conducted a scoping review of studies published between January 2022 and March 2026 across major databases, identifying 12 studies on LLM-based rare disease patient education and communication. Data were extracted on study characteristics, application scenarios, model usage, and evaluation methods, and synthesized using descriptive and qualitative analyses.
  The literature is highly recent and dominated by general-purpose models, particularly ChatGPT. Most studies focus on patient question answering using curated question sets, with limited use of real-world data or longitudinal communication scenarios. Evaluations are primarily centered on accuracy, with limited attention to patient-centered dimensions such as readability, empathy, and communication quality. Multilingual communication is rarely addressed.
  Overall, the field remains at an early stage. Future research should prioritize patient-centered design, domain-adapted methods, and real-world deployment to support safe, adaptive, and effective communication in rare diseases.

AI.tldr: 这是一项关于大语言模型在罕见疾病患者教育与沟通中应用的范围性综述，发现该领域仍处于早期阶段，研究集中于准确性评估，缺乏患者中心的设计和真实世界应用。
AI.motivation: 罕见疾病患者面临复杂的护理路径、有限的临床专业知识和在长期患者旅程中巨大的未满足沟通需求。大语言模型的最新发展为支持患者教育和沟通提供了新机会，但其在罕见疾病中的应用尚不明确。
AI.method: 对2022年1月至2026年3月期间主要数据库发表的文献进行范围性综述，识别出12项关于LLM在罕见疾病患者教育和沟通中的研究。通过描述性和定性分析，提取研究特征、应用场景、模型使用和评估方法等数据。
AI.result: 文献高度新颖，主要由通用模型（特别是ChatGPT）主导。大多数研究聚焦于使用策划问题集的患者问答，缺乏真实世界数据和纵向沟通场景。评估主要围绕准确性，对可读性、同理心和沟通质量等以患者为中心的维度关注有限。多语言沟通很少被提及。
AI.conclusion: 该领域仍处于早期阶段。未来研究应优先考虑以患者为中心的设计、领域适应性方法和真实世界部署，以支持罕见疾病中安全、适应性和有效的沟通。

title: M3D-Net: Multi-Modal 3D Facial Feature Reconstruction Network for Deepfake Detection
summary: With the rapid advancement of deep learning in image generation, facial forgery techniques have achieved unprecedented realism, posing serious threats to cybersecurity and information authenticity. Most existing deepfake detection approaches rely on the reconstruction of isolated facial attributes without fully exploiting the complementary nature of multi-modal feature representations. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel Multi-Modal 3D Facial Feature Reconstruction Network (M3D-Net) for deepfake detection. Our method leverages an end-to-end dual-stream architecture that reconstructs fine-grained facial geometry and reflectance properties from single-view RGB images via a self-supervised 3D facial reconstruction module. The network further enhances detection performance through a 3D Feature Pre-fusion Module (PFM), which adaptively adjusts multi-scale features, and a Multi-modal Fusion Module (MFM) that effectively integrates RGB and 3D-reconstructed features using attention mechanisms. Extensive experiments on multiple public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of detection accuracy and robustness, significantly outperforming existing methods while exhibiting strong generalization across diverse scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为M3D-Net的多模态3D面部特征重构网络，通过融合RGB和3D重构特征，实现了更精准和鲁棒的deepfake检测。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在图像生成中的快速发展使得面部伪造技术达到了前所未有的真实度，现有的检测方法仅依赖孤立的面部属性重构，未能充分利用多模态特征表示的互补特性。
AI.method: 设计端到端双流架构，包含自监督3D面部重构模块从单视图RGB图像重构精细的面部几何和反射属性；使用3D特征预融合模块自适应调整多尺度特征；通过多模态融合模块有效整合RGB和3D重构特征。
AI.result: 在多个公共数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在检测准确性和鲁棒性方面达到了最先进的性能，显著优于现有方法，并在不同场景下展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: M3D-Net通过有效融合RGB和3D特征模态，为deepfake检测提供了新的解决方案，在多个指标上实现了突破性改进，为应对日益严峻的深度伪造威胁提供了有力工具。

title: Internal Knowledge Without External Expression: Probing the Generalization Boundary of a Classical Chinese Language Model
summary:
We train a 318M-parameter Transformer language model from scratch on a curated corpus of 1.56 billion tokens of pure Classical Chinese, with zero English characters or Arabic numerals. Through systematic out-of-distribution (OOD) testing, we investigate whether the model can distinguish known from unknown inputs, and crucially, whether it can express this distinction in its generated text.
  We find a clear dissociation between internal and external uncertainty. Internally, the model exhibits a perplexity jump ratio of 2.39x between real and fabricated historical events (p = 8.9e-11, n = 92 per group), with semi-fabricated events (real figures + fictional events) showing the highest perplexity (4.24x, p = 1.1e-16), demonstrating genuine factual encoding beyond syntactic pattern matching. Externally, however, the model never learns to express uncertainty: classical Chinese epistemic markers appear at lower rates for OOD questions (3.5%) than for in-distribution questions (8.3%, p = 0.023), reflecting rhetorical conventions rather than genuine metacognition.
  We replicate both findings across three languages (Classical Chinese, English, Japanese), three writing systems, and eight models from 110M to 1.56B parameters. We further show that uncertainty expression frequency is determined entirely by training data conventions, with Classical Chinese models showing a "humility paradox" (more hedging for known topics), while Japanese models almost never hedge.
