We argue that metacognitive expression -- the ability to say "I don't know" -- does not emerge from language modeling alone and requires explicit training signals such as RLHF.

AI.tldr: 研究训练了一个3.18亿参数的古典中文语言模型，发现模型内部能区分真实与虚假历史事件，但外部无法表达不确定性，表明元认知表达能力无法通过语言建模自动获得。
AI.motivation: 探索大语言模型是否能区分已知与未知信息，并通过生成文本表达这种不确定性，这对于理解AI的元认知能力至关重要。
AI.method: 从零开始训练3.18亿参数的Transformer模型，使用15.6亿纯古典中文语料，通过系统性分布外测试评估模型对真实事件、半虚构事件和虚构事件的困惑度变化，并分析其不确定性表达模式。
AI.result: 模型内部能清晰区分真实与虚假信息（困惑度差异2.39倍），但外部无法表达不确定性，反而对分布外问题使用更少的认识标记。该发现在三种语言、三种文字系统和八个模型中都得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 元认知表达能力（说'我不知道'）无法仅通过语言建模获得，需要RLHF等显式训练信号才能培养。不同训练数据导致不同的表达习惯，体现了语言学惯例而非真实的元认知。

title: TurboTalk: Progressive Distillation for One-Step Audio-Driven Talking Avatar Generation
summary: Existing audio-driven video digital human generation models rely on multi-step denoising, resulting in substantial computational overhead that severely limits their deployment in real-world settings. While one-step distillation approaches can significantly accelerate inference, they often suffer from training instability. To address this challenge, we propose TurboTalk, a two-stage progressive distillation framework that effectively compresses a multi-step audio-driven video diffusion model into a single-step generator. We first adopt Distribution Matching Distillation to obtain a strong and stable 4-step student, and then progressively reduce the denoising steps from 4 to 1 through adversarial distillation. To ensure stable training under extreme step reduction, we introduce a progressive timestep sampling strategy and a self-compare adversarial objective that provides an intermediate adversarial reference that stabilizes progressive distillation. Our method achieve single-step generation of video talking avatar, boosting inference speed by 120 times while maintaining high generation quality.

AI.tldr: TurboTalk是一种两阶段渐进式蒸馏框架，能将多步音频驱动视频扩散模型压缩为单步生成器，推理速度提升120倍同时保持高质量生成。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动视频数字人生成模型依赖多步去噪，计算开销巨大，严重限制了在实际场景中的应用部署。虽然一步蒸馏方法可以显著加速推理，但往往存在训练不稳定的问题。
AI.method: 提出TurboTalk两阶段渐进式蒸馏框架：首先采用分布匹配蒸馏获得稳定强力的4步学生模型；然后通过对抗蒸馏逐步将去噪步数从4步减少到1步。为确保极端步数减少下的训练稳定性，引入渐进式时间步采样策略和自比较对抗目标，提供中间对抗参考来稳定渐进蒸馏过程。
AI.result: 实现了视频说话头像的单步生成，推理速度提升120倍，同时保持了高质量的生成效果。
AI.conclusion: TurboTalk成功解决了音频驱动视频生成模型从多步到单步蒸馏过程中的训练不稳定问题，为实时音频驱动视频数字人应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Attention to Mamba: A Recipe for Cross-Architecture Distillation
summary: State Space Models (SSMs) such as Mamba have become a popular alternative to Transformer models, due to their reduced memory consumption and higher throughput at generation compared to their Attention-based counterparts. On the other hand, the community has built up a considerable body of knowledge on how to train Transformers, and many pretrained Transformer models are readily available. To facilitate the adoption of SSMs while leveraging existing pretrained Transformers, we aim to identify an effective recipe to distill an Attention-based model into a Mamba-like architecture. In prior work on cross-architecture distillation, however, it has been shown that a naïve distillation procedure from Transformers to Mamba fails to preserve the original teacher performance, a limitation often overcome with hybrid solutions combining Attention and SSM blocks. The key argument from our work is that, by equipping Mamba with a principled initialization, we can recover an overall better recipe for cross-architectural distillation. To this end, we propose a principled two-stage approach: first, we distill knowledge from a traditional Transformer into a linearized version of Attention, using an adaptation of the kernel trick. Then, we distill the linearized version into an adapted Mamba model that does not use any Attention block. Overall, the distilled Mamba model is able to preserve the original Pythia-1B Transformer performance in downstream tasks, maintaining a perplexity of 14.11 close to the teacher's 13.86. To show the efficacy of our recipe, we conduct thorough ablations at 1B scale with 10B tokens varying sequence mixer architecture, scaling analysis on model sizes and total distillation tokens, and a sensitivity analysis on tokens allocation between stages.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种两阶段蒸馏方法，成功将基于注意力机制的Transformer模型蒸馏到纯Mamba架构中，在保持相近性能的同时获得Mamba的高效推理优势。
AI.motivation: Mamba等状态空间模型相比Transformer具有更低内存消耗和更高推理吞吐量，但社区对Transformer训练积累了丰富知识，存在大量预训练模型。需要找到有效方法将预训练Transformer知识迁移到Mamba架构，以利用现有资源同时获得高效推理。
AI.method: 提出原则性的两阶段蒸馏方法：第一阶段使用核技巧将Transformer知识蒸馏到线性化注意力版本；第二阶段将线性化注意力蒸馏到适配的纯Mamba模型，不使用任何注意力模块。强调通过原则性初始化来提升跨架构蒸馏效果。
AI.result: 蒸馏得到的Mamba模型在下游任务中成功保持了Pythia-1B Transformer的原有性能，困惑度为14.11，与教师模型的13.86非常接近。通过1B规模模型的全面消融实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明通过适当初始化和两阶段蒸馏策略，可以实现从Transformer到纯Mamba架构的有效知识转移，无需混合架构即可保持教师模型性能，为SSM模型在实际应用中的推广提供了可行方案。

title: MapSR: Prompt-Driven Land Cover Map Super-Resolution via Vision Foundation Models
summary: High-resolution (HR) land-cover mapping is often constrained by the high cost of dense HR annotations. We revisit this problem from the perspective of map super-resolution, which enhances coarse low-resolution (LR) land-cover products into HR maps at the resolution of the input imagery. Existing weakly supervised methods can leverage LR labels, but they typically use them to retrain dense predictors with substantial computational cost. We propose MapSR, a prompt-driven framework that decouples supervision from model training. MapSR uses LR labels once to extract class prompts from frozen vision foundation model features through a lightweight linear probe, after which HR mapping proceeds via training-free metric inference and graph-based prediction refinement. Specifically, class prompts are estimated by aggregating high-confidence HR features identified by the linear probe, and HR predictions are obtained by cosine-similarity matching followed by graph-based propagation for spatial refinement. Experiments on the Chesapeake Bay dataset show that MapSR achieves 59.64% mIoU without any HR labels, remaining competitive with the strongest weakly supervised baseline and surpassing a fully supervised baseline. Notably, MapSR reduces trainable parameters by four orders of magnitude and shortens training time from hours to minutes, enabling scalable HR mapping under limited annotation and compute budgets. The code is available at https://github.com/rikirikirikiriki/MapSR.

AI.tldr: MapSR是一种基于提示的土地覆盖超分辨率框架，通过提取基础模型特征实现高效的高分辨率映射，在无需HR标签的情况下达到竞争性性能，并大幅降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率土地覆盖制图面临的主要挑战是密集高分辨率标注的高成本问题，现有弱监督方法虽然能利用低分辨率标签，但需要大量计算资源重新训练预测器。
AI.method: MapSR提出了一种提示驱动的框架，通过轻量级线性探针从冻结的视觉基础模型特征中提取类别提示，然后使用无训练的度量推断和基于图的预测细化来获得高分辨率映射。具体包括通过余弦相似度匹配获得初始预测，再用基于图的传播进行空间细化和优化。
AI.result: 在Chesapeake Bay数据集上，MapSR在没有HR标签的情况下达到59.64% mIoU，性能与最强的弱监督基线相当并超越全监督基线，同时将可训练参数减少四个数量级，训练时间从几小时缩短到几分钟。
AI.conclusion: MapSR成功实现了监督与模型训练的解耦，在有限的标注和计算预算下实现了可扩展的高分辨率土地覆盖制图，为弱监督语义分割提供了新的解决思路。

title: The PICCO Framework for Large Language Model Prompting: A Taxonomy and Reference Architecture for Prompt Structure
comment: Presents the novel PICCO framework for LLM prompting, derived through a structured multi-database search and rigorous comparative synthesis of 11 published prompting frameworks. Submitted in PDF/A format to preserve the structure and readability of several multi-page tables central to the framework and methodology; these contain dense structured information that is best preserved in PDF form
summary: Large language model (LLM) performance depends heavily on prompt design, yet prompt construction is often described and applied inconsistently. Our purpose was to derive a reference framework for structuring LLM prompts. This paper presents PICCO, a framework derived through a rigorous synthesis of 11 previously published prompting frameworks identified through a multi-database search. The analysis yields two main contributions. First, it proposes a taxonomy that distinguishes prompt frameworks, prompt elements, prompt generation, prompting techniques, and prompt engineering as related but non-equivalent concepts. Second, it derives a five-element reference architecture for prompt generation: Persona, Instructions, Context, Constraints, and Output (PICCO). For each element, we define its function, scope, and relationship to other elements, with the goal of improving conceptual clarity and supporting more systematic prompt design. Finally, to support application of the framework, we outline key concepts relevant to implementation, including prompting techniques (e.g., zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, ensembling, decomposition, and self-critique, with selected variants), human and automated approaches to iterative prompt engineering, responsible prompting considerations such as security, privacy, bias, and trust, and priorities for future research. This work is a conceptual and methodological contribution: it formalizes a common structure for prompt specification and comparison, but does not claim empirical validation of PICCO as an optimization method.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了PICCO框架，这是一个通过综合11个现有提示框架得出的五要素参考架构，用于结构化大型语言模型的提示设计。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的性能严重依赖提示设计，但提示构建在描述和应用上往往不一致，缺乏统一的参考框架来指导系统性的提示设计。
AI.method: 通过多数据库搜索识别了11个已发布的提示框架，进行严谨的综合分析，提出了区分相关概念的分类体系，并推导出包含Persona（角色）、Instructions（指令）、Context（上下文）、Constraints（约束）和Output（输出）五个元素的参考架构。
AI.result: 创建了PICCO框架，明确了每个元素的功能、范围和相互关系，同时概述了实现相关的关键概念，包括各种提示技术、迭代工程方法和负责任提示的考量因素。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作是概念和方法论的贡献，为提示规范化和比较提供了通用结构，但并未声称PICCO作为优化方法的实证有效性，旨在提高概念清晰度并支持更系统的提示设计。

title: Prompt-Guided Image Editing with Masked Logit Nudging in Visual Autoregressive Models
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Findings (CVPRF)
summary: We address the problem of prompt-guided image editing in visual autoregressive models. Given a source image and a target text prompt, we aim to modify the source image according to the target prompt, while preserving all regions which are unrelated to the requested edit. To this end, we present Masked Logit Nudging, which uses the source image token maps to introduce a guidance step that aligns the model's predictions under the target prompt with these source token maps. Specifically, we convert the fixed source encodings into logits using the VAR encoding, nudging the model's predicted logits towards the targets along a semantic trajectory defined by the source-target prompts. Edits are applied only within spatial masks obtained through a dedicated masking scheme that leverages cross-attention differences between the source and edited prompts. Then, we introduce a refinement to correct quantization errors and improve reconstruction quality. Our approach achieves the best image editing performance on the PIE benchmark at 512px and 1024px resolutions. Beyond editing, our method delivers faithful reconstructions and outperforms previous methods on COCO at 512px and OpenImages at 1024px. Overall, our method outperforms VAR-related approaches and achieves comparable or even better performance than diffusion models, while being much faster. Code is available at 'https://github.com/AmirMaEl/MLN'.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为掩码Logit推动(MLN)的图像编辑方法，能够在视觉自回归模型中实现基于文本提示的精确图像编辑，在保持无关区域不变的同时编辑目标区域，并在多个基准测试中取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像编辑方法要么编辑精度不够，要么速度缓慢，尤其在保持图像非编辑区域完整性方面存在挑战。视觉自回归模型虽然在重建方面表现良好，但在精确编辑能力上仍有不足。
AI.method: 提出掩码Logit推动方法，利用源图像的token映射作为引导，将目标提示下的模型预测与源token映射对齐；通过交叉注意力差异获得空间掩码，仅在需要编辑的区域应用修改；引入量化误差校正机制提高重建质量。
AI.result: 在PIE基准测试的512px和1024px分辨率下取得最佳编辑性能；在COCO和OpenImages数据集上的重建质量超越之前的方法；相比扩散模型具有可比或更好的性能，同时速度更快。
AI.conclusion: MLN方法成功整合了视觉自回归模型的图像编辑能力，实现了高精度、高效率的提示引导图像编辑，为自回归模型在图像编辑任务中的应用开辟了新途径。

title: Chinese Language Is Not More Efficient Than English in Vibe Coding: A Preliminary Study on Token Cost and Problem-Solving Rate
summary: A claim has been circulating on social media and practitioner forums that Chinese prompts are more token-efficient than English for LLM coding tasks, potentially reducing costs by up to 40\%. This claim has influenced developers to consider switching to Chinese for ``vibe coding'' to save on API costs. In this paper, we conduct a rigorous empirical study using SWE-bench Lite, a benchmark of software engineering tasks, to evaluate whether this claim of Chinese token efficiency holds up to scrutiny. Our results reveal three key findings: First, the efficiency advantage of Chinese is not observed. Second, token cost varies by model architecture in ways that defy simple assumptions: while MiniMax-2.7 shows 1.28x higher token costs for Chinese, GLM-5 actually consumes fewer tokens with Chinese prompts. Third, and most importantly, we found that the success rate when prompting in Chinese is generally lower than in English across all models we tested. We also measure cost efficiency as expected cost per successful task -- jointly accounting for token consumption and task resolution rate. These findings should be interpreted as preliminary evidence rather than a definitive conclusion, given the limited number of models evaluated and the narrow set of benchmarks tested due to resource constraints; they indicate that language effects on token cost are model-dependent, and that practitioners should not expect cost savings or performance gains just by switching their prompt language to Chinese.

AI.tldr: 通过SWE-bench Lite基准测试发现，中文提示在LLM编程任务中并不比英文更高效，且成功率普遍较低，成本节省的说法缺乏依据。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体和开发者论坛流传中文提示比英文更节省token、可降低40%成本的说法，影响了开发者使用中文进行编程的决策，需要通过实证研究验证这一说法的可信度。
AI.method: 使用SWE-bench Lite软件工程任务基准，对不同模型架构在中文和英文提示下的token消耗、任务成功率和成本效益进行严格实证评估。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）中文不存在效率优势；2）不同模型的token成本存在差异，MiniMax-2.7中文成本高1.28倍，而GLM-5中文消耗更少token；3）所有测试模型中中文提示的成功率均低于英文。
AI.conclusion: 语言对token成本的影响因模型而异，开发者不应期望仅通过切换到中文提示就能获得成本节省或性能提升。由于评估模型数量有限且基准测试范围较窄，这些发现应被视为初步证据。

title: Towards Design Compositing
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshop on CVEU
summary: Graphic design creation involves harmoniously assembling multimodal components such as images, text, logos, and other visual assets collected from diverse sources, into a visually-appealing and cohesive design. Recent methods have largely focused on layout prediction or complementary element generation, while retaining input elements exactly, implicitly assuming that provided components are already stylistically harmonious. In practice, inputs often come from disparate sources and exhibit visual mismatch, making this assumption limiting. We argue that identity-preserving stylization and compositing of input elements is a critical missing ingredient for truly harmonized components-to-design pipelines. To this end, we propose GIST, a training-free, identity-preserving image compositor that sits between layout prediction and typography generation, and can be plugged into any existing components-to-design or design-refining pipeline without modification. We demonstrate this by integrating GIST with two substantially different existing methods, LaDeCo and Design-o-meter. GIST shows significant improvements in visual harmony and aesthetic quality across both pipelines, as validated by LLaVA-OV and GPT-4V on aspect-wise ratings and pairwise preference over naive pasting. Project Page: abhinav-mahajan10.github.io/GIST/.

AI.tldr: 提出GIST，一个无需训练、保持身份的图像合成器，解决图形设计中多模态组件视觉不匹配问题，可插入现有设计流程中提升视觉和谐性。
AI.motivation: 现有图形设计方法假设输入组件风格和谐，但实际中来源不同的组件常存在视觉不匹配，限制了设计质量。
AI.method: GIST作为独立的身份保持图像合成器，位于布局预测和排版生成之间，可无缝插入现有设计流水线，无需修改原有方法。
AI.result: 将GIST集成到LaDeCo和Design-o-meter两个不同方法中，显著提升了视觉和谐性和美学质量，LLaVA-OV和GPT-4V评估支持这一结论。
AI.conclusion: 身份保持的风格化和合成是组件到设计流水线的关键要素，GIST为现有图形设计方法提供了轻量级且有效的改进方案。

title: CROP: Token-Efficient Reasoning in Large Language Models via Regularized Prompt Optimization
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Logical Reasoning of Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models utilizing reasoning techniques improve task performance but incur significant latency and token costs due to verbose generation. Existing automatic prompt optimization(APO) frameworks target task accuracy exclusively at the expense of generating long reasoning traces. We propose Cost-Regularized Optimization of Prompts (CROP), an APO method that introduces regularization on response length by generating textual feedback in addition to standard accuracy feedback. This forces the optimization process to produce prompts that elicit concise responses containing only critical information and reasoning. We evaluate our approach on complex reasoning datasets, specifically GSM8K, LogiQA and BIG-Bench Hard. We achieved an 80.6\% reduction in token consumption while maintaining competitive accuracy, seeing only a nominal decline in performance. This presents a pragmatic solution for deploying token-efficient and cost-effective agentic AI systems in production pipelines.

AI.tldr: CROP是一种通过正则化响应长度来优化提示的方法，能够在保持竞争性准确率的同时将token消耗减少80.6%。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动提示优化框架只关注任务准确率，导致推理过程冗长，产生了显著的延迟和token成本问题。
AI.method: 提出CROP方法，通过在标准准确率反馈基础上增加文本反馈来实现响应长度的正则化，迫使优化过程产生简洁的提示。
AI.result: 在GSM8K、LogiQA和BIG-Bench Hard等复杂推理数据集上实现了80.6%的token消耗减少，同时保持竞争性准确率，性能仅有轻微下降。
AI.conclusion: CROP为在生产管道中部署token高效且成本效益高的代理AI系统提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning and Tri-Token Prompt Learning Embraced High-Order RWKV for Pan-Sharpening
summary: In this work, we propose a Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning paradigm for pan-sharpening, built upon a high-order RWKV architecture and a tri-token prompting mechanism derived from semantic clustering. Specifically, our method contains three key components: 1) Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning. Although RWKV offers a efficient linear-complexity alternative to Transformers, its conventional bidirectional raster scanning is still semantic-agnostic and prone to positional bias. To address this issue, we introduce a semantic-driven scanning strategy that leverages locality-sensitive hashing to group semantically related regions and construct multi-grain semantic prototypes, enabling context-aware token reordering and more coherent global interaction. 2) Tri-token Prompt Learning. We design a tri-token prompting mechanism consisting of a global token, cluster-derived prototype tokens, and a learnable register token. The global and prototype tokens provide complementary semantic priors for RWKV modeling, while the register token helps suppress noisy and artifact-prone intermediate representations. 3) Invertible Q-Shift. To counteract spatial details, we apply center difference convolution on the value pathway to inject high-frequency information, and introduce an invertible multi-scale Q-shift operation for efficient and lossless feature transformation without parameter-heavy receptive field expansion. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高阶RWKV架构和三令牌提示机制的多粒度感知语义原型扫描范式，用于全色锐化任务，通过语义驱动的扫描和可逆特征变换实现了优异的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的RWKV模型在双向往栅式扫描中存在语义无关性和位置偏差问题，无法充分利用图像的语义信息进行上下文感知的全局交互，影响全色锐化效果。
AI.method: 1) 多粒度感知语义原型扫描：利用局部敏感哈希将语义相关区域分组，构建多粒度语义原型，实现上下文感知的令牌重排序；2) 三令牌提示学习：设计包含全局令牌、聚类原型令牌和可学习寄存器令牌的提示机制；3) 可逆Q-Shift：通过中心差分卷积注入高频信息，引入可逆多尺度Q-Shift操作。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在全色锐化任务上展现出优越的性能，有效提升了图像质量。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过结合语义感知扫描、多令牌提示机制和可逆特征变换，为全色锐化提供了一个高效且性能优异的解决方案，克服了传统RWKV模型的局限性。

title: MEME-Fusion@CHiPSAL 2026: Multimodal Ablation Study of Hate Detection and Sentiment Analysis on Nepali Memes
summary: Hate speech detection in Devanagari-scripted social media memes presents compounded challenges: multimodal content structure, script-specific linguistic complexity, and extreme data scarcity in low-resource settings. This paper presents our system for the CHiPSAL 2026 shared task, addressing both Subtask A (binary hate speech detection) and Subtask B (three-class sentiment classification: positive, neutral, negative). We propose a hybrid cross-modal attention fusion architecture that combines CLIP (ViT-B/32) for visual encoding with BGE-M3 for multilingual text representation, connected through 4-head self-attention and a learnable gating network that dynamically weights modality contributions on a per-sample basis. Systematic evaluation across eight model configurations demonstrates that explicit cross-modal reasoning achieves a 5.9% F1-macro improvement over text-only baselines on Subtask A, while uncovering two unexpected but critical findings: English-centric vision models exhibit near-random performance on Devanagari script, and standard ensemble methods catastrophically degrade under data scarcity (N nearly equal to 850 per fold) due to correlated overfitting. The code can be accessed at https://github.com/Tri-Yantra-Technologies/MEME-Fusion/

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种混合跨模态注意力融合架构，结合CLIP视觉编码器和BGE-M3多语言文本表示，用于检测天城文脚本社交媒体迷因中的仇恨言论，在数据稀缺环境下实现了5.9%的F1-macro提升。
AI.motivation: 天城文脚本社交媒体迷因的仇恨言论检测面临多重挑战：多模态内容结构、脚本特定的语言复杂性以及低资源环境下的极端数据稀缺，传统方法在该场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出混合跨模态注意力融合架构，使用CLIP (ViT-B/32)进行视觉编码，BGE-M3进行多语言文本表示，通过4头自注意力和可学习门控网络动态加权各模态贡献，系统评估了8种模型配置。
AI.result: 跨模态推理比纯文本基线提升5.9% F1-macro，发现英语中心视觉模型在天城文脚本上表现近随机，标准集成方法在数据稀缺(N≈850)下因相关过拟合而灾难性退化。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明显式跨模态推理对天城文迷因仇恨检测至关重要，揭示了英语偏见视觉模型的问题和数据稀缺下集成方法的局限性，为该领域提供了重要的技术洞察。

title: Switch-KD: Visual-Switch Knowledge Distillation for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities in joint vision-language understanding, but their large scale poses significant challenges for deployment in resource-constrained scenarios. Knowledge Distillation (KD) offers a viable way to improve model capabilities without increasing model size or data requirements, making deployment more efficient. However, applying KD to VLMs is challenged by modality-specific supervision: although multimodal knowledge in VLMs is fused within the language space, current methods supervise each modality separately without explicitly addressing multimodal alignment, leading to inconsistent multimodal knowledge transfer. To address this, we propose Switch-KD, a visual-switch distillation framework that unifies vision-language knowledge transfer within a shared text-probability space. Switch-KD comprises two key components: (1) Visual-Switch Distillation, which switches the student's visual outputs into the teacher's language pathway to construct cross-modal probabilistic references for implicit visual knowledge transfer; and (2) Dynamic Bi-directional Logits Difference (DBiLD) loss, which adaptively aligns informative probability regions while preserving the distributional structures of teacher and student through bidirectional supervision. Guided by Switch-KD, a 0.5B TinyLLaVA effectively distills rich multimodal knowledge from its 3B teacher, yielding an average improvement of 3.6 points across 10 multimodal benchmarks without any architectural modification.

AI.tldr: Switch-KD是一个视觉切换知识蒸馏框架，通过将学生模型的视觉输出切换到教师模型的语言路径中，在共享的文本概率空间内统一视觉-语言知识转移，使0.5B的小模型有效蒸馏3B大模型的多模态知识。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言模型知识蒸馏方法面临模态特定监督的挑战，虽然多模态知识在语言空间中融合，但当前方法分别监督每个模态，没有明确解决多模态对齐问题，导致多模态知识转移不一致。
AI.method: Switch-KD框架包含两个关键组件：(1)视觉切换蒸馏，将学生模型的视觉输出切换到教师模型的语言路径，构建跨模态概率参考；(2)动态双向logits差分损失(DBiLD)，通过双向监督自适应对齐信息概率区域，同时保持师生模型的分布结构。
AI.result: 在Switch-KD指导下，0.5B的TinyLLaVA模型从其3B教师模型有效蒸馏了丰富的多模态知识，在10个多模态基准测试上平均提升了3.6分，且无需任何架构修改。
AI.conclusion: Switch-KD通过在共享文本概率空间中统一视觉-语言知识转移，成功解决了多模态知识蒸馏中的对齐不一致问题，为资源受限场景下的VLM部署提供了有效的解决方案。

title: ReviewGrounder: Improving Review Substantiveness with Rubric-Guided, Tool-Integrated Agents
summary: The rapid rise in AI conference submissions has driven increasing exploration of large language models (LLMs) for peer review support. However, LLM-based reviewers often generate superficial, formulaic comments lacking substantive, evidence-grounded feedback. We attribute this to the underutilization of two key components of human reviewing: explicit rubrics and contextual grounding in existing work. To address this, we introduce REVIEWBENCH, a benchmark evaluating review text according to paper-specific rubrics derived from official guidelines, the paper's content, and human-written reviews. We further propose REVIEWGROUNDER, a rubric-guided, tool-integrated multi-agent framework that decomposes reviewing into drafting and grounding stages, enriching shallow drafts via targeted evidence consolidation. Experiments on REVIEWBENCH show that REVIEWGROUNDER, using a Phi-4-14B-based drafter and a GPT-OSS-120B-based grounding stage, consistently outperforms baselines with substantially stronger/larger backbones (e.g., GPT-4.1 and DeepSeek-R1-670B) in both alignment with human judgments and rubric-based review quality across 8 dimensions. The code is available \href{https://github.com/EigenTom/ReviewGrounder}{here}.

AI.tldr: 针对AI会议激增的审稿需求，作者提出了REVIEWBENCH评测基准和REVIEWGROUNDER框架，通过引入显式评分标准和证据锚定机制，显著提升了LLM生成审稿意见的质量。
AI.motivation: 随着AI会议投稿数量快速增长，利用大语言模型辅助同行评审成为趋势，但现有LLM审稿器往往产生肤浅、模板化的评论，缺乏实质性的、基于证据的反馈。
AI.method: 开发REVIEWBENCH评测基准，根据官方指南、论文内容和人工审稿制定论文特定评分标准；提出REVIEWGROUNDER多智能体框架，将审稿分解为起草和锚定两个阶段，通过针对性证据整合丰富浅层草稿。
AI.result: 在REVIEWBench上的实验表明，基于Phi-4-14B drafting和GPT-OSS-120B锚定的REVIEWGROUNDER，在8个维度上的人对齐和基于标准的审稿质量方面持续超越使用更大更强骨干网络（如GPT-4.1和DeepSeek-R1-670B）的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式评分标准和证据锚定机制，即使使用相对较小的模型也能生成高质量的审稿意见，为AI辅助同行评审提供了有效解决方案。

title: CMTM: Cross-Modal Token Modulation for Unsupervised Video Object Segmentation
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to IEEE ICIP 2025
summary: Recent advances in unsupervised video object segmentation have highlighted the potential of two-stream architectures that integrate appearance and motion cues. However, fully leveraging these complementary sources of information requires effectively modeling their interdependencies. In this paper, we introduce cross-modality token modulation, a novel approach designed to strengthen the interaction between appearance and motion cues. Our method establishes dense connections between tokens from each modality, enabling efficient intra-modal and inter-modal information propagation through relation transformer blocks. To improve learning efficiency, we incorporate a token masking strategy that addresses the limitations of relying solely on increased model complexity. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across all public benchmarks, outperforming existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出跨模态token调制方法，通过建立外观和运动模态token间的密集连接和关系Transformer块，实现高效的信息传播，在无监督视频目标分割任务上达到最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的双流架构虽然集成了外观和运动线索，但未能充分利用这两种互补信息源，缺乏有效的相互依赖建模机制。
AI.method: 引入跨模态token调制技术，在两种模态的token之间建立密集连接，通过关系Transformer块实现模态内和跨模态的信息高效传播，并采用token掩码策略提高学习效率。
AI.result: 在所有公开基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，超越了现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效加强了外观与运动线索的交互作用，通过创新的token调制机制显著提升了无监督视频目标分割的效果，证明了跨模态信息融合的重要性。

title: EuropeMedQA Study Protocol: A Multilingual, Multimodal Medical Examination Dataset for Language Model Evaluation
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated high proficiency on English-centric medical examinations, their performance often declines when faced with non-English languages and multimodal diagnostic tasks. This study protocol describes the development of EuropeMedQA, the first comprehensive, multilingual, and multimodal medical examination dataset sourced from official regulatory exams in Italy, France, Spain, and Portugal. Following FAIR data principles and SPIRIT-AI guidelines, we describe a rigorous curation process and an automated translation pipeline for comparative analysis. We evaluate contemporary multimodal LLMs using a zero-shot, strictly constrained prompting strategy to assess cross-lingual transfer and visual reasoning. EuropeMedQA aims to provide a contamination-resistant benchmark that reflects the complexity of European clinical practices and fosters the development of more generalizable medical AI.

AI.tldr: EuropeMedQA是首个欧洲多语言多模态医学考试基准数据集，用于评估LLM在非英语和跨语言临床场景中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在英语医学考试上表现良好，但在非英语语言和多模态诊断任务上性能下降，需要更全面的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建意大利、法国、西班牙、葡萄牙官方监管考试数据集，遵循FAIR数据原则和SPIRIT-AI指南，采用自动翻译流程，使用零-shot严格约束提示策略评估多模态LLM。
AI.result: 创建了首个欧洲多语言多模态医学考试数据集，为评估LLM的跨语言迁移和视觉推理能力提供了抗污染的基准。
AI.conclusion: EuropeMedQA反映了欧洲临床实践的复杂性，将推动开发更具泛化能力的医疗AI系统。

title: High-Speed Full-Color HDR Imaging via Unwrapping Modulo-Encoded Spike Streams
summary: Conventional RGB-based high dynamic range (HDR) imaging faces a fundamental trade-off between motion artifacts in multi-exposure captures and irreversible information loss in single-shot techniques. Modulo sensors offer a promising alternative by encoding theoretically unbounded dynamic range into wrapped measurements. However, existing modulo solutions remain bottlenecked by iterative unwrapping overhead and hardware constraints limiting them to low-speed, grayscale capture. In this work, we present a complete modulo-based HDR imaging system that enables high-speed, full-color HDR acquisition by synergistically advancing both the sensing formulation and the unwrapping algorithm. At the core of our approach is an exposure-decoupled formulation of modulo imaging that allows multiple measurements to be interleaved in time, preserving a clean, observation-wise measurement model. Building upon this, we introduce an iteration-free unwrapping algorithm that integrates diffusion-based generative priors with the physical least absolute remainder property of modulo images, supporting highly efficient, physics-consistent HDR reconstruction. Finally, to validate the practical viability of our system, we demonstrate a proof-of-concept hardware implementation based on modulo-encoded spike streams. This setup preserves the native high temporal resolution of spike cameras, achieving 1000 FPS full-color imaging while reducing output data bandwidth from approximately 20 Gbps to 6 Gbps. Extensive evaluations indicate that our coordinated approach successfully overcomes key systemic bottlenecks, demonstrating the feasibility of deploying modulo imaging in dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种完整的模数HDR成像系统，通过创新的传感 formulation和无迭代解缠算法，实现了1000 FPS的全彩色HDR成像，同时显著降低了数据带宽需求。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB HDR成像面临多重曝光运动伪影与单次拍摄信息损失的权衡，现有模数解决方案受限于迭代解缠开销和硬件约束，只能实现低速灰度采集。
AI.method: 采用曝光解耦的模数成像 formulation 配合基于扩散生成先验的无迭代解缠算法，并基于模数编码脉冲流实现了硬件原型系统。
AI.result: 实现了1000 FPS全彩色HDR成像，将输出数据带宽从约20 Gbps降至6 Gbps，在动态场景中验证了系统的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过协同推进传感 formulation和解缠算法，成功克服了系统瓶颈，证明了模数成像在动态场景部署的可行性。

title: Tracking the Temporal Dynamics of News Coverage of Catastrophic and Violent Events
summary: The modern news cycle has been fundamentally reshaped by the rapid exchange of information online. As a result, media framing shifts dynamically as new information, political responses, and social reactions emerge. Understanding how these narratives form, propagate, and evolve is essential for interpreting public discourse during moments of crisis. In this study, we examine the temporal and semantic dynamics of reporting for violent and catastrophic events using a large-scale corpus of 126,602 news articles collected from online publishers. We quantify narrative change through publication volume, semantic drift, semantic dispersion, and term relevance. Our results show that sudden events of impact exhibit structured and predictable news-cycle patterns characterized by rapid surges in coverage, early semantic drift, and gradual declines toward the baseline. In addition, our results indicate the terms that are driving the temporal patterns.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析126,602篇新闻文章，量化了暴力灾难事件的新闻报道在时间上的结构和可预测模式，发现重大事件呈现报道量激增、语义早期漂移、逐渐回归基线等特征。
AI.motivation: 现代新闻周期因在线信息的快速交换而根本改变，媒体框架随着新信息、政治反应和社会反应的出现而动态变化。理解这些叙事在危机时刻如何形成、传播和演变对解读公众言论至关重要。
AI.method: 研究者收集了126,602篇在线新闻文章构成的大规模语料库，通过出版量、语义漂移、语义分散度和术语相关性四个指标来量化叙事变化，分析暴力灾难事件的报道模式。
AI.result: 研究发现突发影响事件表现出结构化且可预测的新闻周期模式，特点包括报道量激增、早期语义漂移以及逐渐回归基线水平的下降趋势，并识别出驱动这些时间模式的关键术语。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了重大危机事件新闻报道的时空动态规律，为理解信息传播机制和公众舆论形成提供了量化分析的框架，有助于预测和把握新闻叙事的演变轨迹。

title: Physically-Induced Atmospheric Adversarial Perturbations: Enhancing Transferability and Robustness in Remote Sensing Image Classification
summary: Adversarial attacks pose a severe threat to the reliability of deep learning models in remote sensing (RS) image classification. Most existing methods rely on direct pixel-wise perturbations, failing to exploit the inherent atmospheric characteristics of RS imagery or survive real-world image degradations. In this paper, we propose FogFool, a physically plausible adversarial framework that generates fog-based perturbations by iteratively optimizing atmospheric patterns based on Perlin noise. By modeling fog formations with natural, irregular structures, FogFool generates adversarial examples that are not only visually consistent with authentic RS scenes but also deceptive. By leveraging the spatial coherence and mid-to-low-frequency nature of atmospheric phenomena, FogFool embeds adversarial information into structural features shared across diverse architectures. Extensive experiments on two benchmark RS datasets demonstrate that FogFool achieves superior performance: not only does it exceed in white-box settings, but also exhibits exceptional black-box transferability (reaching 83.74% TASR) and robustness against common preprocessing-based defenses such as JPEG compression and filtering. Detailed analyses, including confusion matrices and Class Activation Map (CAM) visualizations, reveal that our atmospheric-driven perturbations induce a universal shift in model attention. These results indicate that FogFool represents a practical, stealthy, and highly persistent threat to RS classification systems, providing a robust benchmark for evaluating model reliability in complex environments.

AI.tldr: FogFool是一种基于雾气生成的对抗攻击框架，通过优化大气模式的Perlin噪声生成物理可信的对抗样本，在遥感图像分类中实现了优秀的白盒攻击效果、黑盒迁移性和防御鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法主要依赖像素级扰动，未能充分利用遥感影像的大气特征，且在实际图像退化下表现不佳。需要开发一种更符合物理规律、更具隐蔽性和鲁棒性的对抗攻击方法。
AI.method: 提出FogFool框架，通过迭代优化基于Perlin噪声的大气模式来生成雾基扰动。利用自然不规则结构建模雾气形成过程，将对抗信息嵌入到大气现象的空间相干性和中低频特征中。
AI.result: 在两个基准遥感数据集上，FogFool在白盒设置下表现优越，黑盒迁移性达到83.74% TASR，对JPEG压缩和滤波等预处理防御展现强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FogFool代表了遥感分类系统面临的一种实用、隐蔽且高度持久的威胁，为复杂环境下的模型可靠性评估提供了强有力的基准测试工具。

title: LLM Predictive Scoring and Validation: Inferring Experience Ratings from Unstructured Text
summary: We tasked GPT-4.1 to read what baseball fans wrote about their game-day experience and predict the overall experience rating each fan gave on a 0-10 survey scale. The model received only the text of a single open-ended response. These AI predictions were compared with the actual experience ratings captured by the survey instrument across approximately 10,000 fan responses from five Major League Baseball teams. In total two-thirds of predicted ratings fell within one point of self-reported fan ratings (67% within +/-1, 36% exact match), and the predicted measurement was near-deterministic across three independent scoring runs (87% exact agreement, 99.9% within +/-1). Predicted ratings aligned most strongly with the overall experience rating (r = 0.82) rather than with any specific aspect of the game-day experience such as parking, concessions, staff, etc. However, predictions were systematically lower than self-reported ratings by approximately one point, and this gap was not driven by any single aspect. Rather, our analysis shows that self-reported ratings capture the fan's verdict, an overall evaluative judgment that integrates the entire experience. While predicted ratings quantify the impact of salient moments characterized as memorable, emotionally intense, unusual, or actionable. Each measure contains information the other misses. These baseline results establish that a simple, unoptimized prompt can directionally predict how fans rate their experience from the text a fan wrote and that a gap between the two numbers can be interpreted as a construct difference worth preserving rather than an error to eliminate.

AI.tldr: GPT-4.1通过阅读球迷的开放式文字反馈预测其体验评分，准确率达到67%（±1分内），预测与自评评分存在1分的系统性差异，反映两种测量方式捕捉不同维度的体验信息。
AI.motivation: 探索AI能否仅通过球迷的自然语言反馈准确预测其对球场体验的评分，并理解预测评分与自评评分之间的关系差异。
AI.method: 使用GPT-4.1分析约1万份来自5个MLB球队的球迷开放文字反馈，预测0-10分体验评分，与实际调查评分进行对比分析
AI.result: 预测准确率高（36%精确匹配，67%±1分内），预测评分与自评评分相关性强（r=0.82），但存在约1分的系统性低估差异
AI.conclusion: AI预测评分捕捉显著情感时刻，自评评分整合整体体验判断，两者差异非误差而是不同构念，值得保留并存，为体验评估提供新视角

title: Chaotic CNN for Limited Data Image Classification
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) often exhibit poor generalisation in limited training data scenarios due to overfitting and insufficient feature diversity. In this work, a simple and effective chaos-based feature transformation is proposed to enhance CNN performance without increasing model complexity. The method applies nonlinear transformations using logistic, skew tent, and sine maps to normalised feature vectors before the classification layer, thereby reshaping the feature space and improving class separability. The approach is evaluated on greyscale datasets (MNIST and Fashion-MNIST) and an RGB dataset (CIFAR-10) using CNN architectures of varying depth under limited data conditions. The results show consistent improvement over the standalone (SA) CNN across all datasets. Notably, a maximum performance gain of 5.43% is achieved on MNIST using the skew tent map with a 3-layer CNN at 40 samples per class. A higher gain of 9.11% is observed on Fashion-MNIST using the sine map with a 3-layer CNN at 50 samples per class. Additionally, a strong gain of 7.47% is obtained on CIFAR-10 using the skew tent map at 200 samples per class. The consistent improvements across different chaotic maps indicate that the performance gain is driven by the shared nonlinear and dynamical properties of chaotic systems. The proposed method is computationally efficient, requires no additional trainable parameters, and can be easily integrated into existing CNN architectures, making it a practical solution for data-scarce image classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于混沌特征变换的方法，通过在分类层前应用非线性变换来增强CNN在有限训练数据下的性能，无需增加模型复杂度。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络(CNNs)在有限训练数据场景下经常表现出较差的泛化能力，这是由于过拟合和特征多样性不足造成的。
AI.method: 提出了一种简单有效的基于混沌的特征变换方法，在分类层之前对归一化特征向量应用逻辑映射、斜帐篷映射和正弦映射的非线性变换，从而重塑特征空间并改善类别可分性。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上，使用不同深度的CNN架构在有限数据条件下进行评估。结果显示：MNIST上最大性能提升5.43%（斜帐篷映射，3层CNN，每类40个样本）；Fashion-MNIST上提升9.11%（正弦映射，3层CNN，每类50个样本）；CIFAR-10上提升7.47%（斜帐篷映射，每类200个样本）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法计算效率高，无需额外的可训练参数，可以轻松集成到现有CNN架构中，是数据稀缺图像分类任务的实用解决方案。不同混沌映射的一致性改进表明性能提升是由混沌系统的非线性和动力特性驱动的。

title: Purging the Gray Zone: Latent-Geometric Denoising for Precise Knowledge Boundary Awareness
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often exhibit hallucinations due to their inability to accurately perceive their own knowledge boundaries. Existing abstention fine-tuning methods typically partition datasets directly based on response accuracy, causing models to suffer from severe label noise near the decision boundaries and consequently exhibit high rates of abstentions or hallucinations. This paper adopts a latent space representation perspective, revealing a "gray zone" near the decision hyperplane where internal belief ambiguity constitutes the core performance bottleneck. Based on this insight, we propose the **GeoDe** (**Geo**metric **De**noising) framework for abstention fine-tuning. This method constructs a truth hyperplane using linear probes and performs "geometric denoising" by employing geometric distance as a confidence signal for abstention decisions. This approach filters out ambiguous boundary samples while retaining high-fidelity signals for fine-tuning. Experiments across multiple models (Llama3, Qwen3) and benchmark datasets (TriviaQA, NQ, SciQ, SimpleQA) demonstrate that GeoDe significantly enhances model truthfulness and demonstrates strong generalization in out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/Notbesidemoon/GeoDe.

AI.tldr: GeoDe框架通过线性探针构建真实超平面，利用几何距离作为置信度信号进行'几何去噪'，有效过滤边界模糊样本，显著提升了大语言模型的诚实性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有拒绝微调方法直接基于响应准确性划分数据集，导致模型在决策边界附近遭受严重的标签噪声，从而表现出高拒绝率或幻觉问题。
AI.method: 从潜在空间表示角度出发，发现了决策超平面附近的'灰色区域'，其中内部信念模糊性是核心性能瓶颈。GeoDe框架包含两个关键步骤：1) 使用线性探针构建真实超平面；2) 以几何距离作为置信度信号执行几何去噪。
AI.result: 在Llama3、Qwen3等多个模型和TriviaQA、NQ、SciQ、SimpleQA等基准数据集上的实验表明，GeoDe显著提升了模型的真实性，并在分布外(OOD)场景中展现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何去噪方法有效解决了拒绝微调中的标签噪声问题，为大语言模型的边界感知和诚实性提升提供了新的技术途径。

title: Seen-to-Scene: Keep the Seen, Generate the Unseen for Video Outpainting
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures (main paper); 9 pages, 10 figures (supplementary). Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026, Findings
summary: Video outpainting aims to expand the visible content of a video beyond the original frame boundaries while preserving spatial fidelity and temporal coherence across frames. Existing methods primarily rely on large-scale generative models, such as diffusion models. However, generationbased approaches suffer from implicit temporal modeling and limited spatial context. These limitations lead to intraframe and inter-frame inconsistencies, which become particularly pronounced in dynamic scenes and large outpainting scenarios. To overcome these challenges, we propose Seen-to-Scene, a novel framework that unifies propagationbased and generation-based paradigms for video outpainting. Specifically, Seen-to-Scene leverages flow-based propagation with a flow completion network pre-trained for video inpainting, which is fine-tuned in an end-to-end manner to bridge the domain gap and reconstruct coherent motion fields. To further improve the efficiency and reliability of propagation, we introduce a reference-guided latent propagation that effectively propagates source content across frames. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior temporal coherence and visual realism with efficient inference, surpassing even prior state-of-the-art methods that require input-specific adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Seen-to-Scene框架，结合传播式和生成式方法，通过流引导传播和参考潜在传播实现高效、时空一致的视频扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生成模型的视频扩展方法存在时空建模隐式和空间上下文有限的缺陷，导致帧内和帧间不一致，尤其在动态场景和大范围扩展时问题突出。
AI.method: 提出Seen-to-Scene统一框架，集成了基于流的传播与视频修复预训练的网络，采用端到端微调来弥合域间差距；引入参考引导的潜在传播机制，提高传播效率和可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在时间一致性和视觉真实感方面表现优异，推理效率高，超越了需要输入特异调整的先前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Seen-to-Scene成功统一了传播式和生成式方法的优势，为视频外绘提供了更可靠的解决方案，在保持时空一致性的同时实现了高效推理。

title: Faithfulness Serum: Mitigating the Faithfulness Gap in Textual Explanations of LLM Decisions via Attribution Guidance
comment: 24 pages, multiple figures (e.g., at least 6 main figures), includes experiments across several benchmarks (MMLU, CommonsenseQA, SciQ, ARC, OpenBookQA); code available on GitHub
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance and have revolutionized NLP, but their lack of explainability keeps them treated as black boxes, limiting their use in domains that demand transparency and trust. A promising direction to address this issue is post-hoc text-based explanations, which aim to explain model decisions in natural language. Prior work has focused on generating convincing rationales that appear to be subjectively faithful, but it remains unclear whether these explanations are epistemically faithful, whether they reflect the internal evidence the model actually relied on for its decision. In this paper, we first assess the epistemic faithfulness of LLM-generated explanations via counterfactuals and show that they are often unfaithful. We then introduce a training-free method that enhances faithfulness by guiding explanation generation through attention-level interventions, informed by token-level heatmaps extracted via a faithful attribution method. This method significantly improves epistemic faithfulness across multiple models, benchmarks, and prompts.

AI.tldr: 本研究揭示了LLM生成的文本解释常不真实反映模型决策依据，并提出了一种基于注意力干预的无训练方法来提高解释的真实性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型缺乏可解释性，限制了其在需要透明度和信任的领域应用。现有工作主要关注生成看似可信的理由，但无法确保这些解释是否真正反映了模型决策时所依赖的内部证据。
AI.method: 首先通过反事实评估LLM生成解释的认知真实性，发现它们往往不够真实。然后引入一种无需训练的方法，通过注意力层干预来指导解释生成，该方法利用基于可信归因方法提取的词级热图信息。
AI.result: 该方法在多个模型、基准测试和提示上显著提高了认知真实性，证明了通过注意力机制干预可以有效改善LLM生成解释的真实性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明传统LLM生成的解释方法存在真实性缺陷，而基于注意力机制的训练无关方法能够有效提升解释的可信度，为构建更透明的AI系统提供了实用解决方案。

title: DETR-ViP: Detection Transformer with Robust Discriminative Visual Prompts
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Visual prompted object detection enables interactive and flexible definition of target categories, thereby facilitating open-vocabulary detection. Since visual prompts are derived directly from image features, they often outperform text prompts in recognizing rare categories. Nevertheless, research on visual prompted detection has been largely overlooked, and it is typically treated as a byproduct of training text prompted detectors, which hinders its development. To fully unlock the potential of visual-prompted detection, we investigate the reasons why its performance is suboptimal and reveal that the underlying issue lies in the absence of global discriminability in visual prompts. Motivated by these observations, we propose DETR-ViP, a robust object detection framework that yields class-distinguishable visual prompts. On top of basic image-text contrastive learning, DETR-ViP incorporates global prompt integration and visual-textual prompt relation distillation to learn more discriminative prompt representations. In addition, DETR-ViP employs a selective fusion strategy that ensures stable and robust detection. Extensive experiments on COCO, LVIS, ODinW, and Roboflow100 demonstrate that DETR-ViP achieves substantially higher performance in visual prompt detection compared to other state-of-the-art counterparts. A series of ablation studies and analyses further validate the effectiveness of the proposed improvements and shed light on the underlying reasons for the enhanced detection capability of visual prompts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DETR-ViP框架，解决视觉提示目标检测中缺乏全局判别性的问题，通过全局提示集成和视觉-文本提示关系蒸馏等技术，显著提升了视觉提示检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉提示目标检测能够实现交互式和灵活的目标类别定义，便于开放词汇检测。然而，该领域研究被长期忽视，通常仅作为文本提示检测器的副产品，导致其性能次优。
AI.method: DETR-ViP框架在基础图像-文本对比学习基础上，引入全局提示集成和视觉-文本提示关系蒸馏来学习更具判别性的提示表示，并采用选择性融合策略确保检测的稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在COCO、LVIS、ODinW和Roboflow100数据集上的大量实验表明，DETR-ViP在视觉提示检测方面显著优于其他最先进方法。消融研究进一步验证了所提改进的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决视觉提示缺乏全局判别性的根本问题，DETR-ViP成功释放了视觉提示检测的潜力，为开放词汇目标检测提供了一个更有效的解决方案。

title: Shuffle the Context: RoPE-Perturbed Self-Distillation for Long-Context Adaptation
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) increasingly operate in settings that require reliable long-context understanding, such as retrieval-augmented generation and multi-document reasoning. A common strategy is to fine-tune pretrained short-context models at the target sequence length. However, we find that standard long-context adaptation can remain brittle: model accuracy depends strongly on the absolute placement of relevant evidence, exhibiting high positional variance even when controlling for task format and difficulty.
  We propose RoPE-Perturbed Self-Distillation, a training regularizer that improves positional robustness. The core idea is to form alternative "views" of the same training sequence by perturbing its RoPE indices -- effectively moving parts of the context to different positions -- and to train the model to produce consistent predictions across views via self-distillation. This encourages reliance on semantic signals instead of brittle position dependencies. Experiments on long-context adaptation of Llama-3-8B and Qwen-3-4B demonstrate consistent gains on long-context benchmarks, including up to 12.04% improvement on RULER-64K for Llama-3-8B and 2.71% on RULER-256K for Qwen-3-4B after SFT, alongside improved length extrapolation beyond the training context window.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoPE-Perturbed Self-Distillation方法，通过扰动RoPE索引创建不同视图并训练模型产生一致预测，显著提升了大语言模型的长上下文位置鲁棒性和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在长上下文理解任务中存在位置依赖性问题，模型准确性高度依赖于相关证据的绝对位置，即使控制任务格式和难度也表现出较大的位置方差，这影响了模型在实际应用中的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出RoPE扰动自蒸馏训练正则化方法：通过对训练序列的RoPE索引进行扰动，创建同一序列的不同位置视图，然后通过自蒸馏训练模型在所有视图上产生一致的预测，促使模型依赖语义信号而非脆弱的位置依赖。
AI.result: 在Llama-3-8B和Qwen-3-4B的长上下文适应实验中取得一致提升，其中Llama-3-8B在RULER-64K上提升12.04%，Qwen-3-4B在RULER-256K上提升2.71%，同时改善了超出训练窗口长度的外推能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了长上下文适应中的位置敏感性问题，通过自蒸馏机制提高了模型的位置鲁棒性，在多个基准测试中验证了其有效性，为大语言模型的长文本理解提供了可靠的解决方案。

title: Chain-of-Glimpse: Search-Guided Progressive Object-Grounded Reasoning for Video Understanding
summary: Video understanding requires identifying and reasoning over semantically discriminative visual objects across frames, yet existing object-agnostic solutions struggle to effectively handle substantial object variations over time. To address this, we introduce Chain-of-Glimpse, a search-guided progressive object-grounded reasoning framework that explicitly anchors each reasoning step to specific visual evidence regions, enabling compositional and multi-step decision-making. Formally, Chain-of-Glimpse formulates video reasoning as a step-by-step process that incrementally builds spatially grounded traces around task-relevant visual objects, thereby mitigating over-reliance on saliency-driven cues. Specifically, Chain-of-Glimpse features a search-guided controller, optimized via reinforcement learning with a format reward that significantly incentivizes grounding capability, to iteratively ground visual evidence regions and form reliable reasoning trajectories, yielding accurate and interpretable multi-step decisions. Extensive evaluations on both in domain NExTQA and out-of-domain Video-Holmes, CG-Bench Reasoning, and VRBench benchmarks demonstrate consistent performance gains, robustness and generalization of Chain-of-Glimpse across diverse video reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: Chain-of-Glimpse是一个搜索引导的渐进式对象定位推理框架，通过将推理步骤明确锚定到具体视觉证据区域，实现了可组合的多步视频理解决策。
AI.motivation: 现有与对象无关的视频理解方法无法有效处理随时间发生的显著对象变化，需要一种能够显式锚定任务相关视觉对象并实现组合推理的新方法。
AI.method: 该方法将视频推理构建为逐步过程，通过强化学习优化的搜索引导控制器迭代定位视觉证据区域，建立围绕任务相关对象的空间定位轨迹，使用格式奖励激励定位能力。
AI.result: 在NExTQA（领域内）和Video-Holmes、CG-Bench Reasoning、VRBench（领域外）等基准测试中显示出一致的性能提升，证明了方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Chain-of-Glimpse通过显式的视觉证据定位和多步推理轨迹构建，有效减轻了对显著性线索的过度依赖，在各种视频推理任务中展现出准确性和可解释性。

title: When PCOS Meets Eating Disorders: An Explainable AI Approach to Detecting the Hidden Triple Burden
summary: Women with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) face substantially elevated risks of body image distress, disordered eating, and metabolic challenges, yet existing natural language processing approaches for detecting these conditions lack transparency and cannot identify co-occurring presentations. We developed small, open-source language models to automatically detect this triple burden in social media posts with grounded explainability. We collected 1,000 PCOS-related posts from six subreddits, with two trained annotators labeling posts using guidelines operationalizing Lee et al. (2017) clinical framework. Three models (Gemma-2-2B, Qwen3-1.7B, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B) were fine-tuned using Low-Rank Adaptation to generate structured explanations with textual evidence. The best model achieved 75.3 percent exact match accuracy on 150 held-out posts, with robust comorbidity detection and strong explainability. Performance declined with diagnostic complexity, indicating their best use is for screening rather than autonomous diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一种小型开源语言模型，能够在社交媒体帖子中自动检测PCOS患者同时存在的身体形象困扰、饮食失调和代谢问题三重负担，并提供可解释的文本证据。
AI.motivation: 多囊卵巢综合征患者面临身体形象困扰、饮食失调和代谢问题的三重风险，但现有的自然语言处理方法缺乏透明度，无法识别同时出现的多重表现。
AI.method: 收集1000条来自六个子版块的PCOS相关帖子，两位训练有素的标注员根据Lee等(2017)临床框架进行标注。使用Gemma-2-2B、Qwen3-1.7B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B三个模型，通过低秩适应(Low-Rank Adaptation)微调生成结构化解释。
AI.result: 最佳模型在150条保留测试帖子上达到75.3%的精确匹配准确率，在共病检测和可解释性方面表现良好。性能随诊断复杂性下降。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在筛查方面表现良好，但不适合自主诊断，更适合作为辅助筛查工具使用。

title: The Courtroom Trial of Pixels: Robust Image Manipulation Localization via Adversarial Evidence and Reinforcement Learning Judgment
summary: Although some existing image manipulation localization (IML) methods incorporate authenticity-related supervision, this information is typically utilized merely as an auxiliary training signal to enhance the model's sensitivity to manipulation artifacts, rather than being explicitly modeled as localization evidence opposing the manipulated regions. Consequently, when manipulation traces are subtle or degraded by post-processing and noise, these methods struggle to explicitly compare manipulated and authentic evidence, resulting in unreliable predictions in ambiguous areas. To address these issues, we propose a courtroom-style adjudication framework that regards IML task as the confrontation of evidence followed by judgment. The framework comprises a prosecution stream, a defense stream, and a judge model. We first build a dual-hypothesis segmentation architecture on a shared multi-scale encoder, in which the prosecution stream asserts manipulation and the defense stream asserts authenticity. Guided by edge priors, it produces evidence for manipulated and authentic regions through cascaded multi-level fusion, bidirectional disagreement suppression, and dynamic debate refinement. We further develop a reinforcement learning judge model that performs strategic re-inference and refinement on uncertain regions, yielding a manipulated-region mask. The judge model is trained with advantage-based rewards and a soft-IoU objective, and reliability is calibrated via entropy and cross-hypothesis consistency. Experimental results show that our model achieves superior average performance compared with SOTA IML methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种法庭式审判框架，将图像篡改定位任务视为证据对抗后的判断过程，通过指控流、辩护流和法官模型的协作来实现更可靠的篡改区域检测。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像篡改定位方法将真实性信息仅作为辅助训练信号使用，缺乏对篡改和真实证据的显式比较，当篡改痕迹微弱或被后处理和噪声退化时，难以在模糊区域做出可靠预测。
AI.method: 构建基于共享多尺度编码器的双假设分割架构，包含指控篡改的指控流和主张真实的辩护流。通过边缘先验引导，采用级联多级融合、双向分歧抑制和动态辩论细化产生证据。开发强化学习法官模型，对不确定区域进行策略性重新推理和细化，使用基于优势的奖励和soft-IoU目标训练，通过熵和跨假设一致性校准可靠性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在平均性能上优于最先进的图像篡改定位方法。
AI.conclusion: 法庭式审判框架通过显式建模篡改与真实证据的对抗关系，有效提升了在模糊区域的篡改定位可靠性，为图像取证领域提供了新的解决思路。

title: APEX-MEM: Agentic Semi-Structured Memory with Temporal Reasoning for Long-Term Conversational AI
summary: Large language models still struggle with reliable long-term conversational memory: simply enlarging context windows or applying naive retrieval often introduces noise and destabilizes responses. We present APEX-MEM, a conversational memory system that combines three key innovations: (1) a property graph which uses domain-agnostic ontology to structure conversations as temporally grounded events in an entity-centric framework, (2) append-only storage that preserves the full temporal evolution of information, and (3) a multi-tool retrieval agent that understands and resolves conflicting or evolving information at query time, producing a compact and contextually relevant memory summary. This retrieval-time resolution preserves the full interaction history while suppressing irrelevant details. APEX-MEM achieves 88.88% accuracy on LOCOMO's Question Answering task and 86.2% on LongMemEval, outperforming state-of-the-art session-aware approaches and demonstrating that structured property graphs enable more temporally coherent long-term conversational reasoning.

AI.tldr: APEX-MEM是一个创新的对话记忆系统，通过属性图谱结构化、仅追加存储和多工具检索代理三大技术，显著提升了大语言模型的长期对话记忆能力和时序推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型在长期对话记忆方面存在不足，简单扩大上下文窗口或应用朴素检索方法会引入噪声并导致响应不稳定，需要更有效的长期记忆管理方案。
AI.method: 提出APEX-MEM系统，包含三个核心创新：(1)使用领域无关本体论的属性图谱，将对话结构化为以实体为中心、时序锚定的事件；(2)仅追加存储机制，保留信息的完整时序演化；(3)多工具检索代理，在查询时理解和解决冲突或演化的信息，生成紧凑且相关的记忆摘要。
AI.result: 在LOCOMO问答任务上达到88.88%准确率，在LongMemEval上达到86.2%，超越了最先进的会话感知方法，有效证明了结构化属性图谱在实现更准确时序连贯的长期对话推理方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: APEX-MEM通过结构化的属性图谱架构成功解决了长期对话记忆中的噪声和不稳定性问题，在保留完整交互历史的同时抑制了无关细节，为构建更可靠的长期对话系统提供了新的技术路径。

title: NG-GS: NeRF-Guided 3D Gaussian Splatting Segmentation
summary: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled highly efficient and photorealistic novel view synthesis. However, segmenting objects accurately in 3DGS remains challenging due to the discrete nature of Gaussian representations, which often leads to aliasing and artifacts at object boundaries. In this paper, we introduce NG-GS, a novel framework for high-quality object segmentation in 3DGS that explicitly addresses boundary discretization. Our approach begins by automatically identifying ambiguous Gaussians at object boundaries using mask variance analysis. We then apply radial basis function (RBF) interpolation to construct a spatially continuous feature field, enhanced by multi-resolution hash encoding for efficient multi-scale representation. A joint optimization strategy aligns 3DGS with a lightweight NeRF module through alignment and spatial continuity losses, ensuring smooth and consistent segmentation boundaries. Extensive experiments on NVOS, LERF-OVS, and ScanNet benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with significant gains in boundary mIoU. Code is available at https://github.com/BJTU-KD3D/NG-GS.

AI.tldr: NG-GS是一个用于3D高斯分布(3DGS)中高质量物体分割的新框架，通过解决边界离散化问题实现更好的分割效果。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯分布在新颖视图合成方面表现出色，但其离散表示特性导致物体边界存在混叠和伪影，使得准确分割物体面临挑战。
AI.method: 首先通过掩膜方差分析自动识别边界处的高斯分布，然后应用径向基函数插值构建空间连续特征场，结合多分辨率哈希编码实现高效多尺度表示。最后通过联合优化策略，利用对齐损失和空间连续性损失将3DGS与轻量级NeRF模块对齐。
AI.result: 在NVOS、LERF-OVS和ScanNet基准测试上的大量实验表明，该方法达到了最先进的性能，在边界mIoU指标上有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: NG-GS成功解决了3DGS中物体边界的离散化问题，通过构建连续特征场和联合优化策略，实现了高质量且一致的物体分割边界。

title: The Cost of Language: Centroid Erasure Exposes and Exploits Modal Competition in Multimodal Language Models
summary: Multimodal language models systematically underperform on visual perception tasks, yet the structure underlying this failure remains poorly understood. We propose centroid replacement, collapsing each token to its nearest K-means centroid, as a controlled probe for modal dependence. Across seven models spanning three architecture families, erasing text centroid structure costs 4$\times$ more accuracy than erasing visual centroid structure, exposing a universal imbalance where language representations overshadow vision even on tasks that demand visual reasoning. We exploit this asymmetry through text centroid contrastive decoding, recovering up to +16.9% accuracy on individual tasks by contrastively decoding against a text-centroid-erased reference. This intervention varies meaningfully with training approaches: standard fine-tuned models show larger gains (+5.6% on average) than preference-optimized models (+1.5% on average). Our findings suggest that modal competition is structurally localized, correctable at inference time without retraining, and quantifiable as a diagnostic signal to guide future multimodal training.

AI.tldr: 多模态语言模型在视觉感知任务上表现不佳，研究发现语言表征过度主导视觉信息，通过对比解码方法可在推理时提升最高16.9%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 多模态语言模型在视觉感知任务上系统性表现不佳，但其失败机制尚不清楚。需要理解语言和视觉模态之间的相互作用关系，以找到改进模型性能的方法。
AI.method: 提出质心替换方法作为模态依赖性的受控探针，将每个标记折叠到最近的K-means质心。通过擦除文本和视觉质心结构来测试模型表现，并开发文本质心对比解码技术。
AI.result: 擦除文本质心结构比擦除视觉质心结构造成4倍的准确率损失，揭示了语言表征普遍主导视觉信息的不平衡。通过文本质心对比解码可提升最高16.9%的准确率，标准微调模型平均提升5.6%，偏好优化模型平均提升1.5%。
AI.conclusion: 模态竞争在结构上是局部的，可在推理时纠正而无需重新训练，并可作为诊断信号指导未来的多模态训练。

title: G-MIXER: Geodesic Mixup-based Implicit Semantic Expansion and Explicit Semantic Re-ranking for Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) aims to retrieve target images by integrating a reference image with a corresponding modification text. CIR requires jointly considering the explicit semantics specified in the query and the implicit semantics embedded within its bi-modal composition. Recent training-free Zero-Shot CIR (ZS-CIR) methods leverage Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to generate detailed target descriptions, converting the implicit information into explicit textual expressions. However, these methods rely heavily on the textual modality and fail to capture the fuzzy retrieval nature that requires considering diverse combinations of candidates. This leads to reduced diversity and accuracy in retrieval results. To address this limitation, we propose a novel training-free method, Geodesic Mixup-based Implicit semantic eXpansion and Explicit semantic Re-ranking for ZS-CIR (G-MIXER). G-MIXER constructs composed query features that reflect the implicit semantics of reference image-text pairs through geodesic mixup over a range of mixup ratios, and builds a diverse candidate set. The generated candidates are then re-ranked using explicit semantics derived from MLLMs, improving both retrieval diversity and accuracy. Our proposed G-MIXER achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple ZS-CIR benchmarks, effectively handling both implicit and explicit semantics without additional training. Our code will be available at https://github.com/maya0395/gmixer.

AI.tldr: G-MIXER是一种无需训练的零样本组合图像检索方法，通过测地线混合技术扩展隐式语义并利用MLLM重排序，提高了检索的多样性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本组合图像检索方法过度依赖文本模态，无法捕捉需要考虑候选图像多样组合的模糊检索特性，导致检索结果的多样性和准确性降低。
AI.method: G-MIXER首先通过测地线混合技术在一系列混合比例上构建反映参考图像-文本对隐式语义的组合查询特征，建立多样化的候选集合；然后利用多模态大语言模型生成的显式语义对候选集合进行重新排序。
AI.result: G-MIXER在多个零样本组合图像检索基准测试中达到了最先进的性能，能够在不需要额外训练的情况下有效处理隐式和显式语义。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过隐式语义扩展和显式语义重排序的双重策略，成功地解决了现有方法在检索多样性和准确性方面的限制，为零样本组合图像检索提供了一个有效的解决方案。

title: BiCon-Gate: Consistency-Gated De-colloquialisation for Dialogue Fact-Checking
summary: Automated fact-checking in dialogue involves multi-turn conversations where colloquial language is frequent yet understudied. To address this gap, we propose a conservative rewrite candidate for each response claim via staged de-colloquialisation, combining lightweight surface normalisation with scoped in-claim coreference resolution. We then introduce BiCon-Gate, a semantics-aware consistency gate that selects the rewrite candidate only when it is semantically supported by the dialogue context, otherwise falling back to the original claim. This gated selection stabilises downstream fact-checking and yields gains in both evidence retrieval and fact verification. On the DialFact benchmark, our approach improves retrieval and verification, with particularly strong gains on SUPPORTS, and outperforms competitive baselines, including a decoder-based one-shot LLM rewrite that attempts to perform all de-colloquialisation steps in a single pass.

AI.tldr: 通过保守性重写和语义感知门控机制，提升了对话中自动事实验证的效果，在证据检索和事实验证任务上均取得显著改进。
AI.motivation: 对话中的自动事实验证涉及多轮对话，其中口语化表达频繁存在且研究不足。现有的口语化处理方法在对话场景下效果有限，影响了事实验证的准确性。
AI.method: 提出分阶段去口语化方法：首先对每个回应主张生成保守性重写候选，结合轻量级表面规范化和域内核心消解；然后引入BiCon-Gate语义感知一致性门控，仅在重写候选被对话上下文语义支持时才选择重写结果，否则保留原始主张。
AI.result: 在DialFact基准测试上，该方法在证据检索和事实验证方面均有提升，尤其在SUPPORTS类别上表现突出，超越包括基于解码器的一步式LLM重写基线在内的竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: 保守性重写配合语义感知门控机制能够有效稳定下游事实验证性能，为处理对话中的口语化表达提供了新的解决思路。

title: MS-SSE-Net: A Multi-Scale Spatial Squeeze-and-Excitation Network for Structural Damage Detection in Civil and Geotechnical Engineering
summary: Structural damage detection is essential for maintaining the safety and reliability of civil infrastructure. However, accurately identifying different types of structural damage from images remains challenging due to variations in damage patterns and environmental conditions. To address these challenges, this paper proposes MS-SSE-Net, a novel deep learning (DL) framework for structural damage classification. The proposed model is built upon the DenseNet201 backbone and integrates novel multi-scale feature extraction with channel and spatial attention mechanisms (MS-SSE-Net). Specifically, parallel depthwise convolutions capture both local and contextual features, while squeeze-and-excitation style channel attention and spatial attention emphasize informative regions and suppress irrelevant noise. The refined features are then processed through global average pooling and a fully connected classification layer to generate the final predictions. Experiments are conducted on the StructDamage dataset containing multiple structural damage categories. The proposed MS-SSE-Net demonstrates superior performance compared with the baseline DenseNet201 and other comparative approaches. Specifically, the proposed method achieves 99.31% precision, 99.25% recall, 99.27% F1-score, and 99.26% accuracy, outperforming the baseline model which achieved 98.62% precision, 98.53% recall, 98.58% F1-score, and 98.53% accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MS-SSE-Net的深度学习框架，用于结构损伤分类，在准确率上达到了99.26%，相比于基线模型有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 由于损伤模式变化多样和环境条件的影响，从图像中准确识别不同类型的结构损伤仍然具有挑战性，这影响了土木基础设施的安全性和可靠性维护。
AI.method: 基于DenseNet201骨干网络，集成了新颖的多尺度特征提取与通道和空间注意力机制。具体采用并行深度可分离卷积提取局部和上下文特征，结合挤压激励风格的通道注意力和空间注意力来突出信息丰富区域并抑制噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在StructDamage数据集上的实验表明，MS-SSE-Net达到了99.31%精确度、99.25%召回率、99.27% F1分数和99.26%准确率，显著优于基线DenseNet201模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: MS-SSE-Net通过多尺度特征提取和注意力机制的有效结合，为结构损伤检测提供了一种高性能的解决方案，有助于提升土木基础设施的安全监测能力。

title: Generating Concept Lexicalizations via Dictionary-Based Cross-Lingual Sense Projection
comment: To be published in the proceedings of Canadian AI 2026
summary: We study the task of automatically expanding WordNet-style lexical resources to new languages through sense generation. We generate senses by associating target-language lemmas with existing lexical concepts via semantic projection. Given a sense-tagged English corpus and its translation, our method projects English synsets onto aligned target-language tokens and assigns the corresponding lemmas to those synsets. To generate these alignments and ensure their quality, we augment a pre-trained base aligner with a bilingual dictionary, which is also used to filter out incorrect sense projections. We evaluate the method on multiple languages, comparing it to prior methods, as well as dictionary-based and large language model baselines. Results show that the proposed project-and-filter strategy improves precision while remaining interpretable and requiring few external resources. We plan to make our code, documentation, and generated sense inventories accessible.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种通过语义投影自动扩展WordNet风格词汇资源到新语言的方法，该方法通过项目-过滤策略提高了精度，同时保持了可解释性且需要少量外部资源。
AI.motivation: 现有的WordNet风格词汇资源扩展到新语言需要大量人工标注，成本高昂且效率低下。研究人员希望开发一种自动化方法，能够在保证准确性的同时，高效地将英语词汇语义资源扩展到其他语言。
AI.method: 采用语义投影的方法生成词汇意义：首先利用预训练的对齐模型，结合双语词典增强，将英语同义词集投影到对齐的目标语词汇上；然后使用双语词典过滤掉不正确的意义投影，最终将相应的词形分配给这些同义词集。
AI.result: 在多种语言上的实验结果表明，所提出的项目-过滤策略相比之前的方法以及基于词典和大语言模型的基线方法，能够显著提高精度，同时具有良好的可解释性和资源需求少的特点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了自动化扩展词汇语义资源的目标，在保持高精度的同时减少了对外部资源的依赖，为跨语言词汇语义资源的构建提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Data Synthesis Improves 3D Myotube Instance Segmentation
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, submitted to BMT (VDE) 2026 Conference
summary: Myotubes are multinucleated muscle fibers serving as key model systems for studying muscle physiology, disease mechanisms, and drug responses. Mechanistic studies and drug screening thereby rely on quantitative morphological readouts such as diameter, length, and branching degree, which in turn require precise three-dimensional instance segmentation. Yet established pretrained biomedical segmentation models fail to generalize to this domain due to the absence of large annotated myotube datasets. We introduce a geometry-driven synthesis pipeline that models individual myotubes via polynomial centerlines, locally varying radii, branching structures, and ellipsoidal end caps derived from real microscopy observations. Synthetic volumes are rendered with realistic noise, optical artifacts, and CycleGAN-based Domain Adaptation (DA). A compact 3D U-Net with self-supervised encoder pretraining, trained exclusively on synthetic data, achieves a mean IPQ of 0.22 on real data, significantly outperforming three established zero-shot segmentation models, demonstrating that biophysics-driven synthesis enables effective instance segmentation in annotation-scarce biomedical domains.

AI.tldr: 基于几何驱动的肌管综合数据训练轻量级3D U-Net，实现了在真实显微图像中高效的实例分割，显著优于现有零样本模型。
AI.motivation: 肌管作为研究肌肉生理学、疾病机制和药物反应的关键模型系统，需要精确的三维实例分割来获得直径、长度和分支程度等定量形态学读出数据。然而，由于缺乏大规模标注的肌管数据集，现有的预训练生物医学分割模型难以推广到这一领域。
AI.method: 提出了一种几何驱动的综合合成管线：通过多项式中心线、局部变化半径、分支结构和从真实显微镜观察中推导的椭球形端盖来建模个体肌管；使用CycleGAN域自适应技术渲染具有真实噪声和光学伪影的综合体积；采用紧凑型3D U-Net架构，通过自监督编码器预训练，仅在合成数据上训练。
AI.result: 在真实数据上实现了0.22的平均IPQ（实例分割质量指标），显著优于三个已确立的零样本分割模型，证明了生物物理驱动的合成方法能够在标注稀缺的生物医学领域中实现有效的实例分割。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，基于真实生物物理特性的合成数据生成策略可以有效解决生物医学影像分析中的标注稀缺问题，为肌管及其他类似结构的定量分析提供了可行的解决方案。

title: The Autocorrelation Blind Spot: Why 42% of Turn-Level Findings in LLM Conversation Analysis May Be Spurious
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables, 1 algorithm. Code and synthetic demonstration data: https://github.com/ferdinandschessl-boop/autocorrelation-correction
summary: Turn-level metrics are widely used to evaluate properties of multi-turn human-LLM conversations, from safety and sycophancy to dialogue quality. However, consecutive turns within a conversation are not statistically independent -- a fact that virtually all current evaluation pipelines fail to correct for in their statistical inference. We systematically characterize the autocorrelation structure of 66 turn-level metrics across 202 multi-turn conversations (11,639 turn pairs, 5 German-speaking users, 4 LLM platforms) and demonstrate that naive pooled analysis produces severely inflated significance estimates: 42% of associations that appear significant under standard pooled testing fail to survive cluster-robust correction. The inflation varies substantially across categories rather than scaling linearly with autocorrelation: three memoryless families (embedding velocity, directional, differential) aggregate to 14%, while the seven non-memoryless families (thermo-cycle, frame distance, lexical/structural, rolling windows, cumulative, interaction, timestamp) aggregate to 33%, with individual category rates ranging from 0% to 100% depending on per-family effect size. We present a two-stage correction framework combining Chelton (1983) effective degrees of freedom with conversation-level block bootstrap, and validate it on a pre-registered hold-out split where cluster-robust metrics replicate at 57% versus 30% for pooled-only metrics. We provide concrete design principles, a publication checklist, and open-source code for the correction pipeline. A survey of ~30 recent papers at major NLP and AI venues that compute turn-level statistics in LLM evaluations finds that only 4 address temporal dependence at all, and 26 do not correct for it.

AI.tldr: 研究发现多轮人机对话评估中忽视轮次间自相关性会导致统计显著性严重膨胀，提出了两阶段校正框架
AI.motivation: 现有的多轮对话评估方法普遍将连续轮次视为独立样本进行统计推断，但实际上对话轮次之间存在显著的自相关性，这导致大量虚假的统计显著性结果
AI.method: 系统性分析66个轮级指标在202次多轮对话中的自相关结构，提出两阶段校正框架：结合Chelton(1983)自由度校正和对话级块重抽样方法
AI.result: 标准测试中42%的显著相关性在校正后不再显著；无记忆类指标虚假率为14%，有记忆类指标达33%；校正后指标的可重复性从30%提升至57%
AI.conclusion: 论文提供了具体设计原则、发布清单和开源代码，呼吁LLM评估研究必须校正时间依赖性，以避免产生误导性结论

title: HAMSA: Scanning-Free Vision State Space Models via SpectralPulseNet
summary: Vision State Space Models (SSMs) like Vim, VMamba, and SiMBA rely on complex scanning strategies to adapt sequential SSMs to process 2D images, introducing computational overhead and architectural complexity. We propose HAMSA, a scanning-free SSM operating directly in the spectral domain. HAMSA introduces three key innovations: (1) simplified kernel parameterization-a single Gaussian-initialized complex kernel replacing traditional (A, B, C) matrices, eliminating discretization instabilities; (2) SpectralPulseNet (SPN)-an input-dependent frequency gating mechanism enabling adaptive spectral modulation; and (3) Spectral Adaptive Gating Unit (SAGU)-magnitude-based gating for stable gradient flow in the frequency domain. By leveraging FFT-based convolution, HAMSA eliminates sequential scanning while achieving O(L log L) complexity with superior simplicity and efficiency. On ImageNet-1K, HAMSA reaches 85.7% top-1 accuracy (state-of-the-art among SSMs), with 2.2 X faster inference than transformers (4.2ms vs 9.2ms for DeiT-S) and 1.4-1.9X speedup over scanning-based SSMs, while using less memory (2.1GB vs 3.2-4.5GB) and energy (12.5J vs 18-25J). HAMSA demonstrates strong generalization across transfer learning and dense prediction tasks.

AI.tldr: HAMSA是一种无需扫描的视觉状态空间模型，通过在频谱域直接操作，简化了参数化并引入了自适应频谱调制机制，在ImageNet-1K上达到85.7%的准确率，同时实现了更快的推理速度和更低的内存/能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉状态空间模型（如Vim、VMamba、SiMBA）依赖复杂的扫描策略来处理2D图像，导致计算开销增大和架构复杂度高，需要一种更简单高效的替代方案。
AI.method: HAMSA在频谱域直接操作，包含三个创新：(1)简化的核参数化-使用单个高斯初始化的复数核替代传统的(A,B,C)矩阵；(2)频谱脉冲网(SPN)-输入相关的频率门控机制；(3)频谱自适应门控单元(SAGU)-基于幅度的门控。利用基于FFT的卷积实现O(L log L)复杂度。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上达到85.7% top-1准确率（SSM中最优），推理速度比transformers快2.2倍（4.2ms vs 9.2ms），比基于扫描的SSM快1.4-1.9倍，内存使用更少（2.1GB vs 3.2-4.5GB），能耗更低（12.5J vs 18-25J）。
AI.conclusion: HAMSA通过消除顺序扫描并在频谱域直接操作，实现了更简单高效的架构，在准确率、速度、内存和能耗方面均优于现有方法，在迁移学习和密集预测任务中也表现出良好的泛化能力。

title: Three-Phase Transformer
summary: We present Three-Phase Transformer (3PT), a residual-stream structural prior for decoder-only Transformers on a standard SwiGLU + RMSNorm + RoPE + GQA backbone. The hidden vector is partitioned into N equally-sized cyclic channels, each maintained by phase-respecting ops: a per-channel RMSNorm, a 2D Givens rotation between attention and FFN that rotates each channel by theta + i*(2*pi/N), and a head-count constraint aligning GQA heads with the partition. The architecture is a self-stabilizing equilibrium between scrambling and re-imposition, not a bolted-on module. The partition carves out a one-dimensional DC subspace orthogonal to the channels, into which we inject a fixed Gabriel's horn profile r(p) = 1/(p+1) as an absolute-position side-channel composing orthogonally with RoPE's relative-position rotation. The canonical N=3 borrows its metaphor from balanced three-phase AC, where three sinusoids 120 degrees apart sum to zero with no anti-correlated pair. At 123M parameters on WikiText-103, 3PT achieves -7.20% perplexity (-2.62% bits-per-byte) over a matched RoPE-Only baseline at +1,536 parameters (0.00124% of total), with 1.93x step-count convergence speedup (1.64x wall-clock). N behaves as a parameter-sharing knob rather than a unique optimum: at 5.5M an N-sweep over {1,2,3,4,6,8,12} is near-monotone with N=1 winning; at 123M a three-seed sweep finds N=3 and N=1 statistically indistinguishable. The load-bearing mechanism is the channel-partitioned residual stream, per-block rotation, per-phase normalization, and horn DC injection. We characterize (a) self-stabilization of the geometry without explicit enforcement, a novel instance of the conservation-law framework for neural networks; (b) a U-shaped depth profile of rotation-angle drift at 12 layers; (c) orthogonal composition with RoPE, attention, and FFN.

AI.tldr: Three-Phase Transformer (3PT) 是一种基于三相交流电原理的新颖Transformer结构，通过将隐藏向量划分为多个循环通道并引入相位保持操作，实现了更好的收敛速度和性能开销比。
AI.motivation: 传统的Transformer模型缺乏有效的结构化先验，作者提出了一种类似三相交流电的平衡机制，通过通道划分和相位旋转来实现信息的稳定传播，同时与现有的相对位置编码形成正交补充。
AI.method: 将隐藏向量划分为N个等大小的循环通道，每个通道进行独立的RMS归一化、2D Givens旋转和注意力头约束；引入Gabriel's horn轮廓作为绝对位置边通道；实现为自稳定平衡结构而非外接模块。
AI.result: 在123M参数规模的WikiText-103实验中，3PT相比基线降低7.20%困惑度，仅需增加0.00124%参数，收敛速度提升1.93倍；N值的优化呈现尺度依赖特性。
AI.conclusion: 通道分割的残差流、按块旋转、按相位归一化和DC注入是关键机制；实现了无需显式强制的几何自稳定性，展现了神经网络的守恒律框架新实例。

title: Find the Differences: Differential Morphing Attack Detection vs Face Recognition
summary: Morphing is a challenge to face recognition (FR) for which several morphing attack detection solutions have been proposed. We argue that face recognition and differential morphing attack detection (D-MAD) in principle perform very similar tasks, which we support by comparing an FR system with two existing D-MAD approaches. We also show that currently used decision thresholds inherently lead to FR systems being vulnerable to morphing attacks and that this explains the tradeoff between performance on normal images and vulnerability to morphing attacks. We propose using FR systems that are already in place for morphing detection and introduce a new evaluation threshold that guarantees an upper limit to the vulnerability to morphing attacks - even of unknown types.

AI.tldr: 本文提出人脸识别系统本质上可用于检测变形攻击，并引入新的评估阈值来限制系统对变形攻击的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 变形攻击是人脸识别面临的重大挑战，当前解决方案存在性能与安全性权衡问题。作者认为人脸识别和差分变形攻击检测执行的任务本质相似，这为改进检测方法提供了新思路。
AI.method: 通过比较人脸识别系统与两种现有差分变形攻击检测方法，论证二者的相似性。同时分析当前决策阈值导致系统脆弱性的原因，并提出利用现有FR系统进行变形检测，引入新的评估阈值方法。
AI.result: 研究证明了FR系统与D-MAD任务的相似性，揭示了当前阈值设定导致脆弱性的机制，并提出的新阈值方法能够保证对变形攻击（包括未知类型）的脆弱性上限。
AI.conclusion: 通过重新审视人脸识别与变形攻击检测的关系，可以有效提升系统安全性。利用现有FR基础设施配合新阈值策略，是一种实用且有效的变形攻击防护方法。

title: Hierarchical vs. Flat Iteration in Shared-Weight Transformers
summary: We present an empirical study of whether hierarchically structured, shared-weight recurrence can match the representational quality of independent-layer stacking in a Transformer-based language model. HRM-LM replaces L independent Transformer layers with a two-speed recurrent pair: a Fast module operating at every step for local refinement, and a Slow module operating every T steps for global compression. This recurrent hierarchy is unrolled for M = N x T steps with shared parameters. The central and most robust finding, supported by a parameter-matched Universal Transformer ablation (UniTF, 1.2B) across five independent runs, is a sharp empirical gap between the two approaches.

AI.tldr: HRM-LM（层次递归语言模型）将Transformer的独立层替换为双速递归结构，对比实验显示其表示质量显著低于独立层堆叠的UniversalTransformer。
AI.motivation: 为了探索是否能够通过共享权重的层次递归结构来匹配传统Transformer独立层堆叠的表示能力，从而减少参数量并提高计算效率。
AI.method: 提出HRM-LM模型，使用Fast模块（每步运行）和Slow模块（每T步运行）的两速递归结构，通过权重共享展开M=N×T步，并与参数匹配的UniversalTransformer进行对比实验。
AI.result: 在五次独立运行的实验中，HRM-LM的表现与UniversalTransformer存在明显的性能差距，证明共享权重的递归结构无法匹配独立层堆叠的表示质量。
AI.conclusion: 层次化的共享权重递归结构虽然在参数效率上有优势，但在语言模型任务中难以达到独立层堆叠Transformer的表示水平，这为模型架构设计提供了重要的实证参考。

title: Efficient closed-form approaches for pose estimation using Sylvester forms
summary: Solving non-linear least-squares problem for pose estimation (rotation and translation) is often a time consuming yet fundamental problem in several real-time computer vision applications. With an adequate rotation parametrization, the optimization problem can be reduced to the solution of a~system of polynomial equations and solved in closed form. Recent advances in efficient closed form solvers utilizing resultant matrices have shown a promising research direction to decrease the computation time while preserving the estimation accuracy. In this paper, we propose a new class of resultant-based solvers that exploit Sylvester forms to further reduce the complexity of the resolution. We demonstrate that our proposed methods are numerically as accurate as the state-of-the-art solvers, and outperform them in terms of computational time. We show that this approach can be applied for pose estimation in two different types of problems: estimating a pose from 3D to 3D correspondences, and estimating a pose from 3D points to 2D points correspondences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Sylvester形式的结果矩阵求解器，用于加速非线性最小二乘姿态估计问题，在保持精度的同时显著提升了计算效率。
AI.motivation: 实时计算机视觉应用中，非线性最小二乘姿态估计（旋转和平移）是一个耗时但基础的问题。现有的封闭形式求解器虽然能降低计算时间，但仍需进一步优化以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的基于结果矩阵的求解器类方法，利用Sylvester形式来降低求解复杂度。该方法通过适当的旋转参数化，将优化问题转化为多项式方程组系统求解。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在数值精度上与现有最先进求解器相当，但在计算时间上表现更优。成功应用于3D到3D对应和3D到2D对应两种不同类型的姿态估计问题。
AI.conclusion: 基于Sylvester形式的结果矩阵求解器为实时姿态估计提供了一个高效且准确的解决方案，在保持精度的同时显著降低了计算复杂度，具有良好的应用前景。

title: MARCA: A Checklist-Based Benchmark for Multilingual Web Search
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as sources of information, yet their reliability depends on the ability to search the web, select relevant evidence, and synthesize complete answers. While recent benchmarks evaluate web-browsing and agentic tool use, multilingual settings, and Portuguese in particular, remain underexplored. We present \textsc{MARCA}, a bilingual (English and Portuguese) benchmark for evaluating LLMs on web-based information seeking. \textsc{MARCA} consists of 52 manually authored multi-entity questions, paired with manually validated checklist-style rubrics that explicitly measure answer completeness and correctness. We evaluate 14 models under two interaction settings: a Basic framework with direct web search and scraping, and an Orchestrator framework that enables task decomposition via delegated subagents. To capture stochasticity, each question is executed multiple times and performance is reported with run-level uncertainty. Across models, we observe large performance differences, find that orchestration often improves coverage, and identify substantial variability in how models transfer from English to Portuguese. The benchmark is available at https://github.com/maritaca-ai/MARCA

AI.tldr: MARCA是一个用于评估大语言模型网络信息搜索能力的英葡双语基准测试，包含52个复杂问题，通过两种交互框架测试14个模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型评估基准主要集中在英语环境，多语言特别是葡萄牙语的web信息搜索能力评估严重不足，需要专门的双语基准来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建包含52个手动编写的多实体问题数据集，配套人工验证的清单式评分标准，通过直接网络搜索和编排代理两种框架评估模型，多次执行以捕获随机性。
