Specifically, it progressively refines visual evidence from coarse-grained document retrieval to fine-grained image selection and active region cropping, allowing the model to suppress irrelevant content and attend to information-dense regions. For effective end-to-end training, we introduce a dense multi-reward scheme that provides task-aware supervision for each action. Based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), UniDoc-RL aligns agent behavior with multiple objectives without relying on a separate value network. To support this training paradigm, we curate a comprehensive dataset of high-quality reasoning trajectories with fine-grained action annotations. Experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that UniDoc-RL consistently surpasses state-of-the-art baselines, yielding up to 17.7% gains over prior RL-based methods.

AI.tldr: UniDoc-RL是一个统一的强化学习框架，通过分层决策过程实现视觉信息获取，从粗粒度文档检索逐步细化到细粒度图像选择和区域裁剪，在多模态推理任务上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉RAG系统依赖于通用检索信号，忽视了复杂推理所需的细粒度视觉语义信息，导致在精细视觉理解任务中表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出将视觉信息获取公式化为分层动作空间的序列决策问题，通过强化学习联合执行检索、重排序、主动视觉感知和推理；引入密集多奖励机制为每个动作提供任务感知监督；基于GRPO算法对齐多目标行为；构建包含细粒度动作标注的高质量推理轨迹数据集。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中，UniDoc-RL持续超越最先进基线方法，相比之前的RL方法获得高达17.7%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一强化学习框架和分层决策机制，UniDoc-RL有效解决了视觉RAG系统中细粒度语义理解不足的问题，为复杂视觉推理任务提供了新的解决方案。

title: Exploring and Testing Skill-Based Behavioral Profile Annotation: Human Operability and LLM Feasibility under Schema-Guided Execution
summary: Behavioral Profile (BP) annotation is difficult to automate because it requires simultaneous coding across multiple linguistic dimensions. We treat BP annotation as a bundle of annotation skills rather than a single task and evaluate LLM-assisted BP annotation from this perspective. Using 3,134 concordance lines of 30 Chinese metaphorical color-term derivatives and a 14-feature BP schema, we implement a skill-file-driven pipeline in which each feature is externally defined through schema files, decision rules, and examples. Two human annotators completed a two-round schema-only protocol on a 300-instance validation subset, enabling BP skills to be classified as directly operable, recoverable under focused re-annotation, or structurally underspecified. GPT-5.4 and three locally deployable open-source models were then evaluated under the same setup. Results show that BP annotation is highly heterogeneous at the skill level: 5 skills are directly operable, 4 are recoverable after focused re-annotation, and 5 remain structurally underspecified. GPT-5.4 executes the retained skills with substantial reliability (accuracy = 0.678, \k{appa} = 0.665, weighted F1 = 0.695), but this feasibility is selective rather than global. Human and GPT difficulty profiles are strongly aligned at the skill level (r = 0.881), but not at the instance level (r = 0.016) or lexical-item level (r = -0.142), a pattern we describe as shared taxonomy, independent execution. Pairwise agreement further suggests that GPT is better understood as an independent third skill voice than as a direct human substitute. Open-source failures are concentrated in schema-to-skill execution problems. These findings suggest that automatic annotation should be evaluated in terms of skill feasibility rather than task-level automation.

AI.tldr: 本研究将行为特征标注(BP)视为一组标注技能而非单一任务，通过技能文件驱动Pipeline评估LLM在多维度语言标注中的表现，发现GPT-5.4在部分技能上表现可靠，但存在技能选择性可行性特征。
AI.motivation: 行为特征标注因其需要同时在多个语言维度上进行编码而难以自动化。传统方法将BP标注视为单一任务，但这种方法无法准确反映LLM在不同标注技能上的异构表现。
AI.method: 使用3134个中文隐喻色彩词派生语料和14个特征的BP架构，实现技能文件驱动的流程，每个特征通过架构文件、决策规则和例示外部定义。通过两名标注员完成两轮验证，将BP技能分类为可直接操作、可通过重标注恢复和结构不足三类。评估GPT-5.4和三个开源模型在同一设置下的表现。
AI.result: 结果显示BP标注在技能层面高度异构：5个技能可直接操作，4个可通过重点重标注恢复，5个仍结构不足。GPT-5.4在保留技能上执行可靠性较高，但这种可行性是选择性的而非全局的。人类与GPT在技能层面困难剖面对齐度高，但在实例和词条层面不相关。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明自动标注应从技能可行性而非任务层面自动化角度评估，GPT更适合理解为独立的第三个技能声音而非人类直接替代品。为多维度语言标注的自动化提供了新的评估框架和实践指导。

title: Flow of Truth: Proactive Temporal Forensics for Image-to-Video Generation
summary: The rapid rise of image-to-video (I2V) generation enables realistic videos to be created from a single image but also brings new forensic demands. Unlike static images, I2V content evolves over time, requiring forensics to move beyond 2D pixel-level tampering localization toward tracing how pixels flow and transform throughout the video. As frames progress, embedded traces drift and deform, making traditional spatial forensics ineffective. To address this unexplored dimension, we present **Flow of Truth**, the first proactive framework focusing on temporal forensics in I2V generation. A key challenge lies in discovering a forensic signature that can evolve consistently with the generation process, which is inherently a creative transformation rather than a deterministic reconstruction. Despite this intrinsic difficulty, we innovatively redefine video generation as *the motion of pixels through time rather than the synthesis of frames*. Building on this view, we propose a learnable forensic template that follows pixel motion and a template-guided flow module that decouples motion from image content, enabling robust temporal tracing. Experiments show that Flow of Truth generalizes across commercial and open-source I2V models, substantially improving temporal forensics performance.

AI.tldr: Flow of Truth是首个针对图像转视频(I2V)生成的时间取证框架，通过追踪像素运动轨迹来检测视频内容真实性，解决了传统二维取证方法无法处理视频时序演化的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着I2V技术的快速发展，从单张图像生成逼真视频变得越来越容易，但这也带来了新的取证挑战。传统图像取证方法无法处理视频中像素随时间演化的特性，因为视频中的伪造痕迹会随着帧的推进而漂移和变形。
AI.method: 将视频生成重新定义为像素随时间运动而非帧的合成，提出可学习的取证模板来追踪像素运动，并通过模板引导的流模块将运动与图像内容分离，实现鲁棒的时间追踪。
AI.result: 实验表明Flow of Truth框架能够泛化到商业和开源的I2V模型上，显著提升了时间取证性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究开创性地解决了I2V生成的时间取证问题，为数字视频内容的真实性验证提供了新的技术路径，对维护数字媒体安全具有重要意义。

title: ClimateCause: Complex and Implicit Causal Structures in Climate Reports
summary: Understanding climate change requires reasoning over complex causal networks. Yet, existing causal discovery datasets predominantly capture explicit, direct causal relations. We introduce ClimateCause, a manually expert-annotated dataset of higher-order causal structures from science-for-policy climate reports, including implicit and nested causality. Cause-effect expressions are normalized and disentangled into individual causal relations to facilitate graph construction, with unique annotations for cause-effect correlation, relation type, and spatiotemporal context. We further demonstrate ClimateCause's value for quantifying readability based on the semantic complexity of causal graphs underlying a statement. Finally, large language model benchmarking on correlation inference and causal chain reasoning highlights the latter as a key challenge.

AI.tldr: ClimateCause是一个面向气候变化的专家标注因果数据集，包含高阶因果结构，特别关注隐式和嵌套因果关系，可用于构建因果图并评估语句可读性。
AI.motivation: 气候变化理解需要对复杂因果网络进行推理，但现有的因果发现数据集主要捕获显式的直接因果关系，无法满足气候科学的复杂需求。
AI.method: 从科学政策气候报告中手动专家标注，创建包含隐式和嵌套因果关系的高阶因果结构数据集；将因果表达式标准化并分解为独立因果关系，标注因果相关性、关系类型和时空上下文；用于构建因果图和量化可读性。
AI.result: 成功构建了ClimateCause数据集，实现了基于因果图语义复杂度的可读性量化；大语言模型基准测试显示因果链推理是主要挑战。
AI.conclusion: ClimateCause填补了气候变化领域复杂因果结构数据集的空白，为因果发现、可读性分析和AI模型评估提供了重要资源，特别突出了因果链推理的挑战性。

title: Quality-Aware Calibration for AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild
comment: Accepted at the APAI Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Significant progress has been made in detecting synthetic images, however most existing approaches operate on a single image instance and overlook a key characteristic of real-world dissemination: as viral images circulate on the web, multiple near-duplicate versions appear and lose quality due to repeated operations like recompression, resizing and cropping. As a consequence, the same image may yield inconsistent forensic predictions based on which version has been analyzed. In this work, to address this issue we propose QuAD (Quality-Aware calibration with near-Duplicates) a novel framework that makes decisions based on all available near-duplicates of the same image. Given a query, we retrieve its online near-duplicates and feed them to a detector: the resulting scores are then aggregated based on the estimated quality of the corresponding instance. By doing so, we take advantage of all pieces of information while accounting for the reduced reliability of images impaired by multiple processing steps. To support large-scale evaluation, we introduce two datasets: AncesTree, an in-lab dataset of 136k images organized in stochastic degradation trees that simulate online reposting dynamics, and ReWIND, a real-world dataset of nearly 10k near-duplicate images collected from viral web content. Experiments on several state-of-the-art detectors show that our quality-aware fusion improves their performance consistently, with an average gain of around 8% in terms of balanced accuracy compared to plain average. Our results highlight the importance of jointly processing all the images available online to achieve reliable detection of AI-generated content in real-world applications. Code and data are publicly available at https://grip-unina.github.io/QuAD/

AI.tldr: QuAD是一个质量感知的近重复图像校准框架，通过聚合同一图像的多个在线版本来提高AI生成内容检测的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法只分析单个图像实例，但网络传播中同一图像会因重复处理（压缩、裁剪等）产生多个质量不同的近重复版本，导致检测结果不一致，影响实际应用的可靠性。
AI.method: QuAD框架首先检索图像的在线近重复版本，使用检测器对每个版本进行评分，然后基于估计的图像质量进行加权聚合，最终做出综合判断。
AI.result: 在构建的AncesTree（13.6万张实验室图像）和ReWIND（近1万张真实网络图像）数据集上，QuAD相比简单平均方法获得了约8%的平衡准确率提升，对多种检测器均有改进。
AI.conclusion: 联合处理网络上的所有可用图像版本是实现可靠AI生成内容检测的关键，质量感知的融合策略能有效提升实际应用中的检测性能。

title: Schema Key Wording as an Instruction Channel in Structured Generation under Constrained Decoding
summary: Constrained decoding has been widely adopted for structured generation with large language models (LLMs), ensuring that outputs satisfy predefined formats such as JSON and XML. However, existing approaches largely treat schemas as purely structural constraints and overlook the possibility that their linguistic formulation may affect model behavior. In this work, we study how instruction placement influences model performance in structured generation and show that merely changing the wording of schema keys, without modifying the prompt or model parameters, can significantly alter model performance under constrained decoding. Based on this observation, we propose to reinterpret structured generation as a multi-channel instruction problem, where instructions can be conveyed explicitly through prompts and implicitly through schema keys during decoding. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to systematically study how schema key formulation acts as an implicit instruction channel and affects model performance under constrained decoding. Experiments on multiple mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that different model families exhibit distinct sensitivities to these instruction channels: Qwen models consistently benefit from schema-level instructions, while LLaMA models rely more heavily on prompt-level guidance. We further observe non-additive interaction effects between instruction channels, showing that combining multiple channels does not always lead to further improvement. These findings suggest that schema design not only determines output structure, but also carries instruction signals, offering a new perspective on structured generation in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在结构化生成任务中，schema键的措辞会影响LLM性能，这表明schema不仅是结构约束，还是隐含的指令通道。不同模型对指令通道的敏感性不同，且通道间存在非加性交互效应。
AI.motivation: 现有约束解码方法主要将schema视为纯结构约束，忽略了其语言表述可能影响模型行为。研究者发现仅改变schema键的措辞就能显著改变模型性能，表明需要重新理解结构化生成。
AI.method: 提出将结构化生成重新解释为多通道指令问题，指令可通过提示显式传送，也可通过schema键在解码过程中隐式传送。系统研究了schema键表述作为隐含指令通道的作用。
AI.result: 实验显示不同模型家族对指令通道的敏感性不同：Qwen模型一致受益于schema级指令，而LLaMA模型更依赖提示级指导。观察到指令通道间存在非加性交互效应。
AI.conclusion: Schema设计不仅决定输出结构，还承载指令信号，为LLM结构化生成提供了新视角。这些发现对优化模型性能和理解模型行为具有重要意义。

title: Implicit Neural Representations: A Signal Processing Perspective
summary: Implicit neural representations (INRs) mark a fundamental shift in signal modeling, moving from discrete sampled data to continuous functional representations. By parameterizing signals as neural networks, INRs provide a unified framework for representing images, audio, video, 3D geometry, and beyond as continuous functions of their coordinates. This functional viewpoint enables signal operations such as differentiation to be carried out analytically through automatic differentiation rather than through discrete approximations. In this article, we examine the evolution of INRs from a signal processing perspective, emphasizing spectral behavior, sampling theory, and multiscale representation. We trace the progression from standard coordinate based networks, which exhibit a spectral bias toward low frequency components, to more advanced designs that reshape the approximation space through specialized activations, including periodic, localized, and adaptive functions. We also discuss structured representations, such as hierarchical decompositions and hash grid encodings, that improve spatial adaptivity and computational efficiency. We further highlight the utility of INRs across a broad range of applications, including inverse problems in medical and radar imaging, compression, and 3D scene representation. By interpreting INRs as learned signal models whose approximation spaces adapt to the underlying data, this article clarifies the field's core conceptual developments and outlines open challenges in theoretical stability, weight space interpretability, and large scale generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文从信号处理角度综述了隐式神经表示(INRs)的发展，分析了从基础坐标网络到高级设计的演进，并探讨了其在逆向问题、压缩和3D场景表示等领域的应用。
AI.motivation: INRs标志着信号建模的根本性转变，从离散采样数据转向连续函数表示。这种统一的函数框架能够处理多种信号类型，并通过自动微分实现精确的信号操作，比传统离散近似方法更加准确和灵活。
AI.method: 文章系统分析了INRs的演化路径：(1)从标准坐标网络的低频谱偏差开始；(2)发展到使用周期性、局部性和自适应函数的新型激活函数来重塑逼近空间；(3)引入层次化分解和哈希网格编码等结构化表示来提高空间适应性和计算效率。
AI.result: INRs在医学成像、雷达成像等逆向问题、数据压缩以及3D场景表示等多个领域展现出强大的应用价值。通过将INRs解释为学习到的信号模型，其逼近空间能够自适应地匹配底层数据特性。
AI.conclusion: 文章阐明了INRs领域的核心概念发展，并指出了在理论稳定性、权重空间可解释性和大规模泛化等方面的开放挑战，为未来研究提供了清晰的指导方向。

title: Segment-Level Coherence for Robust Harmful Intent Probing in LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly exposed to adaptive jailbreaking, particularly in high-stakes Chemical, Biological, Radiological, and Nuclear (CBRN) domains. Although streaming probes enable real-time monitoring, they still make systematic errors. We identify a core issue: existing methods often rely on a few high-scoring tokens, leading to false alarms when sensitive CBRN terms appear in benign contexts. To address this, we introduce a streaming probing objective that requires multiple evidence tokens to consistently support a prediction, rather than relying on isolated spikes. This encourages more robust detection based on aggregated signals instead of single-token cues. At a fixed 1% false-positive rate, our method improves the true-positive rate by 35.55% relative to strong streaming baselines. We further observe substantial gains in AUROC, even when starting from near-saturated baseline performance (AUROC = 97.40%). We also show that probing Attention or MLP activations consistently outperforms residual-stream features. Finally, even when adversarial fine-tuning enables novel character-level ciphers, harmful intent remains detectable: probes developed for the base LLMs can be applied ``plug-and-play'' to these obfuscated attacks, achieving an AUROC of over 98.85%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的流式探测方法，通过要求多个证据标记一致支持预测，有效提升了LLMs在CBRN领域自适应越狱攻击检测的准确性，在1%假阳性率下真阳性率提升35.55%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖少数高评分标记进行越狱攻击检测，导致在良性上下文中出现CBRN敏感术语时产生误报，存在系统误差。
AI.method: 引入新的流式探测目标函数，要求多个证据标记一致支持预测而不是依赖孤立标记峰值；使用注意力或MLP激活而非残差流特征。
AI.result: 在1%假阳性率下真阳性率比基线提升35.55%，AUROC显著提高；探测方法可'即插即用'应用于字符级密码混淆攻击，AUROC超过98.85%。
AI.conclusion: 基于聚合信号的稳健探测方法显著改善了CBRN越狱攻击检测性能，注意力/MLP特征更有效，且方法对新颖混淆攻击具有强泛化能力。

title: Attention-Gated Convolutional Networks for Scanner-Agnostic Quality Assessment
summary: Motion artifacts present a significant challenge in structural MRI (sMRI), often compromising clinical diagnostics and large-scale automated analysis. While manual quality control (QC) remains the gold standard, it is increasingly unscalable for massive longitudinal studies. To address this, we propose a hybrid CNN-Attention framework designed for robust, site-invariant MRI quality assessment. Our architecture integrates a hierarchical 2D CNN encoder for local spatial feature extraction with a multi-head cross-attention mechanism to model global dependencies. This synergy enables the model to prioritize motion relevant artifact signatures, such as ringing and blurring, while dynamically filtering out site-specific intensity variations and background noise. The framework was trained end-to-end on the MR-ART dataset using a balanced cohort of 200 subjects. Performance was evaluated across two tiers: Seen Site Evaluation on a held-out MR-ART partition and Unseen Site Evaluation using 200 subjects from 17 heterogeneous sites in the ABIDE archive. On seen sites, the model achieved a scan-level accuracy of 0.9920 and an F1-score of 0.9919. Crucially, it maintained strong generalization across unseen ABIDE sites (Acc = 0.755) without any retraining or fine-tuning, demonstrating high resilience to domain shift. These results indicate that attention-based feature re-weighting successfully captures universal artifact descriptors, bridging the performance gap between diverse imaging environments and scanner manufacturers.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种CNN-Attention混合框架，用于在大规模纵向研究中实现鲁棒的、站点不变的结构化MRI质量评估。
AI.motivation: 结构化MRI中的运动伪影严重影响临床诊断和自动化分析，而人工质量控制无法满足大规模纵向研究的可扩展性需求，需要开发自动化的、跨站点的质量评估方法。
AI.method: 构建集成分层2D CNN编码器和多头交叉注意力机制的混合框架，其中CNN提取局部空间特征，注意力机制建模全局依赖，优先关注运动相关伪影特征，同时过滤站点特异性强度变化和背景噪声。
AI.result: 在MR-ART数据集上训练后，模型在已知站点上达到0.9920的准确率和0.9919的F1分数，在17个异构站点的ABIDE数据集上无需重新训练即保持0.755的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力的特征重加权成功捕获了通用伪影描述符，证明该框架在不同成像环境和扫描仪制造商之间具有很强的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: RACER: Retrieval-Augmented Contextual Rapid Speculative Decoding
summary: Autoregressive decoding in Large Language Models (LLMs) generates one token per step, causing high inference latency. Speculative decoding (SD) mitigates this through a guess-and-verify strategy, but existing training-free variants face trade-offs: retrieval-based drafts break when no exact match exists, while logits-based drafts lack structural guidance. We propose $\textbf{RACER}$ ($\textbf{R}$etrieval-$\textbf{A}$ugmented $\textbf{C}$ont$\textbf{e}$xtual $\textbf{R}$apid Speculative Decoding), a lightweight and training-free method that integrates retrieved exact patterns with logit-driven future cues. This unification supplies both reliable anchors and flexible extrapolation, yielding richer speculative drafts. Experiments on Spec-Bench, HumanEval, and MGSM-ZH demonstrate that RACER consistently accelerates inference, achieving more than $2\times$ speedup over autoregressive decoding, and outperforms prior training-free methods, offering a scalable, plug-and-play solution for efficient LLM decoding. Our source code is available at $\href{https://github.com/hkr04/RACER}{https://github.com/hkr04/RACER}$.

AI.tldr: RACER是一种无需训练的轻量级投机解码方法，通过结合检索到的精确模式和 logits驱动的未来提示，实现了2倍以上的推理加速，性能优于现有的无需训练方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的自回归解码每步只生成一个token，导致推理延迟高。现有的无需训练投机解码方法存在权衡：基于检索的草稿在无精确匹配时失效，而基于logits的草稿缺乏结构指导。
AI.method: 提出RACER（检索增强上下文快速投机解码），将检索到的精确模式与logits驱动的未来提示相结合，既提供可靠锚点又支持灵活外推，生成更丰富的投机草稿。
AI.result: 在Spec-Bench、HumanEval和MGSM-ZH等基准测试中，RACER稳定加速推理，相比自回归解码实现2倍以上加速，性能优于先前的无需训练方法。
AI.conclusion: RACER为高效LLM推理提供了一个可扩展、即插即用的解决方案，统一了检索和logits两种草稿生成方式的优势，无需额外训练即可显著提升解码效率。

title: Learning Where to Embed: Noise-Aware Positional Embedding for Query Retrieval in Small-Object Detection
comment: Accepted to ACM ICMR 2026; 14 pages, 6 figures, and 4 tables
summary: Transformer-based detectors have advanced small-object detection, but they often remain inefficient and vulnerable to background-induced query noise, which motivates deep decoders to refine low-quality queries. We present HELP (Heatmap-guided Embedding Learning Paradigm), a noise-aware positional-semantic fusion framework that studies where to embed positional information by selectively preserving positional encodings in foreground-salient regions while suppressing background clutter. Within HELP, we introduce Heatmap-guided Positional Embedding (HPE) as the core embedding mechanism and visualize it with a heatbar for interpretable diagnosis and fine-tuning. HPE is integrated into both the encoder and decoder: it guides noise-suppressed feature encoding by injecting heatmap-aware positional encoding, and it enables high-quality query retrieval by filtering background-dominant embeddings via a gradient-based mask filter before decoding. To address feature sparsity in complex small targets, we integrate Linear-Snake Convolution to enrich retrieval-relevant representations. The gradient-based heatmap supervision is used during training only, incurring no additional gradient computation at inference. As a result, our design reduces decoder layers from eight to three and achieves a 59.4% parameter reduction (66.3M vs. 163M) while maintaining consistent accuracy gains under a reduced compute budget across benchmarks. Code Repository: https://github.com/yidimopozhibai/Noise-Suppressed-Query-Retrieval

AI.tldr: HELP是一种基于热力图引导的嵌入学习框架，通过选择性保留前景区域的位置信息来抑制背景噪声，实现了59.4%的参数减少和检测器层级的显著降低。
AI.motivation: 基于Transformer的检测器在小目标检测领域虽有进展，但仍存在效率低下和易受背景诱导查询噪声影响的问题，这促使研究者需要深度解码器来优化低质量查询。
AI.method: 提出HELP框架，包含热力图引导的位置嵌入(HPE)机制；在编码器和解码器中集成HPE，通过基于梯度的掩码滤波器过滤背景主导嵌入；引入线性蛇形卷积解决复杂小目标的特征稀疏问题。
AI.result: 将解码器层数从8层减少到3层，实现59.4%的参数减少(66.3M vs 163M)，在减少计算预算的同时在各个基准测试中保持一致的精度提升。
AI.conclusion: HELP通过噪声感知的位置-语义融合机制，有效解决了Transformer检测器的背景噪声问题，在大幅降低参数量和计算复杂度的同时保持了检测性能，为小目标检测提供了高效的解决方案。

title: Reasoning Dynamics and the Limits of Monitoring Modality Reliance in Vision-Language Models
summary: Recent advances in vision language models (VLMs) offer reasoning capabilities, yet how these unfold and integrate visual and textual information remains unclear. We analyze reasoning dynamics in 18 VLMs covering instruction-tuned and reasoning-trained models from two different model families. We track confidence over Chain-of-Thought (CoT), measure the corrective effect of reasoning, and evaluate the contribution of intermediate reasoning steps. We find that models are prone to answer inertia, in which early commitments to a prediction are reinforced, rather than revised during reasoning steps. While reasoning-trained models show stronger corrective behavior, their gains depend on modality conditions, from text-dominant to vision-only settings. Using controlled interventions with misleading textual cues, we show that models are consistently influenced by these cues even when visual evidence is sufficient, and assess whether this influence is recoverable from CoT. Although this influence can appear in the CoT, its detectability varies across models and depends on what is being monitored. Reasoning-trained models are more likely to explicitly refer to the cues, but their longer and fluent CoTs can still appear visually grounded while actually following textual cues, obscuring modality reliance. In contrast, instruction-tuned models refer to the cues less explicitly, but their shorter traces reveal inconsistencies with the visual input. Taken together, these findings indicate that CoT provides only a partial view of how different modalities drive VLM decisions, with important implications for the transparency and safety of multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: 研究发现18个视觉语言模型在思维链推理过程中存在'答案惯性'现象，且模型易受文本线索误导，推理训练模型虽然表现更好但其思维链可能掩盖真实的模态依赖。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型已具备推理能力，但这些能力如何展开以及如何整合视觉和文本信息尚不明确，需要深入分析推理动态以保证多模态系统的透明度和安全性。
AI.method: 分析了18个VLMs（包括指令微调和推理训练模型），通过追踪思维链(Chain-of-Thought)过程中的置信度变化、测量推理的纠正效应、评估中间推理步骤的贡献，并使用误导性文本线索进行受控干预实验。
AI.result: 发现模型存在'答案惯性'——早期的预测倾向会在推理过程中被强化而非修正；推理训练模型虽有更强纠正行为，但其表现依赖于模态条件；模型即使在视觉证据充分时也易受文本线索影响，且这种影响在思维链中的可检测性因模型而异。
AI.conclusion: 思维链仅提供了视觉语言模型决策机制的部分视角，无法完全揭示不同模态驱动的决策过程，这对多模态系统的透明度和安全性具有重要启示。

title: Building Extraction from Remote Sensing Imagery under Hazy and Low-light Conditions: Benchmark and Baseline
summary: Building extraction from optical Remote Sensing (RS) imagery suffers from performance degradation under real-world hazy and low-light conditions. However, existing optical methods and benchmarks focus primarily on ideal clear-weather conditions. While SAR offers all-weather sensing, its side-looking geometry causes geometric distortions. To address these challenges, we introduce HaLoBuilding, the first optical benchmark specifically designed for building extraction under hazy and low-light conditions. By leveraging a same-scene multitemporal pairing strategy, we ensure pixel-level label alignment and high fidelity even under extreme degradation. Building upon this benchmark, we propose HaLoBuild-Net, a novel end-to-end framework for building extraction in adverse RS scenarios. At its core, we develop a Spatial-Frequency Focus Module (SFFM) to effectively mitigate meteorological interference on building features by coupling large receptive field attention with frequency-aware channel reweighting guided by stable low-frequency anchors. Additionally, a Global Multi-scale Guidance Module (GMGM) provides global semantic constraints to anchor building topologies, while a Mutual-Guided Fusion Module (MGFM) implements bidirectional semantic-spatial calibration to suppress shallow noise and sharpen weather-induced blurred boundaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HaLoBuild-Net significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods and conventional cascaded restoration-segmentation paradigms on the HaLoBuilding dataset, while maintaining robust generalization on WHU, INRIA, and LoveDA datasets. The source code and datasets are publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/HaLoBuilding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了第一个专门针对雾霾和弱光条件下建筑提取的光学遥感基准数据集HaLoBuilding，以及相应的端到端框架HaLoBuild-Net。
AI.motivation: 现有的光学遥感建筑提取方法在真实世界的雾霾和弱光条件下性能下降，而传统的光学方法和基准主要关注理想晴朗天气条件。虽然SAR能全天候感知，但其侧视几何会产生几何畸变。
AI.method: 提出HaLoBuilding基准数据集，采用同场景多时间对配对策略确保像素级标签对齐。基于此数据集开发HaLoBuild-Net框架，包含：1) 空间-频率聚焦模块(SFFM)耦合大感受野注意力和频率感知通道重加权；2) 全局多尺度引导模块(GMGM)提供全局语义约束；3) 相互引导融合模块(MGFM)实现双向语义-空间校准。
AI.result: 在HaLoBuilding数据集上，HaLoBuild-Net显著优于现有方法和传统级联恢复-分割范式，同时在WHU、INRIA和LoveDA数据集上保持良好的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为恶劣天气条件下的遥感建筑提取提供了新的基准数据和解决方案，有效提升了在雾霾和弱光环境下的建筑提取性能。

title: Comparison of Modern Multilingual Text Embedding Techniques for Hate Speech Detection Task
comment: Submitted to Applied Soft Computing (Status: Decision in Process)
summary: Online hate speech and abusive language pose a growing challenge for content moderation, especially in multilingual settings and for low-resource languages such as Lithuanian. This paper investigates to what extent modern multilingual sentence embedding models can support accurate hate speech detection in Lithuanian, Russian, and English, and how their performance depends on downstream modeling choices and feature dimensionality. We introduce LtHate, a new Lithuanian hate speech corpus derived from news portals and social networks, and benchmark six modern multilingual encoders (potion, gemma, bge, snow, jina, e5) on LtHate, RuToxic, and EnSuperset using a unified Python pipeline. For each embedding, we train both a one class HBOS anomaly detector and a two class CatBoost classifier, with and without principal component analysis (PCA) compression to 64-dimensional feature vectors. Across all datasets, two class supervised models consistently and substantially outperform one class anomaly detection, with the best configurations achieving up to 80.96% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.887 in Lithuanian (jina), 92.19% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.978 in Russian (e5), and 77.21% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.859 in English (e5 with PCA). PCA compression preserves almost all discriminative power in the supervised setting, while showing some negative impact for the unsupervised anomaly detection case. These results demonstrate how modern multilingual sentence embeddings combined with gradient boosted decision trees provide robust soft-computing solutions for multilingual hate speech detection applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了六种现代多语言句子嵌入模型在立陶宛语、俄语和英语仇恨言论检测任务上的表现，发现监督学习方法显著优于无监督异常检测，而PCA压缩能有效保持特征判别力。
AI.motivation: 在线仇恨言论和滥用语言对内容审核构成挑战，特别是在多语言环境和低资源语言（如立陶宛语）场景下。现有研究缺乏对这些语言仇恨言论检测的系统评估。
AI.method: 构建立陶宛语仇恨言论语料库LtHate，使用统一的Python流水线评测potion、gemma、bge、snow、jina、e5等六种多语言编码器，并采用HBOS异常检测器和CatBoost分类器进行建模，测试PCA压缩至64维的效果。
AI.result: 双类监督模型在所有数据集上显著优于单类异常检测。最佳配置在立陶宛语达到80.96%准确率(AUC 0.887)，俄语92.19%(AUC 0.978)，英语77.21%(AUC 0.859)。PCA压缩在监督学习中保持判别力，但在无监督检测中有负面影响。
AI.conclusion: 现代多语言句子嵌入与梯度提升决策树的结合为多语言仇恨言论检测提供了鲁棒的软计算解决方案，为低资源语言的自动内容审核奠定了基础。

title: Beyond Visual Cues: Semantic-Driven Token Filtering and Expert Routing for Anytime Person ReID
summary: Any-Time Person Re-identification (AT-ReID) necessitates the robust retrieval of target individuals under arbitrary conditions, encompassing both modality shifts (daytime and nighttime) and extensive clothing-change scenarios, ranging from short-term to long-term intervals. However, existing methods are highly relying on pure visual features, which are prone to change due to environmental and time factors, resulting in significantly performance deterioration under scenarios involving illumination caused modality shifts or cloth-change. In this paper, we propose Semantic-driven Token Filtering and Expert Routing (STFER), a novel framework that leverages the ability of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) to generate identity consistency text, which provides identity-discriminative features that are robust to both clothing variations and cross-modality shifts between RGB and IR. Specifically, we employ instructions to guide the LVLM in generating identity-intrinsic semantic text that captures biometric constants for the semantic model driven. The text token is further used for Semantic-driven Visual Token Filtering (SVTF), which enhances informative visual regions and suppresses redundant background noise. Meanwhile, the text token is also used for Semantic-driven Expert Routing (SER), which integrates the semantic text into expert routing, resulting in more robust multi-scenario gating. Extensive experiments on the Any-Time ReID dataset (AT-USTC) demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art results. Moreover, the model trained on AT-USTC was evaluated across 5 widely-used ReID benchmarks demonstrating superior generalization capabilities with highly competitive results. Our code will be available soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STFER框架，利用大型视觉语言模型生成身份一致性文本来增强任意条件下的行人重识别性能，特别是在跨模态和服装变化场景中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有任意时间行人重识别方法过度依赖纯视觉特征，在光照变化导致的跨模态转换（如昼夜）和服装变化场景中性能显著下降，需要更鲁棒的身份识别特征。
AI.method: 提出语义驱动的令牌过滤和专家路由（STFER）框架：1）通过指令引导LVLM生成包含生物特征常量的身份内在语义文本；2）使用语义文本驱动视觉令牌过滤（SVTF）增强信息区域并抑制背景噪声；3）实现语义驱动的专家路由（SER）整合语义文本进行多场景门控。
AI.result: 在AT-USTC数据集上达到最先进性能，同时在5个广泛使用的ReID基准测试中展现出优秀的泛化能力和极具竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用LVLM生成的身份一致性语义文本，STFER框架有效解决了跨模态和服装变化场景下的特征鲁棒性问题，为任意时间行人重识别提供了新的解决方案。

title: IE as Cache: Information Extraction Enhanced Agentic Reasoning
summary: Information Extraction aims to distill structured, decision-relevant information from unstructured text, serving as a foundation for downstream understanding and reasoning. However, it is traditionally treated merely as a terminal objective: once extracted, the resulting structure is often consumed in isolation rather than maintained and reused during multi-step inference. Moving beyond this, we propose \textit{IE-as-Cache}, a framework that repurposes IE as a cognitive cache to enhance agentic reasoning. Drawing inspiration from hierarchical computer memory, our approach combines query-driven extraction with cache-aware reasoning to dynamically maintain compact intermediate information and filter noise. Experiments on challenging benchmarks across diverse LLMs demonstrate significant improvements in reasoning accuracy, indicating that IE can be effectively repurposed as a reusable cognitive resource and offering a promising direction for future research on downstream uses of IE.

AI.tldr: IE-as-Cache框架将信息提取重新定义为认知缓存，通过动态维护中间信息和过滤噪声来增强代理系统推理能力，在多个基准测试中显著提升了推理准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统信息提取被当作终端目标，提取后的结构化信息常被孤立使用，无法在多步推理中维护和重用。作者希望打破这一限制，将IE转化为可重复利用的认知资源。
AI.method: 提出IE-as-Cache框架，借鉴层次化计算机内存的设计理念，结合查询驱动的提取和缓存感知推理，动态维护紧凑的中间信息并过滤噪声。
AI.result: 在多样化的LLM和具有挑战性的基准测试上，实验表明该方法能够显著提升推理准确性，验证了IE作为可重用认知资源的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究成功地将信息提取重新定位为认知缓存，为IE的下游应用研究提供了新方向，证明了IE在增强代理系统推理能力方面的巨大潜力。

title: Beyond Independent Frames: Latent Attention Masked Autoencoders for Multi-View Echocardiography
comment: Accepted as a workshop paper at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Foundation Models for Science
summary: Echocardiography is a widely used modality for cardiac assessment due to its non-invasive and cost-effective nature, but the sparse and heterogeneous spatiotemporal views of the heart pose distinct challenges. Existing masked autoencoder (MAE) approaches typically process images or short clips independently, failing to capture the inherent multi-view structure required for coherent cardiac representation. We introduce Latent Attention Masked Autoencoder (LAMAE), a foundation model architecture tailored to the multi-view nature of medical imaging. LAMAE augments the standard MAE with a latent attention module that enables information exchange across frames and views directly in latent space. This allows the model to aggregate variable-length sequences and distinct views, reconstructing a holistic representation of cardiac function from partial observations. We pretrain LAMAE on MIMIC-IV-ECHO, a large-scale, uncurated dataset reflecting real-world clinical variability. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first results for predicting ICD-10 codes from MIMIC-IV-ECHO videos. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that representations learned from adult data transfer effectively to pediatric cohorts despite substantial anatomical differences. These results provide evidence that incorporating structural priors, such as multi-view attention, yields significantly more robust and transferable representations.

AI.tldr: LAMAE是一种针对多视图医学影像设计的潜在注意力掩码自编码器，通过在潜在空间中进行跨视图信息交换，实现了更鲁棒的心脏表征学习，并在儿童数据集上展现了良好的迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 超声心动图具有稀疏和异质性的时空视图特征，现有的掩码自编码器方法无法捕获心脏固有的多视图结构，限制了其在心脏功能表征中的应用效果。
AI.method: 提出LAMAE架构，在标准MAE基础上增加潜在注意力模块，实现帧间和视图间的直接信息交换；在MIMIC-IV-ECHO大规模数据集上进行预训练；首次实现从该数据集视频预测ICD-10编码。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV-ECHO数据集上实现了ICD-10代码预测的首次结果；成人数据学习到的表征在儿科队列中有效迁移，尽管解剖结构存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 引入多视图注意力等结构先验能够产生更加鲁棒和可迁移的表征，证明了结构化先验在医学影像Foundation模型中的重要性。

title: XQ-MEval: A Dataset with Cross-lingual Parallel Quality for Benchmarking Translation Metrics
summary: Automatic evaluation metrics are essential for building multilingual translation systems. The common practice of evaluating these systems is averaging metric scores across languages, yet this is suspicious since metrics may suffer from cross-lingual scoring bias, where translations of equal quality receive different scores across languages. This problem has not been systematically studied because no benchmark exists that provides parallel-quality instances across languages, and expert annotation is not realistic. In this work, we propose XQ-MEval, a semi-automatically built dataset covering nine translation directions, to benchmark translation metrics. Specifically, we inject MQM-defined errors into gold translations automatically, filter them by native speakers for reliability, and merge errors to generate pseudo translations with controllable quality. These pseudo translations are then paired with corresponding sources and references to form triplets used in assessing the qualities of translation metrics. Using XQ-MEval, our experiments on nine representative metrics reveal the inconsistency between averaging and human judgment and provide the first empirical evidence of cross-lingual scoring bias. Finally, we propose a normalization strategy derived from XQ-MEval that aligns score distributions across languages, improving the fairness and reliability of multilingual metric evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了XQ-MEval数据集，用于评估翻译指标的跨语言评分偏向性问题，并基于该数据集证明了语言间平均分数与人工评判的不一致性和跨语言评分偏向的存在，最后提出了改善多语言评估公平性的归一化策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的多语言翻译系统评估方法存在潜在问题：简单地平均各语言的指标分数可能不公平，因为翻译质量相同的译文在不同语言中可能获得不同的评分。但这一跨语言评分偏向性问题尚未得到系统性研究，主要原因是缺乏跨语言平行质量实例的基准数据集，而专家标注也不现实。
AI.method: 研究者构建了XQ-MEval数据集，涵盖9个翻译方向。通过自动将MQM定义的错误注入黄金译文，由母语者过滤确保可靠性，合并错误生成质量可控的伪译文，最后将伪译文与相应的源文本和参考译文配对形成三元组来评估翻译指标质量。
AI.result: 实验发现9个代表性指标的语言平均分数与人工判断不一致，首次为跨语言评分偏向提供了实证证据。提出的归一化策略能够对齐不同语言的分数分布，提高多语言指标评估的公平性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次系统性地揭示了多语言翻译评估中的跨语言评分偏向问题，通过构建XQ-MEval数据集为该领域提供了重要基准，并提出的归一化策略为解决这一问题提供了有效方案，对构建更公平的多语言翻译系统具有重要意义。

title: How to Correctly Make Mistakes: A Framework for Constructing and Benchmarking Mistake Aware Egocentric Procedural Videos
summary: Reliable procedural monitoring in video requires exposure to naturally occurring human errors and the recoveries that follow. In egocentric recordings, mistakes are often partially occluded by hands and revealed through subtle object state changes, while existing procedural datasets provide limited and inconsistent mistake and correction traces. We present PIE-V (Psychologically Inspired Error injection for Videos), a framework for constructing and benchmarking mistake-aware egocentric procedural videos by augmenting clean keystep procedures with controlled, human-plausible deviations. PIE-V combines a psychology-informed error planner conditioned on procedure phase and semantic step load, a correction planner that models recovery behavior, an LLM writer that performs cascade-consistent rewrites, and an LLM judge that validates procedural coherence and repairs failures. For video segment edits, PIE-V synthesizes replacement clips with text-guided video generation and stitches them into the episode to preserve visual plausibility. Applied to 17 tasks and 50 Ego-Exo4D scenarios, PIE-V injects 102 mistakes and generates 27 recovery corrections. For benchmarking, we introduce a unified taxonomy and a human rubric with nine metrics that cover step-level and procedure-level quality, including plausibility, procedure logic with annotator confidence, state change coherence, and grounding between text and video. Using this protocol, we audit several existing resources and compare PIE-V against a freeform LLM generation baseline under the same criteria. Together, the framework and rubric support post-completion verification for egocentric procedural mistake detection and correction.

AI.tldr: PIE-V是一个心理学启发的视频错误注入框架，用于构建和评估包含错误和恢复的以人为中心的程序性视频，支持程序错误检测和校正的验证。
AI.motivation: 现有的程序性数据集在错误和校正轨迹方面提供有限且不一致的信息，而在以人为中心的视频中，错误通常被手部遮挡并通过细微的对象状态变化来揭示，使得可靠的程序监测变得困难。
AI.method: PIE-V框架结合了心理学启发的错误规划器、校正行为模型、级联一致性的LLM重写器、验证程序连贯性的LLM判断器以及文本引导的视频生成和剪辑技术来构建错误感知的程序性视频。
AI.result: 在17个任务和50个Ego-Exo4D场景中，PIE-V注入了102个错误并生成了27个恢复校正，建立了包含九个指标的统一评估体系来审计现有资源并与基线方法进行对比。
AI.conclusion: 该框架和评估方案为以人为中心的程序性错误检测和校正提供了事后验证支持，填补了现有数据集在错误和恢复表示方面的不足。

title: Text2Arch: A Dataset for Generating Scientific Architecture Diagrams from Natural Language Descriptions
summary: Communicating complex system designs or scientific processes through text alone is inefficient and prone to ambiguity. A system that automatically generates scientific architecture diagrams from text with high semantic fidelity can be useful in multiple applications like enterprise architecture visualization, AI-driven software design, and educational content creation. Hence, in this paper, we focus on leveraging language models to perform semantic understanding of the input text description to generate intermediate code that can be processed to generate high-fidelity architecture diagrams. Unfortunately, no clean large-scale open-access dataset exists, implying lack of any effective open models for this task. Hence, we contribute a comprehensive dataset, \system, comprising scientific architecture images, their corresponding textual descriptions, and associated DOT code representations. Leveraging this resource, we fine-tune a suite of small language models, and also perform in-context learning using GPT-4o. Through extensive experimentation, we show that \system{} models significantly outperform existing baseline models like DiagramAgent and perform at par with in-context learning-based generations from GPT-4o. We make the code, data and models publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套从文本自动生成科学架构图的完整解决方案，包括构建了首个大规模数据集system，训练了小型语言模型，并与GPT-4o实现了相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 仅通过文本交流复杂系统设计或科学流程效率低下且容易产生歧义，需要能够自动从文本生成高语义保真度的科学架构图的系统，该技术在企业架构可视化、AI驱动软件设计和教育内容创作等多个领域都有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 首先构建了一个综合数据集system，包含科学架构图像、对应文本描述以及DOT代码表示。然后基于该数据集微调了一系列小型语言模型，并使用GPT-4o进行上下文学习。模型通过理解输入文本的语义来生成中间代码，进而生成高保真度的架构图。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于system数据集训练的模型显著优于DiagramAgent等现有基线模型，与基于GPT-4o的上下文学习方法性能相当。同时公开了代码、数据和模型。
AI.conclusion: 本研究填补了该领域缺乏大规模开放数据集和有效开源模型的空白，为 scientific 架构图自动生成提供了完整的解决方案，对促进相关应用的发展具有重要意义。

title: KVNN: Learnable Multi-Kernel Volterra Neural Networks
summary: Higher-order learning is fundamentally rooted in exploiting compositional features. It clearly hinges on enriching the representation by more elaborate interactions of the data which, in turn, tends to increase the model complexity of conventional large-scale deep learning models. In this paper, a kernelized Volterra Neural Network (kVNN) is proposed. The key to the achieved efficiency lies in using a learnable multi-kernel representation, where different interaction orders are modeled by distinct polynomial-kernel components with compact, learnable centers, yielding an order-adaptive parameterization. Features are learned by the composition of layers, each of which consists of parallel branches of different polynomial orders, enabling kVNN filters to directly replace standard convolutional kernels within existing architectures. The theoretical results are substantiated by experiments on two representative tasks: video action recognition and image denoising. The results demonstrate favorable performance-efficiency trade-offs: kVNN consistently yields reduced model (parameters) and computational (GFLOPs) complexity with competitive and often improved performance. These results are maintained even when trained from scratch without large-scale pretraining. In summary, we substantiate that structured kernelized higher-order layers offer a practical path to balancing expressivity and computational cost in modern deep networks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种核化Volterra神经网络(kVNN)，通过可学习的多核表示建模不同阶数的交互组合，实现了与标准卷积核兼容的高效高阶特征学习，在降低模型复杂度的同时保持或提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深层学习模型在利用组合特征进行高阶学习时，会显著增加模型复杂度。现有方法难以有效平衡表达能力和计算成本，需要一种既能捕捉高阶交互又保持计算效率的新方法。
AI.method: kVNN采用可学习的多核表示，每个层包含并行分支的不同阶数多项式核组件。通过紧凑可学习的中心点建模不同交互阶数，实现阶数自适应参数化，可直接替换标准卷积核。
AI.result: 在视频动作识别和图像去噪任务上，kVNN展现出优异的性能-效率权衡：一致性地降低了模型参数和计算复杂度(GFLOPs)，即使在无大规模预训练的情况下也能获得竞争性甚至更好的性能。
AI.conclusion: 结构化核化高阶层为现代深度网络平衡表达能力和计算成本提供了实用路径，证明了通过精心设计的高阶交互建模可以在降低复杂度的同时保持或提升模型性能。

title: Explain the Flag: Contextualizing Hate Speech Beyond Censorship
comment: Accepted in the Findings of ACL 2026
summary: Hate, derogatory, and offensive speech remains a persistent challenge in online platforms and public discourse. While automated detection systems are widely used, most focus on censorship or removal, raising concerns for transparency and freedom of expression, and limiting opportunities to explain why content is harmful. To address these issues, explanatory approaches have emerged as a promising solution, aiming to make hate speech detection more transparent, accountable, and informative. In this paper, we present a hybrid approach that combines Large Language Models (LLMs) with three newly created and curated vocabularies to detect and explain hate speech in English, French, and Greek. Our system captures both inherently derogatory expressions tied to identity characteristics and direct group-targeted content through two complementary pipelines: one that detects and disambiguates problematic terms using the curated vocabularies, and one that leverages LLMs as context-aware evaluators of group-targeting content. The outputs are fused into grounded explanations that clarify why content is flagged. Human evaluation shows that our hybrid approach is accurate, with high-quality explanations, outperforming LLM-only baselines.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种混合方法，结合大型语言模型和三个新创建的词汇表，用于检测和解释英语、法语和希腊语中的仇恨言论，该方法在准确性和解释质量上都优于纯LLM基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化仇恨言论检测系统主要关注审查或删除内容，缺乏透明度和解释性，限制了对内容有害性的说明机会，引发了透明度和言论自由方面的担忧。
AI.method: 采用混合架构：1) 使用精心策划的词汇表检测和消歧问题术语；2) 利用LLM作为上下文感知评估器来识别针对特定群体的内容；3) 将两个互补管道的输出融合为基础性解释，阐明内容被标记的原因。
AI.result: 人工评估表明，混合方法具有高准确性，提供高质量解释，在检测性能和解释质量方面均优于仅使用LLM的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将传统词汇表方法与现代LLM技术相结合，该系统不仅提高了仇恨言论检测的准确性，还增强了透明度和可解释性，为更负责任的在线内容管理提供了有效解决方案。

title: Class Unlearning via Depth-Aware Removal of Forget-Specific Directions
comment: Accepted to the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Machine Unlearning for Vision (MUV)
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove targeted knowledge from a trained model without the cost of retraining from scratch. In class unlearning, however, reducing accuracy on forget classes does not necessarily imply true forgetting: forgotten information can remain encoded in internal representations, and apparent forgetting may arise from classifier-head suppression rather than representational removal. We show that existing class-unlearning methods often exhibit weak or negative selectivity, preserve forget-class structure in deep representations, or rely heavily on final-layer bias shifts. We then introduce DAMP (Depth-Aware Modulation by Projection), a one-shot, closed-form weight-surgery method that removes forget-specific directions from a pretrained network without gradient-based optimization. At each stage, DAMP computes class prototypes in the input space of the next learnable operator, extracts forget directions as residuals relative to retain-class prototypes, and applies a projection-based update to reduce downstream sensitivity to those directions. To preserve utility, DAMP uses a parameter-free depth-aware scaling rule derived from probe separability, applying smaller edits in early layers and larger edits in deeper layers. The method naturally extends to multi-class forgetting through low-rank subspace removal. Across MNIST, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny ImageNet, and across convolutional and transformer architectures, DAMP more closely resembles the retraining gold standard than some of the prior methods, improving selective forgetting while better preserving retain-class performance and reducing residual forget-class structure in deep layers.

AI.tldr: DAMP是一种基于投影的单次、闭式权重编辑方法，通过移除特定类别的方向信息实现真正的类别遗忘，相比现有方法在保护保留类别性能的同时更接近重新训练的黄金标准。
AI.motivation: 现有类别遗忘方法存在虚假遗忘问题，遗忘信息仍可能保留在内部表示中，或者仅仅依赖分类器头部的抑制而非真正的表示移除，表现出弱或负面的选择性。
AI.method: DAMP在每个网络层级计算类原型，提取遗忘类别相对于保留类别的残差方向，通过投影更新减少对流这些方向的敏感性，并使用基于探针可分性的无参数深度感知缩放规则。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny ImageNet以及卷积和Transformer架构上，DAMP比现有方法更接近重新训练标准，提高了选择性遗忘效果，更好保持保留类别性能，并减少了深层中残遗的类别结构。
AI.conclusion: DAMP提供了一种高效、无需梯度优化的类别遗忘解决方案，实现了真正的表示级遗忘而非表面遗忘，为机器遗忘领域树立了新的性能基准。

title: IUQ: Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification for Long-Form Large Language Model Generation
summary: Despite the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), uncertainty quantification in LLM generation is a persistent challenge. Although recent approaches have achieved strong performance by restricting LLMs to produce short or constrained answer sets, many real-world applications require long-form and free-form text generation. A key difficulty in this setting is that LLMs often produce responses that are semantically coherent yet factually inaccurate, while the underlying semantics are multifaceted and the linguistic structure is complex. To tackle this challenge, this paper introduces Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification (IUQ), a novel framework that leverages inter-sample consistency and intra-sample faithfulness to quantify the uncertainty in long-form LLM outputs. By utilizing an interrogate-then-respond paradigm, our method provides reliable measures of claim-level uncertainty and the model's faithfulness. Experimental results across diverse model families and model sizes demonstrate the superior performance of IUQ over two widely used long-form generation datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/louisfanhz/IUQ.

AI.tldr: 提出了IUQ框架，通过样本间一致性和样本内保真度来量化长文本LLM输出的不确定性，使用询问-响应范式提供声明级别的不确定性度量。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM不确定性量化方法主要适用于短文本或受限答案集，但现实应用需要长文本和自由文本生成。LLM在生成长文本时常出现语义连贯但事实不准确的问题，且语义复杂性和语言结构复杂化使不确定性量化变得困难。
AI.method: 引入疑问式不确定性量化(IUQ)框架，通过询问-响应范式，结合样本间一致性和样本内保真度两个维度来度量长文本LLM输出的不确定性，提供声明级别的不确定性评估和模型保真度度量。
AI.result: 在多个模型族和模型大小的实验表明，IUQ在两个广泛使用的长文本生成数据集上表现出优越性能，能够有效量化LLM输出的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: IUQ框架成功解决了长文本LLM生成中不确定性量化的挑战，通过创新的一致性和保真度评估方法，为实际应用提供了可靠的不确定性量化工具。

title: OmniLight: One Model to Rule All Lighting Conditions
comment: CVPRW 2026; NTIRE 2026 Image Shadow Removal & Ambient Lighting Normalization Challenges (1st Perceptual Rank for White Lighting, 2nd Fidelity Rank & 4th Perceptual Rank for Color Lighting)
summary: Adverse lighting conditions, such as cast shadows and irregular illumination, pose significant challenges to computer vision systems by degrading visibility and color fidelity. Consequently, effective shadow removal and ALN are critical for restoring underlying image content, improving perceptual quality, and facilitating robust performance in downstream tasks. However, while achieving state-of-the-art results on specific benchmarks is a primary goal in image restoration challenges, real-world applications often demand robust models capable of handling diverse domains. To address this, we present a comprehensive study on lighting-related image restoration by exploring two contrasting strategies. We leverage a robust framework for ALN, DINOLight, as a specialized baseline to exploit the characteristics of each individual dataset, and extend it to OmniLight, a generalized alternative incorporating our proposed Wavelet Domain Mixture-of-Experts (WD-MoE) that is trained across all provided datasets. Through a comparative analysis of these two methods, we discuss the impact of data distribution on the performance of specialized and unified architectures in lighting-related image restoration. Notably, both approaches secured top-tier rankings across all three lighting-related tracks in the NTIRE 2026 Challenge, demonstrating their outstanding perceptual quality and generalization capabilities. Our codes are available at https://github.com/OBAKSA/Lighting-Restoration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种对比策略来解决光照相关图像恢复问题：专门的DINOLight框架和通用的OmniLight方法，后者采用了新颖的WD-MoE技术，两种方法在NTIRE 2026挑战赛的三个光照赛道中均取得了顶级排名。
AI.motivation: 不利的光照条件（如投射阴影和不规则照明）会显著降低计算机视觉系统的性能， degrade图像可见性和颜色保真度。虽然现有方法在特定基准测试上表现优异，但实际应用需要能够处理多样化领域的鲁棒模型。
AI.method: 研究采用两种 Contrastive 策略：1）利用DINOLight作为专门的基线框架，充分利用每个数据集的独立特征；2）提出OmniLight统一方案，集成创新的WD-MoE（小波域混合专家）技术，在跨数据集训练中实现更好的泛化能力。
AI.result: 两种方法在NTIRE 2026挑战赛的三个光照相关赛道中均获得顶级排名，证明了在感知质量和泛化能力方面的卓越表现，为光照恢复提供了专门的和统一的两种有效解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过对比专门化与统一化架构在光照图像恢复中的差异，研究得出数据分布对模型性能的重要影响。提出的DINOLight和OmniLight分别为特定领域和跨领域应用提供了有效选择，为实际应用场景的模型选择提供了指导。

title: Blinded Multi-Rater Comparative Evaluation of a Large Language Model and Clinician-Authored Responses in CGM-Informed Diabetes Counseling
summary: Continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) is central to diabetes care, but explaining CGM patterns clearly and empathetically remains time-intensive. Evidence for retrieval-grounded large language model (LLM) systems in CGM-informed counseling remains limited. To evaluate whether a retrieval-grounded LLM-based conversational agent (CA) could support patient understanding of CGM data and preparation for routine diabetes consultations. We developed a retrieval-grounded LLM-based CA for CGM interpretation and diabetes counseling support. The system generated plain-language responses while avoiding individualized therapeutic advice. Twelve CGM-informed cases were constructed from publicly available datasets. Between Oct 2025 and Feb 2026, 6 senior UK diabetes clinicians each reviewed 2 assigned cases and answered 24 questions. In a blinded multi-rater evaluation, each CA-generated and clinician-authored response was independently rated by 3 clinicians on 6 quality dimensions. Safety flags and perceived source labels were also recorded. Primary analyses used linear mixed-effects models. A total of 288 unique responses (144 CA and 144 clinician) generated 864 ratings. The CA received higher quality scores than clinician responses (mean 4.37 vs 3.58), with an estimated mean difference of 0.782 points (95% CI 0.692-0.872; P<.001). The largest differences were for empathy (1.062, 95% CI 0.948-1.177) and actionability (0.992, 95% CI 0.877-1.106). Safety flag distributions were similar, with major concerns rare in both groups (3/432, 0.7% each). Retrieval-grounded LLM systems may have value as adjunct tools for CGM review, patient education, and preconsultation preparation. However, these findings do not support autonomous therapeutic decision-making or unsupervised real-world use.

AI.tldr: 通过多评价者盲法评估发现，在解释CGM数据和糖尿病咨询准备方面，基于检索的大语言模型对话代理在质量、同理心和可操作性评分均优于临床医生，但仍不能作为自主治疗决策工具。
AI.motivation: 持续葡萄糖监测(CGM)是糖尿病护理的核心，但清晰且富有同理心地解释CGM模式非常耗时。LLM系统在CGM指导咨询中的证据仍然有限，需要评估其在帮助患者理解CGM数据和准备糖尿病常规就诊中的价值。
AI.method: 开发了基于检索的LLM对话代理用于CGM解释和糖尿病咨询支持。从公开数据集构建12个CGM知情案例，6名资深糖尿病临床医生各评审2个案例并回答24个问题。在盲法多评价者评估中，3名临床医生独立评价LLM生成和临床医生撰写的回复，评估6个质量维度，同时记录安全标志和感知来源标签。
AI.result: LLM对话代理获得比临床医生更高的质量评分(4.37 vs 3.58)，平均差异0.782点，在同理心(1.062)和可操作性(0.992)方面差异最大。安全标志分布相似，两组严重关切均罕见(各0.7%)。
AI.conclusion: 基于检索的LLM系统作为CGM审查、患者教育和就诊前准备的辅助工具具有价值，但研究结果不支持自主治疗决策或无监督的实际应用。

title: An Analysis of Regularization and Fokker-Planck Residuals in Diffusion Models for Image Generation
comment: Accepted at IJCNN 2026 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
summary: Recent work has shown that diffusion models trained with the denoising score matching (DSM) objective often violate the Fokker--Planck (FP) equation that governs the evolution of the true data density. Directly penalizing these deviations in the objective function reduces their magnitude but introduces a significant computational overhead. It is also observed that enforcing strict adherence to the FP equation does not necessarily lead to improvements in the quality of the generated samples, as often the best results are obtained with weaker FP regularization. In this paper, we investigate whether simpler penalty terms can provide similar benefits. We empirically analyze several lightweight regularizers, study their effect on FP residuals and generation quality, and show that the benefits of FP regularization are available at substantially lower computational cost. Our code is available at https://github.com/OnnoNiemann/fp_diffusion_analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文发现在扩散模型中强制执行Fokker-Planck方程并不总能提升生成质量，提出了轻量级正则化方法以低计算成本获得相同效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散模型训练方法常常违反Fokker-Planck方程，直接惩罚这些偏差虽然能减少违反程度但带来巨大计算开销，且严格遵守FP方程不一定改善生成质量。
AI.method: 通过经验分析多种轻量级正则化器，研究它们对FP残差和生成质量的影响，对比不同正则化策略的效果和计算成本。
AI.result: 证明了轻量级正则化方法能够以更低的计算成本获得与原始FP正则化相似的好处，在减少FP方程违反的同时保持生成质量。
AI.conclusion: FP正则化的优势可通过更简单的罚项在显著降低的计算成本下实现，为扩散模型训练提供了更高效的优化策略。

title: DiscoTrace: Representing and Comparing Answering Strategies of Humans and LLMs in Information-Seeking Question Answering
summary: We introduce DiscoTrace, a method to identify the rhetorical strategies that answerers use when responding to information-seeking questions. DiscoTrace represents answers as a sequence of question-related discourse acts paired with interpretations of the original question, annotated on top of rhetorical structure theory parses. Applying DiscoTrace to answers from nine different human communities reveals that communities have diverse preferences for answer construction. In contrast, LLMs do not exhibit rhetorical diversity in their answers, even when prompted to mimic specific human community answering guidelines. LLMs also systematically opt for breadth, addressing interpretations of questions that human answerers choose not to address. Our findings can guide the development of pragmatic LLM answerers that consider a range of strategies informed by context in QA.

AI.tldr: DiscoTrace是一种识别回答策略的方法，研究发现人类社区回答策略多样而LLM缺乏修辞多样性且更倾向于全面性。
AI.motivation: 理解不同人类社区在回答问题时使用的修辞策略，评估大语言模型(LLM)是否能够模仿多样化的回答方式，以指导开发更具实用性的LLM问答系统。
AI.method: DiscoTrace将答案表示为一序列与问题相关的语篇行为配对问题解释，基于修辞结构理论解析进行分析，应用于九个人类社区和LLM的答案进行比较研究。
AI.result: 研究发现人类社区具有多样化的答案构建偏好，而LLM缺乏修辞多样性，即使被提示模仿特定人类社区指南时也是如此。LLM系统性选择广泛性回答，处理人类回答者选择不处理的问题解释。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现可以为开发考虑上下文和多种策略的实用LLM问答系统提供指导，强调了在问答中考虑修辞多样性的重要性。

title: Boundary-Centric Active Learning for Temporal Action Segmentation
summary: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) demands dense temporal supervision, yet most of the annotation cost in untrimmed videos is spent identifying and refining action transitions, where segmentation errors concentrate and small temporal shifts disproportionately degrade segmental metrics. We introduce B-ACT, a clip-budgeted active learning framework that explicitly allocates supervision to these high-leverage boundary regions. B-ACT operates in a hierarchical two-stage loop: (i) it ranks and queries unlabeled videos using predictive uncertainty, and (ii) within each selected video, it detects candidate transitions from the current model predictions and selects the top-$K$ boundaries via a novel boundary score that fuses neighborhood uncertainty, class ambiguity, and temporal predictive dynamics. Importantly, our annotation protocol requests labels for only the boundary frames while still training on boundary-centered clips to exploit temporal context through the model's receptive field. Extensive experiments on GTEA, 50Salads, and Breakfast demonstrate that boundary-centric supervision delivers strong label efficiency and consistently surpasses representative TAS active learning baselines and prior state of the art under sparse budgets, with the largest gains on datasets where boundary placement dominates edit and overlap-based F1 scores.

AI.tldr: B-ACT是一个基于边界中心主动学习的时序动作分割框架，通过智能选择和标注动作边界帧，在稀疏标注预算下显著提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 时序动作分割需要密集的时间标注，但大部分标注成本都花费在识别和优化动作转换边界上。这些边界区域是分割错误的集中点，微小的时间偏移会不成比例地降低分割指标，因此需要更高效的标注策略。
AI.method: B-ACT采用分层两阶段循环：首先使用预测不确定性对未标注视频进行排序和查询；然后在每个选定视频中，从当前模型预测中检测候选转换边界，通过融合邻域不确定性、类别模糊度和时间预测动态的新颖边界评分选择top-K边界。标注协议仅请求边界帧标签，但仍以边界为中心的片段进行训练。
AI.result: 在GTEA、50Salads和Breakfast数据集上的大量实验表明，边界中心监督具有很强的标签效率，在稀疏预算下始终超越代表性TAS主动学习基线和之前的最先进方法，在边界放置主导编辑和重叠F1分数的数据集上获得最大收益。
AI.conclusion: 通过将标注资源集中在高杠杆的边界区域，B-ACT框架实现了显著的标注效率提升，为时序动作分割提供了一种实用的主动学习解决方案，特别适用于边界准确性要求高的应用场景。

title: QuantCode-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating the Ability of Large Language Models to Generate Executable Algorithmic Trading Strategies
summary: Large language models have demonstrated strong performance on general-purpose programming tasks, yet their ability to generate executable algorithmic trading strategies remains underexplored. Unlike standard code benchmarks, trading-strategy generation requires simultaneous mastery of domain-specific financial logic, knowledge of a specialized API, and the ability to produce code that is not only syntactically correct but also leads to actual trades on historical data. In this work, we present QuantCode-Bench, a benchmark for the systematic evaluation of modern LLMs in generating strategies for the Backtrader framework from textual descriptions in English. The benchmark contains 400 tasks of varying difficulty collected from Reddit, TradingView, StackExchange, GitHub, and synthetic sources. Evaluation is conducted through a multi-stage pipeline that checks syntactic correctness, successful backtest execution, the presence of trades, and semantic alignment with the task description using an LLM judge. We compare state-of-the-art models in two settings: single-turn, where the strategy must be generated correctly on the first attempt, and agentic multi-turn, where the model receives iterative feedback and may repair its errors. We analyze the failure modes across different stages of the pipeline and show that the main limitations of current models are not related to syntax, but rather to the correct operationalization of trading logic, proper API usage, and adherence to task semantics. These findings suggest that trading strategy generation constitutes a distinct class of domain-specific code generation tasks in which success requires not only technical correctness, but also alignment between natural-language descriptions, financial logic, and the observable behavior of the strategy on data.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了QuantCode-Bench基准测试，用于评估大语言模型生成可执行算法交易策略的能力。该基准包含400个不同难度的任务，通过多阶段 pipeline 评估模型的代码生成质量。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在通用编程任务上表现优异，但在生成可执行的算法交易策略方面尚未得到充分探索。交易策略生成需要同时掌握金融领域逻辑、专业API知识，并能生成在历史数据上实际执行交易的代码。
AI.method: 构建包含400个任务的QuantCode-Bench基准，采用多阶段评估流程：语法正确性检查、回测执行验证、交易存在性检查，以及使用LLM裁判进行语义对齐评估。在单轮生成和多轮代理交互两种设置下对比最先进模型。
AI.result: 当前模型的主要限制不在于语法，而在于交易逻辑的正确实施、API的适当使用和对任务语义的遵守。研究发现交易策略生成为一类独特的领域特定代码生成任务。
AI.conclusion: 成功的交易策略生成不仅需要技术正确性，还需要自然语言描述、金融逻辑和策略可观察行为之间的一致性，这对大语言模型提出了新的挑战。

title: VisPCO: Visual Token Pruning Configuration Optimization via Budget-Aware Pareto-Frontier Learning for Vision-Language Models
summary: Visual token pruning methods effectively mitigate the quadratic computational growth caused by processing high-resolution images and video frames in vision-language models (VLMs). However, existing approaches rely on predefined pruning configurations without determining whether they achieve computation-performance optimality. In this work, we introduce , a novel framework that formulates visual token pruning as a Pareto configuration optimization problem to automatically identify optimal configurations. Our approach employs continuous relaxation and straight-through estimators to enable gradient-based search, solved via the Augmented Lagrangian method. Extensive experiments across 8 visual benchmarks demonstrate that effectively approximates the empirical Pareto frontier obtained through grid search and generalizes well across various pruning methods and VLM architectures. Furthermore, through learnable kernel functions, we investigate layer-wise pruning patterns and reveal that multi-step progressive pruning captures VLMs' hierarchical compression structure, achieving superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs compared to single-layer approaches.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个框架，通过帕累托配置优化自动寻找视觉token剪枝的最优配置，实验证明该方法能有效逼近经验帕累托前沿并优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型中的视觉token剪枝方法依赖于预定义的剪枝配置，无法确定它们是否达到了计算性能的最优平衡点。
AI.method: 提出将视觉token剪枝表述为帕累托配置优化问题，采用连续松弛和直通估计器实现基于梯度的搜索，并通过增广拉格朗日方法求解。同时使用可学习的核函数研究分层剪枝模式。
AI.result: 在8个视觉基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法能有效逼近网格搜索获得的经验帕累托前沿，并能在各种剪枝方法和VLM架构上良好泛化。多步渐进式剪枝相比单层方法实现了更好的精度-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过优化搜索自动找到最优剪枝配置，揭示了VLMs的层次化压缩结构，为视觉语言模型的高效计算提供了新的解决方案。

title: Compressing Sequences in the Latent Embedding Space: $K$-Token Merging for Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) incur significant computational and memory costs when processing long prompts, as full self-attention scales quadratically with input length. Token compression aims to address this challenge by reducing the number of tokens representing inputs. However, existing prompt-compression approaches primarily operate in token space and overlook inefficiencies in the latent embedding space. In this paper, we propose K-Token Merging, a latent-space compression framework that merges each contiguous block of K token embeddings into a single embedding via a lightweight encoder. The compressed sequence is processed by a LoRA-adapted LLM, while generation remains in the original vocabulary. Experiments on structural reasoning (Textualized Tree), sentiment classification (Amazon Reviews), and code editing (CommitPackFT) show that K-Token Merging lies on the Pareto frontier of performance vs. compression, achieving up to 75% input length reduction with minimal performance degradation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了K-Token Merging框架，通过在潜在嵌入空间中将连续的K个token块压缩为单个嵌入，实现了最高75%的输入长度减少，同时保持模型性能基本不变。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型处理长提示词时存在计算和内存成本过高的主要原因是自注意力机制与输入长度呈二次方关系增长。现有的token压缩方法主要在token空间操作，忽略了潜在嵌入空间的低效性问题。
AI.method: K-Token Merging采用潜在空间压缩方法，使用轻量级编码器将每个连续的K个token嵌入块合并为单个嵌入。压缩后的序列由LoRA适配的LLM处理，而生成过程仍然使用原始词汇表。
AI.result: 在结构推理(Textualized Tree)、情感分类(Amazon Reviews)和代码编辑(CommitPackFT)等任务上，K-Token Merging位于性能与压缩率的帕累托前沿，在75%的输入长度减少下性能损失极小。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过在潜在空间进行高效的token合并，有效解决了长文本处理中的计算效率问题，为实际应用中处理长输入提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Unsupervised Skeleton-Based Action Segmentation via Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Vector Quantization
summary: We propose a novel hierarchical spatiotemporal vector quantization framework for unsupervised skeleton-based temporal action segmentation. We first introduce a hierarchical approach, which includes two consecutive levels of vector quantization. Specifically, the lower level associates skeletons with fine-grained subactions, while the higher level further aggregates subactions into action-level representations. Our hierarchical approach outperforms the non-hierarchical baseline, while primarily exploiting spatial cues by reconstructing input skeletons. Next, we extend our approach by leveraging both spatial and temporal information, yielding a hierarchical spatiotemporal vector quantization scheme. In particular, our hierarchical spatiotemporal approach performs multi-level clustering, while simultaneously recovering input skeletons and their corresponding timestamps. Lastly, extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, including HuGaDB, LARa, and BABEL, demonstrate that our approach establishes a new state-of-the-art performance and reduces segment length bias in unsupervised skeleton-based temporal action segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的分层次时空向量量化框架，用于无监督骨骼动作时序分割，通过多层次聚类联合恢复骨架和时序信息。
AI.motivation: 无监督骨骼动作时序分割面临挑战，现有方法主要依赖空间信息，难以有效捕获动作的时空特征和复杂层级结构。
AI.method: 设计分层向量量化框架：下层将骨架与细粒度子动作关联，上层将子动作聚合成动作级表示；进一步扩展为时空方案，通过多级聚类同时恢复骨架和时间戳信息。
AI.result: 在HuGaDB、LARa和BABEL等多个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，有效减少了分割长度偏差。
AI.conclusion: 分层时空向量量化框架能够有效利用时空信息，显著提升无监督骨骼动作分割的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Fabricator or dynamic translator?
summary: LLMs are proving to be adept at machine translation although due to their generative nature they may at times overgenerate in various ways. These overgenerations are different from the neurobabble seen in NMT and range from LLM self-explanations, to risky confabulations, to appropriate explanations, where the LLM is able to act as a human translator would, enabling greater comprehension for the target audience. Detecting and determining the exact nature of the overgenerations is a challenging task. We detail different strategies we have explored for our work in a commercial setting, and present our results.

AI.tldr: 大语言模型在机器翻译中存在过度生成现象，本文探讨了商业环境中检测和分类这些过度生成的方法及其结果。
AI.motivation: LLM作为翻译工具虽然表现优异，但其生成特性会导致过度生成问题，这些过度生成与神经机器翻译中的神经胡言乱语不同，包含自解释、虚构内容和适当解释等多种类型，亟需有效的检测和分类方法。
AI.method: 在商业环境中探索了多种策略来检测和确定过度生成的确切性质，包括对不同类型过度生成的分析和识别。
AI.result: 提出了针对LLM翻译中过度生成问题的解决方案，并通过实验验证了这些方法在商业应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LLM翻译中的过度生成现象既有风险也有价值，适当的管理和检测策略可以使LLM更好地模拟人类翻译的行为，为目标受众提供更好的理解。

title: StreamCacheVGGT: Streaming Visual Geometry Transformers with Robust Scoring and Hybrid Cache Compression
summary: Reconstructing dense 3D geometry from continuous video streams requires stable inference under a constant memory budget. Existing $O(1)$ frameworks primarily rely on a ``pure eviction'' paradigm, which suffers from significant information destruction due to binary token deletion and evaluation noise from localized, single-layer scoring. To address these bottlenecks, we propose StreamCacheVGGT, a training-free framework that reimagines cache management through two synergistic modules: Cross-Layer Consistency-Enhanced Scoring (CLCES) and Hybrid Cache Compression (HCC). CLCES mitigates activation noise by tracking token importance trajectories across the Transformer hierarchy, employing order-statistical analysis to identify sustained geometric salience. Leveraging these robust scores, HCC transcends simple eviction by introducing a three-tier triage strategy that merges moderately important tokens into retained anchors via nearest-neighbor assignment on the key-vector manifold. This approach preserves essential geometric context that would otherwise be lost. Extensive evaluations on five benchmarks (7-Scenes, NRGBD, ETH3D, Bonn, and KITTI) demonstrate that StreamCacheVGGT sets a new state-of-the-art, delivering superior reconstruction accuracy and long-term stability while strictly adhering to constant-cost constraints.

AI.tldr: StreamCacheVGGT是一个无需训练的视频流3D重建框架，通过跨层一致评分和混合缓存压缩策略，在恒定内存下实现了更准确稳定的密集3D几何重建。
AI.motivation: 现有O(1)框架采用'纯驱逐'范式，由于二元令牌删除和局部单层评分的评估噪声，存在严重的信息破坏问题，影响视频流中密集3D几何重建的稳定性。
AI.method: 提出两个协同模块：Cross-Layer Consistency-Enhanced Scoring (CLCES)通过跟踪Transformer层次结构中令牌重要性轨迹来缓解激活噪声；Hybrid Cache Compression (HCC)引入三层分诊策略，通过关键向量流形上的最近邻分配将中等重要令牌合并到保留的锚点中，超越简单驱逐模式。
AI.result: 在7-Scenes、NRGBD、ETH3D、Bonn和KITTI五个基准测试中，StreamCacheVGGT实现了最先进的性能，提供了卓越的重建精度和长期稳定性，同时严格遵守恒定成本约束。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过创新的缓存管理机制，有效解决了视频流3D重建中内存约束与信息保持的平衡问题，为实时应用提供了新的解决方案。

title: MADE: A Living Benchmark for Multi-Label Text Classification with Uncertainty Quantification of Medical Device Adverse Events
summary: Machine learning in high-stakes domains such as healthcare requires not only strong predictive performance but also reliable uncertainty quantification (UQ) to support human oversight. Multi-label text classification (MLTC) is a central task in this domain, yet remains challenging due to label imbalances, dependencies, and combinatorial complexity. Existing MLTC benchmarks are increasingly saturated and may be affected by training data contamination, making it difficult to distinguish genuine reasoning capabilities from memorization. We introduce MADE, a living MLTC benchmark derived from {m}edical device {ad}verse {e}vent reports and continuously updated with newly published reports to prevent contamination. MADE features a long-tailed distribution of hierarchical labels and enables reproducible evaluation with strict temporal splits. We establish baselines across more than 20 encoder- and decoder-only models under fine-tuning and few-shot settings (instruction-tuned/reasoning variants, local/API-accessible). We systematically assess entropy-/consistency-based and self-verbalized UQ methods. Results show clear trade-offs: smaller discriminatively fine-tuned decoders achieve the strongest head-to-tail accuracy while maintaining competitive UQ; generative fine-tuning delivers the most reliable UQ; large reasoning models improve performance on rare labels yet exhibit surprisingly weak UQ; and self-verbalized confidence is not a reliable proxy for uncertainty. Our work is publicly available at https://hhi.fraunhofer.de/aml-demonstrator/made-benchmark.

AI.tldr: MADE是一个面向医疗设备不良事件报告的多标签文本分类基准测试，通过实时更新数据防止训练污染，并系统评估了20多种模型的不确定性量化能力。
AI.motivation: 高风险领域（如医疗保健）的机器学习需要可靠的预测和不确定性量化，但现有的多标签文本分类基准存在训练数据污染问题，难以区分真实推理能力和记忆能力。
AI.method: 构建了基于医疗设备不良事件报告的动态MLTC基准MADE，采用长尾分布的层次标签、严格的时间分割，并系统评估了20多种编码器和解码器模型在微调和少样本设置下的表现及多种UQ方法。
AI.result: 小型判别式微调解码器在保持竞争力UQ的同时实现了最强的头尾准确率；生成式微调提供最可靠的UQ；大型推理模型提升罕见标签性能但UQ较弱；自语言化置信度不是可靠的不确定性代理指标。
AI.conclusion: MADE通过防止数据污染和严格评估，为医疗领域MLTC模型的不确定性量化研究提供了重要基准，揭示了模型性能与不确定性量化之间的权衡关系。

title: TokenGS: Decoupling 3D Gaussian Prediction from Pixels with Learnable Tokens
summary: In this work, we revisit several key design choices of modern Transformer-based approaches for feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) prediction. We argue that the common practice of regressing Gaussian means as depths along camera rays is suboptimal, and instead propose to directly regress 3D mean coordinates using only a self-supervised rendering loss. This formulation allows us to move from the standard encoder-only design to an encoder-decoder architecture with learnable Gaussian tokens, thereby unbinding the number of predicted primitives from input image resolution and number of views. Our resulting method, TokenGS, demonstrates improved robustness to pose noise and multiview inconsistencies, while naturally supporting efficient test-time optimization in token space without degrading learned priors. TokenGS achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward reconstruction performance on both static and dynamic scenes, producing more regularized geometry and more balanced 3DGS distribution, while seamlessly recovering emergent scene attributes such as static-dynamic decomposition and scene flow.

AI.tldr: TokenGS通过直接回归3D高斯均值坐标而非沿相机射线的深度，采用编码器-解码器架构，实现了更鲁棒的前馈3D高斯泼溅预测，取得了SOTA的静态和动态场景重建性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Transformer的前馈3D高斯泼溅方法通常沿相机射线回归高斯均值作为深度值，这种方式存在局限性；同时标准编码器设计的预测原语数量受输入图像分辨率和视角数量限制。
AI.method: 提出基于编码器-解码器架构的TokenGS，使用可学习的高斯标记直接回归3D均值坐标，仅需自监督渲染损失进行训练；将预测原语数量与输入图像解耦，支持token空间的测试时优化。
AI.result: TokenGS在静态和动态场景上达到了SOTA的前馈重建性能，对姿态噪声和多视角不一致性具有更强的鲁棒性，产生更正则化的几何和更平衡的3DGS分布，并能无缝恢复静态-动态分解和场景流等场景属性。
AI.conclusion: 直接回归3D坐标的设计和编码器-解码器架构有效改善了前馈3D高斯泼溅的性能，TokenGS为高效、鲁棒的三维场景重建提供了新的解决方案。

title: From Tokens to Steps: Verification-Aware Speculative Decoding for Efficient Multi-Step Reasoning
summary: Speculative decoding (SD) accelerates large language model inference by allowing a lightweight draft model to propose outputs that a stronger target model verifies. However, its token-centric nature allows erroneous steps to propagate. Prior approaches mitigate this using external reward models, but incur additional latency, computational overhead, and limit generalizability. We propose SpecGuard, a verification-aware speculative decoding framework that performs step-level verification using only model-internal signals. At each step, SpecGuard samples multiple draft candidates and selects the most consistent step, which is then validated using an ensemble of two lightweight model-internal signals: (i) an attention-based grounding score that measures attribution to the input and previously accepted steps, and (ii) a log-probability-based score that captures token-level confidence. These signals jointly determine whether a step is accepted or recomputed using the target, allocating compute selectively. Experiments across a range of reasoning benchmarks show that SpecGuard improves accuracy by 3.6% while reducing latency by ~11%, outperforming both SD and reward-guided SD.

AI.tldr: SpecGuard是一个仅使用模型内部信号的验证感知投机解码框架，通过多候选采样和内部信号集成实现选择性计算分配，在提升推理准确性的同时减少了推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有投机解码方法采用token中心机制，错误步骤容易传播，而使用外部奖励模型的解决方案会引入额外延迟、计算开销并限制泛化能力。
AI.method: SpecGuard在每个步骤采样多个草稿候选，选择最一致步骤，然后使用两个轻量级内部信号（基于注意力的归因分数和基于对数概率的置信度分数）进行验证，根据信号决定接受或重新计算。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准测试中，SpecGuard将准确率提升3.6%，同时减少约11%的延迟，性能超越传统投机解码和奖励引导的投机解码方法。
AI.conclusion: SpecGuard证明了仅使用模型内部信号即可实现有效的步骤级验证，为高效准确的大语言模型推理提供了新的解决方案。

title: SegWithU: Uncertainty as Perturbation Energy for Single-Forward-Pass Risk-Aware Medical Image Segmentation
summary:
Reliable uncertainty estimation is critical for medical image segmentation, where automated contours feed downstream quantification and clinical decision support. Many strong uncertainty methods require repeated inference, while efficient single-forward-pass alternatives often provide weaker failure ranking or rely on restrictive feature-space assumptions. We present $\textbf{SegWithU}$, a post-hoc framework that augments a frozen pretrained segmentation backbone with a lightweight uncertainty head. SegWithU taps intermediate backbone features and models uncertainty as perturbation energy in a compact probe space using rank-1 posterior probes. It produces two voxel-wise uncertainty maps: a calibration-oriented map for probability tempering and a ranking-oriented map for error detection and selective prediction. Across ACDC, BraTS2024, and LiTS, SegWithU is the strongest and most consistent single-forward-pass baseline, achieving AUROC/AURC of $0.9838/2.4885$, $0.9946/0.2660$, and $0.9925/0.8193$, respectively, while preserving segmentation quality. These results suggest that perturbation-based uncertainty modeling is an effective and practical route to reliability-aware medical segmentation.
  Source code is available at https://github.com/ProjectNeura/SegWithU.

AI.tldr: SegWithU是一种轻量级后处理框架，通过单次前向传播为预训练分割模型添加不确定性估计，在多个医学影像数据集上实现了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割的可靠性估计对临床决策至关重要，现有方法要么需要重复推理效率低下，要么基于单次前向传播的方法在故障排序或特征空间假设上存在局限。
AI.method: SegWithU框架冻结预训练分割主干网络，利用其中间特征，通过秩1后验探针在紧凑探针空间中将不确定性建模为扰动能量，生成两种体素级不确定性图：用于概率校准的校准导向图和用于错误检测的选择性预测排序导向图。
AI.result: 在ACDC、BraTS2024和LiTS数据集上，SegWithU作为最强最一致的单次前向传播基线，分别达到0.9838/2.4885、0.9946/0.2660和0.9925/0.8193的AUROC/AURC值，同时保持分割质量。
AI.conclusion: 基于扰动的不确定性建模是实现可靠性感知医学分割的有效且实用的途径，SegWithU提供了高效的解决方案并已开源。

title: Why Do Vision Language Models Struggle To Recognize Human Emotions?
summary: Understanding emotions is a fundamental ability for intelligent systems to be able to interact with humans. Vision-language models (VLMs) have made tremendous progress in the last few years for many visual tasks, potentially offering a promising solution for understanding emotions. However, it is surprising that even the most sophisticated contemporary VLMs struggle to recognize human emotions or to outperform even specialized vision-only classifiers. In this paper we ask the question "Why do VLMs struggle to recognize human emotions?", and observe that the inherently continuous and dynamic task of facial expression recognition (DFER) exposes two critical VLM vulnerabilities. First, emotion datasets are naturally long-tailed, and the web-scale data used to pre-train VLMs exacerbates this head-class bias, causing them to systematically collapse rare, under-represented emotions into common categories. We propose alternative sampling strategies that prevent favoring common concepts. Second, temporal information is critical for understanding emotions. However, VLMs are unable to represent temporal information over dense frame sequences, as they are limited by context size and the number of tokens that can fit in memory, which poses a clear challenge for emotion recognition. We demonstrate that the sparse temporal sampling strategy used in VLMs is inherently misaligned with the fleeting nature of micro-expressions (0.25-0.5 seconds), which are often the most critical affective signal. As a diagnostic probe, we propose a multi-stage context enrichment strategy that utilizes the information from "in-between" frames by first converting them into natural language summaries. This enriched textual context is provided as input to the VLM alongside sparse keyframes, preventing attentional dilution from excessive visual data while preserving the emotional trajectory.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了视觉语言模型在情感识别任务中的两个关键弱点：1）数据长尾分布导致头部类别偏见；2）时序信息处理能力有限，无法捕捉微表情等短暂情感信号。作者提出了替代采样策略和多阶段上下文丰富方法来解决这些问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在视觉任务中进展显著，但它们在人类情感识别方面表现不佳，甚至不如专门的视觉分类器。这促使作者探究VLMs在情感识别上的根本性困难。
AI.method: 文章采用诊断性分析方法，识别出VLMs在情感识别上的两个核心问题：1）通过分析数据集的长尾分布特性，发现预训练数据加剧了头部类别偏见；2）研究VLMs的时序处理限制，发现其稀疏采样策略与微表情的短暂特性不匹配。相应提出了替代采样策略和将中间帧转换为自然语言摘要的多阶段上下文丰富策略。
AI.result: 研究证实了VLMs在情感识别中的两个关键脆弱性：长尾数据导致的系统性偏见和对时序信息的处理不足。提出的文本化上下文丰富方法能够在避免注意力稀释的同时保持情感轨迹信息。
AI.conclusion: VLMs在情感识别上的困难源于其数据处理偏见和时序建模能力的根本性局限。通过改进采样策略和引入文本化时序信息，可以有效提升VLMs对动态情感的理解能力，为构建更情感智能的系统提供了重要见解。

title: R3D: Revisiting 3D Policy Learning
summary: 3D policy learning promises superior generalization and cross-embodiment transfer, but progress has been hindered by training instabilities and severe overfitting, precluding the adoption of powerful 3D perception models. In this work, we systematically diagnose these failures, identifying the omission of 3D data augmentation and the adverse effects of Batch Normalization as primary causes. We propose a new architecture coupling a scalable transformer-based 3D encoder with a diffusion decoder, engineered specifically for stability at scale and designed to leverage large-scale pre-training. Our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D baselines on challenging manipulation benchmarks, establishing a new and robust foundation for scalable 3D imitation learning. Project Page: https://r3d-policy.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个结合3D Transformer编码器和扩散解码器的新架构，解决了3D策略学习中的训练不稳定和过拟合问题，在操作基准测试中显著优于现有方法。
